Hi Peter,
This morning Harriet and I were driving with the radio on K2 95.1 FM, and she mentioned how powerful it would be if we could broadcast our message through the airwaves of every Radio Station in Wyoming. The people of America, and especially those in Wyoming, deserve to know that Liz Cheney has sided with the Washington, D.C. elites and those who use their power to further their own agenda at our expense. She doesn’t represent Wyoming and she doesn’t represent conservatives. We deserve better. We demand better. Harriet is running to represent Wyoming and take our state back from big government. There are over 280,000 registered voters in Wyoming and if we don’t reach every single one, it could spell danger. [_Can we count on you to make this very important contribution to our Hageman Radio Ad Fund? We are asking you for $5, $10, $25, $50 or more to get our message out through every radio station. Step up here!__

clean_body: | | | | Did you see Harriet’s email? | Hi Peter, This morning Harriet and I were driving with the radio on K2 95.1 FM, and she mentioned how powerful it would be if we could broadcast our message through the airwaves of every Radio Station in Wyoming. The people of America, and especially those in Wyoming, deserve to know that Liz Cheney has sided with the Washington, D.C. elites and those who use their power to further their own agenda at our expense. She doesn’t represent Wyoming and she doesn’t represent conservatives. We deserve better. We demand better. Harriet is running to represent Wyoming and take our state back from big government. There are over 280,000 registered voters in Wyoming and if we don’t reach every single one, it could spell danger. Harriet and the rest of Team Hageman are counting on YOU to help us spread the word of our campaign. It’s time to get LOUD. Thank you, Carly Campaign Manager Hageman for Wyoming \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Harriet Hageman - Endorsed by Pres. Trump Subject: DC is after us To: Peter - With over 200 days until the Primary Election day, our opponent, the FAKE news, and the DC Swamp have begun attacking us. They HATE that President Trump, Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy, and Republican Chair Elise Stefanik have endorsed our campaign. They despise that the Wyoming GOP has removed Liz Cheney from the State Party. And they are furious that WE ARE WINNING! They are so angry over our America First movement that they need to attack YOU and me. Liz Cheney calls anyone who disagrees with her “crazy.” In Wyoming, we understand that when you are under attack, especially by big government bureaucrats and elitists, it’s time to fight back. Our opponent and the DC elites will do whatever it takes to maintain power, even if they have to attack the very backbone of this country. That is why it is so important to make sure our campaign message is spread as far and wide as possible. You have been so important to our campaign, please don’t let us down when we need your most Thank you, | | Harriet Hageman Republican Candidate Wyoming’s Lone Congressional Seat | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

body:
Real solutions for real people
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdkE9PxCAQxT8NvbWhA0vtoYfVdW970cSDF0KBbtnwp7ZUrZ9eunZNNIFJeG_4Zd6ohrW1YplpAANgki7GJWZFJwhUWEDLKCZtWyKKXXExbtReSGkKGVzWN5iIupYlU1WtCUsISmtJAco7TSUAZLbpYxwmRPYIjun8JSRhCnaOJvjUcpyj404rMztEDtoJYxGwVZzCPEqdRC8tF26wpls2S6anMGefzFuCPBXM3cIHKzzvwshDb8KtP_ioffxh5cuz_Dx9XaaXt2Rzb41Kxj-xN2pa6eG1s-w9Gxs1fBhrzcSqtJTzOuZ1G9tcDaruEcD1F8A1ONBlf3rqd8uwyxMmF949rh48pBqXQf82boxiCw-oOnwDZ7SD6g)

Friend,

My plan to put Ohio first is simple – offer real solutions for our State. It is my priority to take REAL action that will make life better for ALL Ohioans.

A few solutions that must be acted upon to put Ohio first include but are not limited to:
* Full tax reform
* Making Ohio a sanctuary for freedom
* Eliminating corruption and “pay to play” politics
* Education reform
* Capitalizing on our energy assets
* Ceasing Medicaid expansion
* Restoring the American Dream in Ohio

You can learn more about my plans for Ohio by visiting the**“solutions”** page of my website.

_Will you join me in this fight?_

body:
It’s official - I'm a NRCC Young Gun. We just made it back to Oregon after spending a week in DC with future Speaker Kevin McCarthy, Steve Scalise and We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=93fa338eb6da44b5b3f7cedf30e49e07&_e=u7zZ1hl_1hiLwfTSTKhlpr4xtuFumWTx4N6VnpntEUWJ4AXqRWI81wOGrO4m2bh48EkvlfXe6UkDQE13k-HbMpIM3yv91Hh6LzOD-OH16ZrCYLfvg5vMnovQOXjlW2tIc-dd8ra6jYGph0Hll_dZyVqymZobACakfho04F3l3m0SuJuL7Sdbhrf6zM3HT4Z8rxsUvc-Vf7ALDt1ddOC5sXNazqlp1Rmzi8m4CfFCOuqJtixG1Gqzy0TPHdAkiCnlHEXuMvYli2hHjTLpnJ9POtJH93pnCdGcX-l1xlzAHK4g5TS3mbaXTVb2liHaMkNW1sOhq_toAB0ujvREiOmkigpaTZi-FGX323vUdAIPYFlboDWdbg2wthkQyJz8rcMRAxuM0sLCWODx8KnfkC8z2pDwGi14-3HJ8RaSnWrMAQ8GSKUf1Kh4GIl7xA4tRcNTqBlbFG23ynaYj_zzy2cWdw%3D%3D)

Peter,

We just made it back to Oregon after spending a week in DC with future Speaker Kevin McCarthy, Steve Scalise and other Republican dignitaries. We flew across the country because I was recently named a NRCC “Young Gun” candidate.

We wouldn’t have made it into this esteemed program without your help. You see, the NRCC only names candidates who meet certain criteria – i.e., candidates who have a robust fundraising operation, proven communications strategy and a compelling message that resonates with voters in the district.

Young Gun candidates, the NRCC’s website reads, “represent the most competitive congressional seats in the 2022 election cycle.”

After announcing the latest slate of “Young Gun” candidates, Leader McCarthy had this to say:

_**"The newest candidates to the list show how we plan to take back the House by holding their Democrat opponents accountable for the disastrous policies we have seen from the One-Party Democrat Rule of Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi."**_

After having been awarded this honor and all that comes along with it, we cannot fall short.

**[Are you able to make a gift of $1 or more right now to help us make headway in reaching this lofty goal? We think we can get it done, but not unless you step up and help us get there.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=93fa338eb6da44b5b3f7cedf30e49e07&_e=u7zZ1hl_1hiLwfTSTKhlpr4xtuFumWTx4N6VnpntEUWJ4AXqRWI81wOGrO4m2bh48EkvlfXe6UkDQE13k-HbMpIM3yv91Hh6LzOD-OH16ZrCYLfvg5vMnovQOXjlW2tIc-dd8ra6jYGph0Hll_dZyVqymZobACakfho04F3l3m0SuJuL7Sdbhrf6zM3HT4Z8rxsUvc-Vf7ALDt1ddOC5sXNazqlp1Rmzi8m4CfFCOuqJtixG1Gqzy0TPHdAkiCnld25LjLmZcG73GHf65URBJ8ysj0h56idPLjBDz_OTiNYtIfrt1yGsBnS_kwc0x-bqIp1aSdNjDDcJT8JHWC34rs4weCIMaibUu6-Pj6u8wbpRzl8xQT2e-pWf1PR4-XCewQgwtaanWZnzcWyaRqc9wGyEjl-MNnru26n8R4WuGg8aCc6Lpl5tNJFzP57Vr_ed--a4tqOhG5Lv_lVIXX-TjQ%3D%3D)**

**HELP ME RAISE $30K by 3/31** [** CHIP IN $1 TODAY ➞ **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=93fa338eb6da44b5b3f7cedf30e49e07&_e=u7zZ1hl_1hiLwfTSTKhlpr4xtuFumWTx4N6VnpntEUWJ4AXqRWI81wOGrO4m2bh48EkvlfXe6UkDQE13k-HbMpIM3yv91Hh6LzOD-OH16ZrCYLfvg5vMnovQOXjlW2tIc-dd8ra6jYGph0Hll_dZyVqymZobACakfho04F3l3m0SuJuL7Sdbhrf6zM3HT4Z8rxsUvc-Vf7ALDt1ddOC5sXNazqlp1Rmzi8m4CfFCOuqfHMj5llQrhDJl3nzBdaTNFO-AKHuXf2NinSNi8-9vCSoP5P30xY3VJW4Sivvj7B7aHDSVU87iwpxidGp8HnpjmZ1Ng7IBF1E5C1g_VSjvGKGkR8ns5IFW03CCnGkH9-yNiH8vekioa-SVR0sHP-24AnWBX5Mn044r1RhtmEWNbfi_XcSxaxv824OmbJhqv6dUX4miqPxtY-muC0kWKJyHgXpV5JjenFZ9FCxXAtXjjxEpb5HE4L-Y3IgCOj56Q8k%3D)

You see, the NRCC only names candidates who meet certain criteria – i.e., candidates who have a robust fundraising operation, proven communications strategy and a compelling message that resonates with voters in the district. name: Katherine Fischer, Beto for Texas
subject: You're invited: Virtual organizing call with Beto
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

We're building the biggest and best organizing program in Texas history.
Last month alone, over 56,000 volunteers came together to contact 4.5
million voters before the primary election!

But to defeat Greg Abbott, we're going to need to take risks and try
organizing strategies that no campaign has ever tried before. It's no
small task, so that's where you come in.

Beto and I will be laying out our plan to win on Wednesday's virtual
organizing call while also discussing how folks like you can get involved!
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54079?utm_source=ema20220321-181476&t=1001&akid=181476%2E444211%2EeuOOFf ]Can you join Beto on our organizing call?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54079?utm_source=ema20220321-181476&t=1002&akid=181476%2E444211%2EeuOOFf ]Beto for Texas Virtual Plan to Win Organizing Call
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54079?utm_source=ema20220321-181476&t=1003&akid=181476%2E444211%2EeuOOFf ]Wednesday, March 23
7:00 – 8:00pm CDT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54079?utm_source=ema20220321-181476&t=1004&akid=181476%2E444211%2EeuOOFf ]Get more info or RSVP

Most campaigns guard this kind of information under lock and key, but we
know we can't win without y'all. So I hope you'll join Beto and me on
Wednesday's call to learn how you can participate.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54079?utm_source=ema20220321-181476&t=1005&akid=181476%2E444211%2EeuOOFf ]RSVP now for Wednesday's call to learn more about how you can help
elect Beto and get Texas on the right track. Then, forward this invitation
to three friends — we want as many supporters as possible to be a part of
this movement!

Thank you,

Katherine Fischer
Organizing Director, Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=181476%2E444211%2EeuOOFf

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

I have more great news: The political insider running against me only gets one vote, just like the rest of us. That means "We the People" will be heard from once again: Let's win the Primary and then take on Tammy Duckworth! If my fight for election integrity prevails (and it will), we have a real shot! **Are you in?** The bell for the next round has rung. Now I need to raise enough funds to battle the establishment and score a win for the people! **Can you help?** The people are hungry for something new in Illinois. Can you sense it? How about sending a Senator who'll shake things up? Too many Republicans are either in on the globalist agenda like Paul Ryan was, or they are too weak or complacent to put up a fight. **That's why my campaign needs your support, for freedom and for America!** Politicians on both sides cost a fortune every day - from foolhardy policies to rolling over in surrender, evil or naive, neither quality serves us well. The Democrats are ALL-IN to defeat Republicans this year and hold their Senate majority. With the help from their dark-money allies - the left is spending hundreds of millions of dollars in red-states to defeat conservatives they deem _vulnerable_.

Despite their efforts, I know that Senator Mike Lee will NOT go down without a fight. Dear Friend,

It’s hard to believe a month has passed since Kelly announced I would be her running mate!

The day Kelly and I discussed my joining the ticket came as my duties as Chief Medical Officer of the State of Maryland were coming to an end. After a long career in the military and public service, I was looking forward to spending more time with my family and helping my kids with science projects.
To say I was honored would be an understatement.
After talking it over with Nicole and our two children, we decided that my time in public service wasn’t over and running for Lieutenant Governor was the right decision. Not only am I humbled by the confidence Kelly has entrusted in me, but I understand the ability to serve my state on this level would be the honor of a lifetime.
The only request I had was my ability to continue to serve in the Maryland Air National Guard as Commander of the 175th Medical Group. When Kelly told me that she comes from a military family and wouldn’t have it any other way, I responded with a resounding YES!
In the past month we have been busy crisscrossing the state meeting voters and talking about the issues most important to Marylanders. Our message of safe, steady, and prosperous leadership is resonating in my hometown in Carroll County and every county across the state.
Kelly and I share the values of hard work and service. We both come from humble beginnings and understand that trust and respect are not given freely, but are earned.
I look forward to getting to know you better and to sharing our vision for Maryland. And I will work every day to earn both your respect and trust.
Together, I know we can make Maryland the best state in the nation. It will be my honor to serve.
Thank you,
---
---
Jeff Woolford
---

In the past month we have been busy crisscrossing the state meeting voters and talking about the issues most important to Marylanders. Our message of safe, steady, and prosperous leadership is resonating in my hometown in Carroll County and every county across the state. Kelly and I share the values of hard work and service. We both come from humble beginnings and understand that trust and respect are not given freely, but are earned. I look forward to getting to know you better and to sharing our vision for Maryland. And I will work every day to earn both your respect and trust. Together, I know we can make Maryland the best state in the nation. It will be my honor to serve. Thank you, Jeff Woolford | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Jeff Woolford P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

body:

---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**CONTACT** : PRESS@NICKFORNJ.COM
---
| |
# De Gregorio Wins Only CD5 Debate
_First-time candidate offered clearest vision for beating Josh Gottheimer in November_
---
| **FAIR LAWN –** Tonight, Nick De Gregorio, a Marine Veteran and Republican Candidate for Congress in New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District, released the following statement after the CD5 forum offered by several Bergen County Republican Clubs in Woodcliff Lake concluded:

“Tonight, I was proud to outline my vision for protecting the country we know and love for not only my two precious children, but also for every future generation of Americans. We will do this by going to Washington, D.C. and putting the brakes on the Biden-Gottheimer agenda that has sent inflation soaring and left us dependent on hostile nations for our energy consumption. When Fifth District families need to make hard choices at the gas pump and grocery store, it limits the potential for everyone to succeed and imperils the type of risk-taking and innovation that creates generational wealth,” said De Gregorio.

He continued, “While outlining a positive vision, it was also imperative to arm Bergen County Committee members with the facts going into such a critical election. The bottom line is that with over 80% of the population center anchored in Bergen County, we simply cannot afford to lose it again to Josh Gottheimer by double digits. This election is our opportunity to reverse the disastrous course of the last year for the Fifth District, and primary voters need the facts - not more empty promises.”

In the debate, De Gregorio affirmed his support for lowering energy costs through the responsible domestic energy production, including fossil fuels, his opposition to Biden’s “Build Back Better” inflationary spending spree, and his commitment to delivering true relief to overtaxed Fifth District families.

The first-time candidate also cited key factors for winning against the incumbent Democrat in the fall, including his national recognition, as well as his position as the CD5 Republican fundraising leader.

De Gregorio will compete in the Bergen County Republican Organization (“BCRO”) County Convention this Wednesday, March 23rd after winning the recommendation of over 70% of the BCRO Policy Committee.
---
| De Gregorio has received the recommendation of the Bergen County Republican Organization ("BCRO") Policy Committee ahead of this week's County Convention, as well as the support of the Frontline Patriots PAC. He was also recently named to the National Republican Congressional Committee’s Young Gun: “On the Radar” recruitment and support program.
---

Friend,

Can you believe it?

FIRST, it was DirecTV.

NOW, it's Time Warner.

I am disgusted that Time Warner, the owner of Fake News CNN, has just announced that they will be terminating a very popular and wonderful news network (OAN).

Between heavily indebted Time Warner, and Radical Left Comcast, which runs Xfinity, there is a _**virtual monopoly on news,**_ thereby making what you hear from the Lamestream Media essentially _FAKE_.

Don't you see it, Friend? The Left wants to SILENCE anyone and everyone who disagrees with the LIES they are pushing.

_The Left NEVER stops coming after me, Friend. I 'm fighting back (and I'll WIN), but I'm calling on YOU to stand with me. It's time to let them know that you are sick and tired of FAKE NEWS!_

name: Bryan Steil, Congressman
subject: Common Sense Election Security
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, we must enact common sense election integrity measures. Voter ID is a simple, effective, common sense solution that will make it easy to vote and hard to cheat.
Peter,**Election integrity should be top of mind for every member of Congress.** Ensuring that every legal vote is counted is the first step to making sure our elections are fair and accurate. **Unfortunately, Democrats are trying to gut Voter ID nationwide and prevent states from enacting these common sense measures. Speaker Pelosi and Democrats in Washington want California style elections nationwide, which would make our elections less secure.** We cannot allow that to happen. We must take control of Congress this November and stop the Democrats' radical agenda.**Voter ID makes it easy to vote and hard to cheat.** It is a simple but effective measure that will help us maintain election integrity. **[Can you help by pitching in $10 to fuel our Red Wave in November? Every contribution is greatly appreciated.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhidllt-idtjvlhlh-r/)** On Wisconsin, Bryan
--

Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhidllt-idtjvlhlh-y/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhidllt-idtjvlhlh-j/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhidllt-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhidllt-idtjvlhlh-i/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zhidllt-l-h) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Patriot,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Patriot, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59902617:JWRCn8oNc:m:1:3299561967:87C78760F982B815ECF1A0A27CB5FB37:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |

body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.

name: 4Patriots
subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE
body:
Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
[**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbvprcktcv1b2aeb1pfla9i15lf89vtlc7h2bp9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgm2p30cjh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8i4kdgb7fkfpibbkqv553oobp416l1v6brhqv4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgm2p30cjh2bs) If last year taught us anything... It's not IF you need a backup plan... it's **WHEN.** It's sad, but facts are facts... A deadly pandemic, blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. **Crisis mode has become the new normal.** And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're fully ready, even when the power goes out. Nothing feels more vulnerable than when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. Imagine all your critical devices, communications, comfort and protection, suddenly on borrowed time. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that the first batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znp2l61ufr0oab7tg5r7pvb1bvtcnobhge4esc1o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgm2p30cjh2bs) [**> > Video: This mini solar generator powers devices and weighs less than a housecat**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6hduak14o48ps6fqdlvku9cmg8q5p8dcu8mc108_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgm2p30cjh2bs) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll also be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes.
* $190 in FREE Bonuses
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8lv0kb55e7npkqu437g4s7dmscansg6g48fui9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgm2p30cjh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9rh4ndhegj3msaq9q79jkv98tcu361q1etqen80_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgm2p30cjh2bs) **You'll Never Run Out of Juice** _"You can charge your phone 28 times and still have some juice left over. It has no shortage of power. It's very reliable and very good. It's the perfect addition to all of your other 4Patriots products." - Dan W._ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z34mv966780c6u6c1pelt7brde5sesfagd0dlg4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgm2p30cjh2bs)

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za29upqrhgah7j99s34glcr65ohg4cpt037roht0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbo75chkmio7cpj0muon9p3l6eqn4ollmkp69ob4csrm0s74e9rjaorimoon7dlgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhbbd77m8pmcd72mdijfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5jm9ob6c9j6eoh5u)
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu09t6oepblra6pd3251p79eddnr7qlll8d6mjlo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmcoj6cth2bs)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztrtt1rm4i24n4qbvknjk7off9btopm2f9vo8hog_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmcoj6cth2bs)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9sgq5ng3clilpi4r0fpbdagtgu2ui91g9jb98tg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmcoj6cth2bs)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjpdmvmbnt6vs0dvuu7i4manouposfftrq3a6pf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmcoj6cth2bs)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgmjtepplojakifdj7m9hatqg864buklq50548og_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmcoj6cth2bs)** I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get it so I can let David know that you're standing with him. I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support. May God Bless You, Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? **[David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb6hmqmkiqkuau9g7hffd69rd55okkdm48qqirg0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmcoj6cth2bs)** [**DONATE**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcnrn5ps517ipphdodavjadnhnmacma86cmah7l8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmcoj6cth2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8nme8dem6r46lqeoc08oo80bj20p627dr2fs6vg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmcoj6cth2bs) The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit, national public interest law firm dedicated to restoring respect in law for life, family, and religious liberty. [Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zho3t1infjotagbfusiefqfd3uoavu14frfhbef8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmcoj6cth2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs9bhceokupluojt5uqoamfejbfsqs1ecubqndq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmcoj6cth2bs)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcuclap9lprnmj5ri1elk8rsla0nvtn8o2a4l7qg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmcoj0s3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sb0mdpj9cpkm1gr8djhcsp66spmmgp78cjjm1pmcspnc5h3csrk6uorcs5mm1o6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aollmjjr4cr66jjjad37m2qmash5u)
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgccsb0ll6787q65lvf1sjb4kb4utv3f2otrepe8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmcoj0s3h2bs)
---
|
---
Fellow American,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqp2qkijf04u7k7s96tcacsnb73iq146tqiig5bg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmcoj0s3h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcdhnsqm0pgeecvfbpuslp1g83dfosniir5p2lbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmcoj0s3h2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqt63qsc2b0u8t2id4m6bh1uokg73tifuuoj3rvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmcoj0s3h2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8skandkovlpmbc4v3otq69gr4q5mjavqm8urrrg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmcoj0s3h2bs)

name: 4Patriots
subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE
body:
Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhq6ih3jes2pgb0odk0caatj97l9ojhtbpilsgk0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmap72c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t3n62rr8oj2eur32pthehj64sb4e9inac34sirrcdphchjr9p73cpi38tjm6grrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aollmjjr4db66aob6oj7m2qmash5u)

# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
[**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zila475dkefl7cna2gcvdiajm188vf7t3r9uov28_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmap72c5h2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkeo5h6lv56l9eb4b3os83d2el867rit2ltth5gg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmap72c5h2bs) If last year taught us anything... It's not IF you need a backup plan... it's **WHEN.** It's sad, but facts are facts... A deadly pandemic, blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. **Crisis mode has become the new normal.** And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're fully ready, even when the power goes out. Nothing feels more vulnerable than when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. Imagine all your critical devices, communications, comfort and protection, suddenly on borrowed time. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that the first batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuqg303t5pec354ptracqqhh7cnf582svaf9p3r0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmap72c5h2bs) [**> > Video: This mini solar generator powers devices and weighs less than a housecat**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zic7ir72q4bess6gn5jgl66dfphppukpvjoiggp8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmap72c5h2bs) _" I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer_ Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll also be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it 's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes.
* $190 in FREE Bonuses
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc5bd3pcd15dla1pb1qebdfs5n9dseaoijqrruo8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmap72c5h2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd9f067btjpva1bpd4ivrcvk4s3qr4pvt536suo8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmap72c5h2bs) **You 'll Never Run Out of Juice** _" You can charge your phone 28 times and still have some juice left over. It has no shortage of power. It's very reliable and very good. It's the perfect addition to all of your other 4Patriots products." - Dan W._ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsfdog05qbjqu7vj710du54gi42lj34cb3htod6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgmap72c5h2bs)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BURT JONES FOR GEORGIA, INC
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, MARCH 22, 2022
BURT JONES ANNOUNCES STATEWIDE GRASSROOTS LEADERSHIP TEAM JACKSON, Ga. - Today, conservative candidate for Lieutenant Governor of Georgia Burt Jones announced his statewide grassroots leadership team. This list represents republican activists with deep roots and ties to local committees across Georgia. This list of key leaders also demonstrates Burt's overwhelming support with rank and file members of the party. As the Trump endorsed candidate for Lieutenant Governor with significant advantages in fundraising, polling, and grassroots support, Burt Jones is working toward a big win on May 24th.

Bruce Azevedo (GA10, Madison County) Gary Boling (GA14, Floyd County) Nancy Burton (GA03, Heard County) Bob Coovert (GA09, Cobb County) Larry Cox (GA04, Rockdale County) Rob Cunningham (GA06, Fulton County) Ellen Diehl (GA11, Cherokee County) Debbie Dooley (GA07, Gwinnett County) Carolyn Fisher (GA01, Glynn County) Dave Garwood (GA06, Fulton County) Jessie Greener (GA09, Rabun County) Joyce Hinton (GA05, Henry County) Joannah Hollis (GA10, Baldwin County) Laura Lanier (GA12, Bulloch County) Cathy Latham (GA12, Coffee County) Bruce LeVell (GA06, Fulton County) Kerry Luedke (GA06, Cobb County) Rebecca McCants (GA10, Oconee County) Joe McCutchen (GA09, Gilmer County) Buck Moon (GA12, Toombs County) Cindy Morley (GA13, Douglas County) Larry Ogan (GA02, Marion County) Pam Reardon (GA06, Cobb County) Carmen Rice (GA03, Muscogee County) Stacy Ridings (GA07, Forsyth County) Barbara Schmader (GA08, Lowndes County) Vicki Temple (GA13, Clayton County) Nancy Thrash (GA03, Lamar County) Sunny Wong (GA06, Fulton County)

Burt Jones said, "I'm proud to have so many grassroots leaders in my corner as we work to become Georgia's next Lieutenant Governor. Each of these leaders represents an important community of voters and influencers who will be key to securing victory in the primary on May 24th. It's also abundantly clear that our message of lower taxes, better schools, safer communities, and more secure elections is resonating with voters. I'm so thankful for the support of these leaders and countless more who are helping us build momentum every day toward a big win."
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE
body:
Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znldr4jvu66p530limlv6j19e002rqborotdlf5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgm6o72c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqj4cr0c3gjcc9jeoom5dblccqb2cphm5r6cdj2mlie8d3n61obbdhl6srj1pb0sv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhbbd77m8r6cdj0mdgmfc5lclp2bs)

# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
[**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkiq8p3rdfa68nuqeqo93le90el9qrnapglnb890_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgm6o72c9h2bs) [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5nrub8lj043si7ehis3781oqev72delkjk4ifg8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgm6o72c9h2bs) If last year taught us anything... It's not IF you need a backup plan... it's **WHEN.** It's sad, but facts are facts... A deadly pandemic, blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. **Crisis mode has become the new normal.** And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're fully ready, even when the power goes out. Nothing feels more vulnerable than when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. Imagine all your critical devices, communications, comfort and protection, suddenly on borrowed time. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that the first batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znm2i3rjn9lg10bvc8rc9gcpih8uj4jhar9ga5kg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgm6o72c9h2bs) [**> > Video: This mini solar generator powers devices and weighs less than a housecat**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb3vknoc97sk73hvp6edvmca92bb4i72mgj809m0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgm6o72c9h2bs) _" I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer_ Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll also be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it 's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes.
* $190 in FREE Bonuses
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfreunifi4iqoslobo28vq7vg2tj0q7opggroul8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgm6o72c9h2bs) [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zddek3ed1pua7jfmmtcoktrblg8f7qlaeep9ct3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgm6o72c9h2bs) **You 'll Never Run Out of Juice** _" You can charge your phone 28 times and still have some juice left over. It has no shortage of power. It's very reliable and very good. It's the perfect addition to all of your other 4Patriots products." - Dan W._ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zec0pktp6m2jb5angrgrf7gr9q05qharm8asr3uo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjgm6o72c9h2bs)

name: Mike Crispi
subject: Meet Roger Stone at Trump National Golf Club on Thursday, March 24
body:
Meet Roger Stone at Trump National Golf Club on Thursday, March 24 (see more below)

----------

Thank you for tuning in to this week's edition of the newsletter and for your support of Mike Crispi's candidacy for Congress and his mission to put America First. This week is packed with events and town halls for you to meet Mike, get to know him, and tell him what matters most to you.

See below for info on where and how you can attend, as well as Mike's recent appearances in the media, endorsement announcements, and more!

CRISPI EXCORIATES SMITH AFTER SECRET SUPPORT FROM BIG-ABORTION

----------

In a newly released letter to Marie Tasy, Executive Director of New Jersey Right to Life, Crispi cites at least nine instances of incumbent congressman Chris Smith taking money from Big Pharma companies which have harvested or supported the harvesting of body parts from living infants.

“I am in disbelief that congressman Smith would stoop so low,” Crispi said. “Smith has claimed to be pro-life, but FEC filings prove this to be a bold-faced lie. He has repeatedly accepted political contributions from pharmaceutical companies that have carried out some of the most grotesque and inhumane experiments imaginable. That Smith relies on these organizations to fund his political operation is an outrageous scandal and proves he has degenerated into an all-too-typical Washington DC-style RINO.”

Crispi called on Tasy to hold Smith accountable for his vote alongside John McCain to save the Big-Abortion bill known as Obamacare and to demand Smith return the donations he’s accepted from Big Pharma. “Smith’s shameful and duplicitous hypocrisy make a mockery of everything the Right to Life movement stands for,” Crispi said.

REPUBLICAN LIBERTY CAUCUS ENDORSES MIKE CRISPI FOR CONGRESS

----------

Dedicated to working within the Republican Party to advance the principles of individual rights, limited government, and free markets, the Republican Liberty Caucus is the oldest continuously operating organization within the Liberty Republican movement.

Members of Congress who have signed the RLC's Liberty Compact include Senators Jeff Lake, Ted Cruz, Rand Paul, and Mike Lee, and Representative Justin Amash.

Mike is proud to have earned the endorsement of the RLC and you can count on Mike to always have your freedom and liberty in mind as your congressman!

|

|

|

( https://sable.godaddy.com/c/433724?id=257.86.1.e0e5c7055a139ef665ef6d73385b86ce )

|

|

|

UPCOMING EVENTS

----------

Wednesday, March 23, 2022

----------

The Toms River Regular Republican Club will be hosting a town hall meeting with the entire AMERICA FIRST REPUBLICANS slate for Ocean County, including Mike Crispi, Ashley Lamb, and Sergio Fossa, as well as special guest Roger Stone.

The club meeting begins at 7:30 PM at Riv's Hub, 1850 Hooper Avenue, Toms River, and is OPEN TO THE PUBLIC.

|

|

|

|

|

|

Thursday, March 24, 2022

----------

You are invited to a reception in support of Republican Congressional candidate Mike Crispi with special guest Roger Stone, as well as another surprise guest. The reception will be held at the Trump National Golf Club in Colts Neck, NJ 07722 on Thursday, March 24 from 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM.

Please RSVP to Kyra Schaefer at kyra@1111consultinginc.com or 305-699-8005.

|

|

|

|

|

|

MIKE IN THE NEWS

----------

On Friday, Mike joined Bill Spadea on NJ101.5 to talk about the historic America First line and Mike's commitment to supporting Common Sense legislation to protect parental rights and fight for America First values.

|

|

|

( https://sable.godaddy.com/c/433724?id=257.87.1.493a3e029c7ea6a885189dc1e6eb9aa7 )

|

|

|

MIKE MEETING VOTERS

----------

|

|

|

|

|

|

Mike has been meeting with supporters all week, including at the Let's Go Brandon store ( https://sable.godaddy.com/c/433724?id=257.88.1.c10cbe73e9595b730d3a37afc22a13b6 ) in Toms River, where patriots like Tracy Allen, New Jersey State Moderator of Bikers for Trump, were showing their support for America First.

We hope YOU can join us at one of this week's events!

Thank you again for your support, and please share, donate, and spread the word.

America needs YOU!

|

|

|

That Smith relies on these organizations to fund his political operation is an outrageous scandal and proves he has degenerated into an all-too-typical Washington DC-style RINO.” Crispi called on Tasy to hold Smith accountable for his vote alongside John McCain to save the Big-Abortion bill known as Obamacare and to demand Smith return the donations he’s accepted from Big Pharma. “Smith’s shameful and duplicitous hypocrisy make a mockery of everything the Right to Life movement stands for,” Crispi said. REPUBLICAN LIBERTY CAUCUS ENDORSES MIKE CRISPI FOR CONGRESS Dedicated to working within the Republican Party to advance the principles of individual rights, limited government, and free markets, the Republican Liberty Caucus is the oldest continuously operating organization within the Liberty Republican movement. Members of Congress who have signed the RLC's Liberty Compact include Senators Jeff Lake, Ted Cruz, Rand Paul, and Mike Lee, and Representative Justin Amash. Mike is proud to have earned the endorsement of the RLC and you can count on Mike to always have your freedom and liberty in mind as your congressman! | | | ( ) | | | UPCOMING EVENTS Wednesday, March 23, 2022 The Toms River Regular Republican Club will be hosting a town hall meeting with the entire AMERICA FIRST REPUBLICANS slate for Ocean County, including Mike Crispi, Ashley Lamb, and Sergio Fossa, as well as special guest Roger Stone. The club meeting begins at 7:30 PM at Riv's Hub, 1850 Hooper Avenue, Toms River, and is OPEN TO THE PUBLIC. | | | | | | Thursday, March 24, 2022 You are invited to a reception in support of Republican Congressional candidate Mike Crispi with special guest Roger Stone, as well as another surprise guest. The reception will be held at the Trump National Golf Club in Colts Neck, NJ 07722 on Thursday, March 24 from 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM. Please RSVP to Kyra Schaefer at kyra@1111consultinginc.com or 305-699-8005. | | | | | | MIKE IN THE NEWS On Friday, Mike joined Bill Spadea on NJ101.5 to talk about the historic America First line and Mike's commitment to supporting Common Sense legislation to protect parental rights and fight for America First values. | | | ( ) | | | MIKE MEETING VOTERS | | | | | | Mike has been meeting with supporters all week, including at the Let's Go Brandon store ( ) in Toms River, where patriots like Tracy Allen, New Jersey State Moderator of Bikers for Trump, were showing their support for America First. We hope YOU can join us at one of this week's events! Thank you again for your support, and please share, donate, and spread the word. America needs YOU! | | | -> DONATE NOW! ( ) <- | | | -> ( ) ( ) ( ) <- | | | Crispi for Congress 1385 Hwy 35, #215 Middletown, NJ 07748

subject: GIVE TO INDEPENDENT CAMPAIGN
body:

# **The run to raise funds.**
### As you know there is no independent party and therefore one that chooses to run on this platform is taking a chance and daring political theatrics that many are afraid to tackle. Independent candidates have a different set of guidelines than the two major parties and the two-party system makes it very difficult for one to succeed. I have an EXCELLENT chance of WINNING this race, but I need your help. We must raise $100,000 by the end of the week to help us with getting the 83,000+ signatures required to get on the ballot.
### Help us today with your donation and sign to let us know you will sign our petition.

name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentime
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcei8loq1pa3ngsvnptuf3m2t7542t04csa86s70_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim0ob4cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t3hcsq30s5jcso65cb4clorddblm5q36c3gsgo66db562pr6cpkclhrephjecrjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aollmjg74c366lib6p77m2qmash5u)
| | | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8bbfvqk8tlegf68d7pg9p6ltk3echr9qdnsu8u0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim0ob4cjh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z92mmsac71kolk25hqup0jel6h4b5tggnada7ddo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim0ob4cjh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z02h1e7qcleh1vajdbmnv78jj3t0ckd1m1epc39g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim0ob4cjh2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1nq48pb6i2fhppcgdaljdibd1l91fg03oomdpdo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim0ob4cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0b4lfvqrvdcki0un9fll9tei1kecr7h49bef2qg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim0ob4cjh2bs)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE
body:
Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!
_Sponsored message_
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
[**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpegai5bakfq2q5qrvmp6qtf2e258tln799m7rho_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim8pj2cdh2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj924033dt7kuau6ka8kte9ckmg0bjcb5qvbv6go_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim8pj2cdh2bs) If last year taught us anything... It's not IF you need a backup plan... it's **WHEN.** It's sad, but facts are facts... A deadly pandemic, blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. **Crisis mode has become the new normal.** And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're fully ready, even when the power goes out. Nothing feels more vulnerable than when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. Imagine all your critical devices, communications, comfort and protection, suddenly on borrowed time. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that the first batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2pmvbd4bd5c677efneo7p1h4bqvvjqg5ft5q1k8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim8pj2cdh2bs) [**> > Video: This mini solar generator powers devices and weighs less than a housecat**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7ttdb93gi208l74n29oar7eebueu1utbo60tc1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim8pj2cdh2bs) _"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll also be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes.
* $190 in FREE Bonuses
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zir4ugs2401pn4t11kocvnfi8u0not5optr4n5cg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim8pj2cdh2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z584943iorkssqr9mhugbhjd3d0520c3i8bkviv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim8pj2cdh2bs) **You'll Never Run Out of Juice** _"You can charge your phone 28 times and still have some juice left over. It has no shortage of power. It's very reliable and very good. It's the perfect addition to all of your other 4Patriots products." - Dan W._ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zte61gbjn16cg927bgnd9re8g3jnpaa7m44c3bs8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim8pj2cdh2bs)

We have **exciting news** to share:
We have a drawing for a **FREE** round trip to attend any one of the **ReAwaken America Tour** stops.
This trip includes a **VIP Ticket** to hear and potentially meet **Eric Trump** , **General Flynn** , **Roger Stone** , **Mike Lindell** and others. As well as **flight and hotel** to whichever city you choose.
Options:
May 13-14: Myrtle Beach, SC
July 8-9: Virgina Beach, VA
To enter into the drawing all you have to do is **make a donation of $25 or more** to the [#LahmeyerForSenate](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=5376995.4619.1.e008256b91b97818a653e0221c931fb7) campaign between March 1 through March 31.

name: Christian Nascimento
subject: Thanks for joining the fight for a Better Pennsylvania
body:
You’re the next step:
[](https://christiannascimentoforcongresspa-04.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btdhua-ikxhlduil-r/) [QUICK DONATE >>](https://christiannascimentoforcongresspa-04.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btdhua-ikxhlduil-y/) Hey there,Thank you for signing up to receive updates from the team and me. _**Like you, I believe that what Pennsylvania needs are solutions - not more radical policies from the woke left.**_Millions of families are struggling, and all they get from liberals in D.C. is more problems and fewer solutions. . . As your next Congressman, I'll go toe-to-toe with Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi to fight for Pennsylvania's future. **Will you help me by taking the next steps?** 1. **[Watch and share this video](https://christiannascimentoforcongresspa-04.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btdhua-ikxhlduil-j/)** to learn more about our campaign and what we're fighting to accomplish.2\. Learn more about me and our campaign by reading these op-eds I wrote:
* ** [The China Challenge >>](https://christiannascimentoforcongresspa-04.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btdhua-ikxhlduil-t/)**** **
* [**Dumbing Down Education Hurts Kids and the Country >>**](https://christiannascimentoforcongresspa-04.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btdhua-ikxhlduil-i/)
* **[Answers Needed For Crime Crisis >>](https://christiannascimentoforcongresspa-04.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btdhua-ikxhlduil-d/)**** **
* [**Radical Change vs Reality >>**](https://christiannascimentoforcongresspa-04.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btdhua-ikxhlduil-h/)
* **[The left 's breathtaking attempt to restructure the U.S. economy >>](https://christiannascimentoforcongresspa-04.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btdhua-ikxhlduil-k/) **

3\. Join us on social media on [**Twitter**](https://christiannascimentoforcongresspa-04.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btdhua-ikxhlduil-o/) and [**Facebook**](https://christiannascimentoforcongresspa-04.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btdhua-ikxhlduil-b/).
4\. All aspects of what we do -- online and on the ground -- rely on donations to keep us running and spreading the word about the campaign. [**Can we count on you to pitch-in just $5 now?**](https://christiannascimentoforcongresspa-04.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btdhua-ikxhlduil-n/) [CONTRIBUTE HERE >>](https://christiannascimentoforcongresspa-04.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btdhua-ikxhlduil-p/) _**As your Congressman, I will fight to ALWAYS put America and our home state FIRST.**_ With your help, we _WILL_ take back Pennsylvania's future from the Democrats. **Together, we can transform Pennsylvania and the nation to benefit _ALL_ Americans.**Thank you for your support,Christian Nascimento [](https://christiannascimentoforcongresspa-04.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btdhua-ikxhlduil-x/)[](https://christiannascimentoforcongresspa-04.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btdhua-ikxhlduil-m/)[](https://christiannascimentoforcongresspa-04.cmail20.com/t/y-l-btdhua-ikxhlduil-c/) | [Unsubscribe](https://christiannascimentoforcongresspa-04.cmail20.com/t/y-u-btdhua-ikxhlduil-q/)
---
