name: Mo Brooks
subject: Fire Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Mo Brooks for Senate Committee |
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906419:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r)
---
Peter, Ever notice how much McConnell hates Trump? Hates conservatives? Think about it:
* He turned his back on MAGA policies
* He failed to stop Biden's radical agenda
* He refused to investigate 2020 election irregularities
* He turned a blind eye to Biden's disastrous court nominees
* He spent $9 million to elect Democrat Doug Jones
* He has done nothing to stop the Biden agenda or the flood of illegals at the Southern Border

**McConnell hates the MAGA agenda and caves to the Biden agenda. ** ** ** _Does that sound like a Leader to you?_ **If I'm elected to the Senate, I will NOT vote for Mitch McConnell as our leader, and I will do ****_everything _****in my power to ensure we have a TRUE conservative leader.**
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906419:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r)
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION: DITCH MITCH >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906419:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r)
---
McConnell has repeatedly attacked my Senate campaign. He did it in 2017 when he spent $9 million to help elect Democrat Doug Jones, and he's doing it again because I have President Trump's endorsement. [**_STOP MCCONNELL >>>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906419:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r) The battle in this race is the same battle that's taking place across America: McConnell vs. Trump in a war for control of the GOP.
---
[**STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906419:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r)
---
**I'm calling on my opponents, Katie Britt and Mike Durant, and GOP Senate candidates nationwide to sign the pledge to Ditch Mitch.**
Peter, I know grassroots conservatives like you agree: the first step in saving America starts with Ditching Mitch. [**_I AGREE >>>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906419:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r)
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906419:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r)
---
**My name is Mo Brooks. I currently represent Alabama's 5th Congressional District in the U.S. House, but I'm running for the Senate because I'm tired of seeing radical, destructive policies under Chuck Schumer and Mitch McConnell's feckless leadership.** A few months into the Biden administration, we went from an America where law and order were the norm to an America where chaos reigns supreme. We went from a country with defined borders to one where the floodgates were opened to all. We went from an energy-independent country, creating good-paying jobs for American workers to one in which we ship jobs overseas and have to rely on Middle East oil. And we went from having a Capitol in Washington, D.C. that citizens could visit to a shut tight "Fort Pelosi," barring the American people from their own seat of government. _Simply put, we went from America First to America LAST._ **It's time we, as Americans, stand up once again for freedom-loving policies rather than those of the freedom-hating Socialist Democrats and RINOs.**
---
[**HELP MO KEEP AMERICA FIRST >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906419:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r)
---
**After standing up to Nancy Pelosi in the House, I'm ready to stand up to Chuck Schumer in the Senate.** I have a proven track record of standing up and fighting for conservative principles, and the accolades to back up:
* 91% lifetime rating from the American Conservative Union
* 98% rating from Heritage Action for America
* 93% rating from FreedomWorks
* 100% rating from the National Right to Life
* A+ national pro-life scorecard rating from Susan B. Anthony List
* 93% rating from the NRA
* 86% rating from Club for Growth
* U.S. Chamber of Commerce Spirit of Enterprise Award
* 2018 American Trade Hero Award from Coalition for a Prosperous America

---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906419:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r)
---
And I've received endorsements from well-respected conservative hard-hitters:
* President Donald Trump
* Sen. Ted Cruz
* Sen. Rand Paul
* Donald Trump Jr

[**_JOIN THEM: SUPPORT MO BROOKS >> _**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906419:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r) I've fought for the America First agenda in the House of Representatives, but I know there's more work to be done, this time in the Senate.. I've been fighting for the principles that made this country great my entire career: first as a prosecutor, then as a member of the Alabama House, then in the private practice of law for 20 years, then as District Attorney and County Commissioner, all before coming to Washington! You see, my parents, Jack and Betty Brooks, instilled in me the importance of standing up for principles that matter. I've taken what I learned from my parents growing up in Huntsville and brought that same mentality to Washington.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906419:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r)
---
**After standing up to Nancy Pelosi in the House, I'm ready to stand up to Chuck Schumer in the Senate.** I won't back down from a challenge. In the Senate, you can count on me to stand up to the freedom-hating policies of the Socialist Democrats. I will ALWAYS fight to stop socialist damage. But I can't do this alone. I need patriots and warriors like YOU to stand with me for America First policies. [**_Can I count on your support? >>>_**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906419:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r)
---
[**DONATE $100 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906420:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r)
---
[**DONATE $50 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906421:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r)
---
[**DONATE $20.22 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906422:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r)
---
[**DONATE $15 >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906423:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r)
---
[**DONATE ANY AMOUNT >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906419:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r)
---
I appreciate you reading this entire email. I hope you'll take the time to stand with me today.
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59906419:6A0W48oNT:m:1:3317145305:6096C2EF451506A53C118274F26B60A7:r)
---
Mo Brooks
---
|
---
|

name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do. We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9766%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=ihzm45nZaild%2fPUZDb0z1A&sysid=1)
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26154%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aRAuQQ6rTJSxB4lykFy6Ug&sysid=1)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26165%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rU%2bAMygQEIep0mttI7fClw&sysid=1)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26167%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X2iKmVwBVehquUmUezhGiA&sysid=1)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26168%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PQ05fC3Ij%2ffNdQKbGIv%2fKw&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26167%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=X2iKmVwBVehquUmUezhGiA&sysid=1)

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: my story:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
It's funny to think about how different my life was when this photo was taken – and how much is still the same as we build up this campaign to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA).
| | |
---
It's funny to think about how different my life was when this photo was taken – and how much is still the same as we build up this campaign to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). Back then, all I knew was my small town of Sherrill in rural Iowa – around 200 people, five churches, a bar, a post office and a school.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43238834/336338259/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk773-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGFjZWExMi1lOWE5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bWYGBhqYYrVYr6K-_mbTqRzkE6xqFaznaCbxEgpPD_I=)
I was raised in a working class family – my dad was a union pipe-fitter welder and my mom worked in the public school system. My parents couldn't give me a trust fund or debt-free college, but what they taught me was so much more valuable: **how to treat people with respect; to never think you’re better than anyone else; and that when there is work to be done or a problem to solve, you say “yes.”**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43238835/336338260/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk773-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGFjZWExMi1lOWE5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bWYGBhqYYrVYr6K-_mbTqRzkE6xqFaznaCbxEgpPD_I=)
**That's why, when my community needed a fighter in the Iowa State House, I stepped up and won my first election at only 25.** I served for four years in the State House, and I fought hard to deliver for my constituents – one night, I kept the House in session until midnight to demand equal pay for women.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43238836/336338261/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk773-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGFjZWExMi1lOWE5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bWYGBhqYYrVYr6K-_mbTqRzkE6xqFaznaCbxEgpPD_I=)
I was proud to serve in the State House, but the work didn't stop there for me. **That's why I decided to run for Congress and became the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue.** Then, after just two weeks in Congress and during a government shutdown, I became the youngest woman to pass a bill through the House of Representatives with my legislation to create more opportunities for rural America.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43238837/336338262/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk773-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGFjZWExMi1lOWE5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bWYGBhqYYrVYr6K-_mbTqRzkE6xqFaznaCbxEgpPD_I=)
**My story is about service, community and understanding the value of hard work.** That's why I'm running to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) – to give working families a real fighter in the Senate. Right now, he's facing RECORD-LOW approval with Iowa voters, so we've got the best chance in decades to flip this seat blue and expand Democrats' Senate majority. **[We simply cannot win without major grassroots support, so will you rush a donation of $5 or more now to seize this momentum, defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43238838/336338263/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk773-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGFjZWExMi1lOWE5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bWYGBhqYYrVYr6K-_mbTqRzkE6xqFaznaCbxEgpPD_I=)**
I know that defeating Sen. Grassley won't be a walk in the park. **However, I've had plenty of people tell me that I was too young or that I lacked the experience to take on a challenge – and we've proved them wrong time and time again.**
We _can_ win this race. I feel it in my bones. **Unfortunately, the campaign arm of the Senate GOP is sitting on a war chest of $41 MILLION to defeat challengers like me, and right now, I'm still falling short of March's mid-month fundraising goal with just hours to spare.**
**[So if you're with me to defeat Sen. Grassley, protect our Senate majority and fight for working families, then please donate $5, or whatever you can spare, before midnight tonight. This is a grassroots campaign, so I'm really counting on your donation before tonight's big fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43238839/336338264/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk773-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGFjZWExMi1lOWE5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bWYGBhqYYrVYr6K-_mbTqRzkE6xqFaznaCbxEgpPD_I=)**

Chuck Grassley (R-IA). | | | It's funny to think about how different my life was when this photo was taken – and how much is still the same as we build up this campaign to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA). Back then, all I knew was my small town of Sherrill in rural Iowa – around 200 people, five churches, a bar, a post office and a school. = I was raised in a working class family – my dad was a union pipe-fitter welder and my mom worked in the public school system. My parents couldn't give me a trust fund or debt-free college, but what they taught me was so much more valuable: how to treat people with respect; to never think you’re better than anyone else; and that when there is work to be done or a problem to solve, you say “yes.” = That's why, when my community needed a fighter in the Iowa State House, I stepped up and won my first election at only 25. I served for four years in the State House, and I fought hard to deliver for my constituents – one night, I kept the House in session until midnight to demand equal pay for women. = I was proud to serve in the State House, but the work didn't stop there for me. That's why I decided to run for Congress and became the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. Then, after just two weeks in Congress and during a government shutdown, I became the youngest woman to pass a bill through the House of Representatives with my legislation to create more opportunities for rural America. = My story is about service, community and understanding the value of hard work. That's why I'm running to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) – to give working families a real fighter in the Senate. Right now, he's facing RECORD-LOW approval with Iowa voters, so we've got the best chance in decades to flip this seat blue and expand Democrats' Senate majority. = I know that defeating Sen. I feel it in my bones. name: Jim DeMint
subject: They Treat Citizens Like Criminals
body:
Citizens and Criminals

Fellow Conservative:

The woke, socialist Left has been running Washington for a year
now, and the whole country is feeling the pain. Inflation.
Supply-chain breakdowns. Tyrants abroad are emboldened, and here
at home, liberal politicians are abusing taxpayers, parents, and
kids. Murder rates, illegal immigration, and the national debt
are out of control.

The problem with progressives today is very simple: they treat
citizens like criminals and criminals like citizens.

On the border, illegal immigrants are invited into the country,
bused, and flown to wherever they want. Joe Biden's Department of
Homeland Security even lets them use arrest warrants as IDs to
get on planes! He let in dozens of Afghans with security red
flags in their backgrounds. Drugs and criminals are pouring into
our country.

But they somehow think the real problem is people who want to
control the border and deport criminals!

Watch this short video to learn how we're doing it!

On our streets, elite leftists have linked arms with the insane
"defund the police" policy and anti-American Black Lives Matter
movement. One BLM activist was arrested for shooting a Louisville
mayoral candidate! BLM riots burned and looted. San Francisco
basically legalized shoplifting. Left-wing prosecutors across the
country are refusing to prosecute hardened criminals. And crime
rates rise.

But to them, the real problem is the police and law-abiding
citizens who support them.

In our classrooms, liberal policymakers have parroted the lies of
Critical Race Theory and abusively masked children without any
scientific reason. Test scores are down. Kids' mental health is
in crisis. Learning loss is catastrophic.

But the Justice Department thinks parents who complain are
"domestic terrorists."

At every turn, progressives from President Biden on down treat
criminals like heroes and patriotic citizens like criminals. Mask
mandates. Vaccine mandates. Social media censorship. Doxxing and
canceling. Media smearing. These weapons of the establishment are
all reserved for honorable patriots.

Help us stand up to the Woke Left - support CPI with a one-time
or monthly donation today!

Public support for the liberal agenda is crumbling; these
policies are failing everywhere. But the progressives won't back
down. That's why they won't surrender Covid emergency powers and
want to rig all future elections. They've gotten a taste of
tyranny and don't want to give it up.

That's why we can't compromise or negotiate. We have to fight.

Inside Washington, the Conservative Partnership Institute is
leading that fight. We don't work for a party - we work for
patriots, in Congress, in the conservative movement, and within
the grassroots around the country. True conservatives already
know how to fight. We teach them how to win.

Liberals think Americans are the problem. Conservatives know that
YOU are the solution.

Help us put America First by putting Americans First.

Thank you for standing strong for freedom and for doing so much
to help fight for our future.

Sincerely,

Jim DeMint
CPI Chairman

CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003
(202) 742-8988 Tel | (202) 595-0282 Fax
CPI.org

SUPPORT CPI

Conservative Partnership Institute,
Inc. is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your
donation to Conservative Partnership Institute, Inc. is
tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.

Copyright © 2022 Conservative Partnership Institute, All rights
reserved.

# Peter,

The world is laughing at America with Joe Biden in the White House. His reckless leadership has opened our southern border, crippled our economy, and reduced American energy independence... Now, hardworking Oklahomans like you and me are being FORCED to pay for Biden's failures at the gas pump. [The radical socialists in Washington are destroying our country, Peter. Make an URGENT donation to my campaign today to elect the Proven Republican Fighter who will STOP inflation >>>](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Ctc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VWzGGw8RP78WW89nS6q2v_wTRW1CR2894GZtcWN3Z5r9m3lLBmV1-WJV7CgY20W2VyDn05t8-S0V7DNz-88_4SpW8rvW312kcz80W4vnxSB7pkdD3W7c7x7j1SBsvWW8fQBLc8n9sbQW66Pjrb8Gd4jzW45JZgL5bP7_4W8Q1s7V4MStKpN2s-Kmsf4VNRW3lPH0S1lKJSSW1c-P624FGV8nW3zf1Mr3sLsnXW39R0yc8Rkc87W8yg8QF7ZNFwKW71yGyc1g8rLkN5p0h9czl1d3W8C1dSk4Ql7jJW35NvlF90lB43W8WqCfH8dHmmJW7vNl1_4P0yYJW3JlQ71279mw832Qx1)

The fake news mainstream media wants you to believe that Vladimir Putin is solely responsible for skyrocketing gas prices here in Oklahoma... In reality, Joe Biden and his rogue regime played a major role by:
* Printing mass amounts of money
* Forcing extended shutdowns
* Pulling the plug on the Keystone XL Pipeline
* Signing record-high spending bills into law

Gone are the days of fiscal responsibility. The corrupt Washington establishment wants to tax and spend our country out of a future... I REFUSE to let that happen. I'm running for the US Senate to save our Constitutional Republic, defend our liberty, and protect the people and their paychecks from the overreaching hand of the federal government. clean_body: Peter, gone are the days of fiscal responsibility. His reckless leadership has opened our southern border, crippled our economy, and reduced American energy independence... Now, hardworking Oklahomans like you and me are being FORCED to pay for Biden's failures at the gas pump. The fake news mainstream media wants you to believe that Vladimir Putin is solely responsible for skyrocketing gas prices here in Oklahoma... In reality, Joe Biden and his rogue regime played a major role by: Printing mass amounts of money Forcing extended shutdowns Pulling the plug on the Keystone XL Pipeline Signing record-high spending bills into law Gone are the days of fiscal responsibility. The corrupt Washington establishment wants to tax and spend our country out of a future... I REFUSE to let that happen. I'm running for the US Senate to save our Constitutional Republic, defend our liberty, and protect the people and their paychecks from the overreaching hand of the federal government. name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentime
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z99h9m6pv1n6jevhcu5nq1b6ti5nt1qjr4abvr50_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcc3gm3i3cchgedqb6o30c1g6dcdgelpr7dbie5j75cpgcthj9dpleco70s9ncurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8rmcclkmmqefchicopb1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdgmep75cjgm4p724no)
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb829mbo9dlrmmnuoive8dut3t3o7pq48ldamsjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim9ob2cjh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqe4k2q7c80o928419p3vpicb19d94pic6vsgv10_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim9ob2cjh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkg1mn7ih8ag3ksu4hddm3r68c8h7amfhg66iaeg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim9ob2cjh2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zas3a4eeot22o7ovgd80plpqt6a155d0fso56jd8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjim9ob2cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One

name: Demings, Val
subject: some important updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Am I worried about these attacks?
| | |
---
I have to share some important updates with you, friend, and I hope you'll read this through the end.
Marco Rubio has already launched despicable attacks against me – and now, **national Republicans are gearing up to launch an ad campaign targeting my 27 years as a law enforcement officer.**
Am I worried about these attacks? Absolutely, especially now that I'm falling short of my midnight fundraising deadline with just hours to make up the difference. If I don't reach my goal tonight, I'm afraid I won't have enough resources to defend myself –**and in a race that was decided by only 0.12% of the vote the last time around, that could spell disaster on Election Day.**
I know that you're dedicated to protecting our Democratic Senate majority, and I'm _so thankful_ for your support. But I'm facing a difficult battle, and I can't miss important deadlines like tonight's, so I have to ask for your help once again.
I can't afford to cut a single phone-banking session, a single door-knocking campaign or a single voter registration program, so please:

Will you donate $5 or whatever you can spare right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio in Florida and defend our Democratic Senate majority? clean_body: Am I worried about these attacks? | | | I have to share some important updates with you, friend, and I hope you'll read this through the end. Marco Rubio has already launched despicable attacks against me – and now, national Republicans are gearing up to launch an ad campaign targeting my 27 years as a law enforcement officer. Am I worried about these attacks? Absolutely, especially now that I'm falling short of my midnight fundraising deadline with just hours to make up the difference. If I don't reach my goal tonight, I'm afraid I won't have enough resources to defend myself –and in a race that was decided by only 0.12% of the vote the last time around, that could spell disaster on Election Day. I know that you're dedicated to protecting our Democratic Senate majority, and I'm so thankful for your support. name: Geoff Diehl
subject: The reviews are in -- Geoff Diehl and Leah Cole Allen are a winning Republican ticket!
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friend,
Our campaign has been getting lots of positive attention for yesterday's announcement by Leah Cole Allen that she will be my running mate.
Boston Herald reporter Meghan Ottolini has full coverage in today's paper:
---
|
---
| |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014uwXngNlgy2V8tI1nP91bsLHEhqaHeEMMTvBGzPw1hIjov7p6N7DmrW8h0nZi9J-eFGBagwKDUUv8SV3RPlkOBt0_FDbjv4xsleaBtqd_indu0SGk5E6AatZ87ujTZxd-FkAOr8u6qDd40A15PhHbeeWpzv6kNB8dLgWek6Y9tvqP0A4OqrWdNRqKFkQkgf7F4kpsd43V-ovQ2QBwTNbt5GhmY0dDG8MzuyzatjHcvuaFIgDfYJGk8GDVlBfMuKE&c=gfx8HSro5_BBBa0qTkfRlettjAmBdk9fHJgoRtkQyQOdWKGkjcs18g==&ch=iYX9M46w-a8WEJHqC2wAjcUCViKVvdiZyH3x67f6-TNh3Rwdgc5TnA==)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Why is Leah running for Lieutenant Governor, and why is she supporting me for Governor? She summed it up pretty well herself yesterday:

* She believes we are the best choice to protect your liberty. "Personal freedoms, autonomy, standing against the vaccine mandate. I was proud to join [Geoff Diehl] on that," she said.

* She's a leader in the fight against inflation and high taxes. "I believe every tax cut is a pay raise," she said.

---
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014uwXngNlgy2V8tI1nP91bsLHEhqaHeEMMTvBGzPw1hIjov7p6N7DmoadUZz_m4krTHm24J4rdc7xk7WCFc6pM0DY20SZ-TxqJLrgnkXwUAEu8qQFKH-D5A-bIpvCSI9iYn6lNHB5jtpjBfQAUx-2VA==&c=gfx8HSro5_BBBa0qTkfRlettjAmBdk9fHJgoRtkQyQOdWKGkjcs18g==&ch=iYX9M46w-a8WEJHqC2wAjcUCViKVvdiZyH3x67f6-TNh3Rwdgc5TnA==)
---
| | [Visit Leah's Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014uwXngNlgy2V8tI1nP91bsLHEhqaHeEMMTvBGzPw1hIjov7p6N7DmoadUZz_m4krUOSM2-muwmFNrjdcLMfmmbWWWFC5oYUmwC-cNL8S_9dLQd4kv13Wam1y0NiSOJy8O4gdev_JYbRtjY7ZZBzSvA==&c=gfx8HSro5_BBBa0qTkfRlettjAmBdk9fHJgoRtkQyQOdWKGkjcs18g==&ch=iYX9M46w-a8WEJHqC2wAjcUCViKVvdiZyH3x67f6-TNh3Rwdgc5TnA==)
---
| | [Leah's Facebook Page](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014uwXngNlgy2V8tI1nP91bsLHEhqaHeEMMTvBGzPw1hIjov7p6N7DmoadUZz_m4krZJn_e15QBFxBneFxu-QY_Hx8MwqmUjKnlLpZrwYQ0lfWVPXn3kVffXcPBjlpfOozDUseF72eZY8xV-flWJs-6sS4IonRyKXsVIpoUux0pTQ=&c=gfx8HSro5_BBBa0qTkfRlettjAmBdk9fHJgoRtkQyQOdWKGkjcs18g==&ch=iYX9M46w-a8WEJHqC2wAjcUCViKVvdiZyH3x67f6-TNh3Rwdgc5TnA==)
---
|
---
| I am proud to have Leah as part of our team, and I value her partnership in this campaign. We intend to earn your vote and to serve you with pride and integrity.
Thank you for your support.
Sincerely,

|

Jackson.**](https://www.electrepublicans.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYkhf8Ah1OEOdLEYEQfbD4X2mDCmQSNDy9xcuH9z2QNjjhTcxPJwg52iwQWR6OQ_xHpSO78p-ur0NPCwNSkp_zEA3yQ-FRINa_h1WHEHHO0RM3BFBLm_qlgGbv9SKf3rPOqpeRRby8YzJelccaZseAfe0mZk7IXRrZsF0xcLw4sVs64rGEK8EAarV8Isy9NEbcsrONNv2kqAYSsJ6f9ewkgKRxc3pMWXUrxloX9lFneqJ-jL5pU3HDFBFEGTq9rev0dYjFHB0f9rVwoY20oOJhamKTlDGuFV3rsOLSfkvrlSNFOcbi0gaAi4kpqyIPeBBrVQUXW29I-hv6va2fVtwONQz4drpxl1rqIPNG4X12I2qD92Uzr2eWpIn80HHGrOLRA&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=677996624312787185&n=6) Look, Peter -- this isn’t just about Josh Hawley’s concerns. Several Republican Senators have also raised an eyebrow at Ketanji Brown Jackson’s work.1
* Josh Hawley
* John Cornyn
* Thom Tillis
* Ben Sasse
* Chuck Grassley

name: NextGen America
subject: Tell the Senate: Confirm Ketanji Brown Jackson
body:
| | Friend, **Yesterday, the Senate started confirmation hearings for Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to serve on the U.S. Supreme Court.** President Biden has nominated one of our nation’s brightest legal minds to fill the vacancy created by the retirement of Justice Stephen Breyer — and delivered his promise to appoint the first Black woman to the Supreme Court. Judge Jackson has a distinguished legal career with a record of upholding our fundamental rights during her years as a federal judge. She deserves a swift confirmation to the court. [Send a message to your senators: Support Ketanji Brown Jackson’s confirmation to the Supreme Court.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43246621/336359136/-2037574899?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmI4MmZkYy1mMmE5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lmiTvU3ZbSByFn1dHVoUPt70JCQJhCXBiK5JdoJBRQ=&emci=be24aa70-36a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=ffb82fdc-f2a9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172) With a 6–3 right-wing supermajority, the Supreme Court is currently stacked in favor of extreme corporate interests. They’ve gutted the Voting Rights Act, ignored gerrymandering, and begun to dismantle the right to an abortion. Though further reforms are necessary to restore faith in the higher court, Judge Jackson’s addition would be a major step toward rebalancing the courts and restoring the integrity of our judicial system. As a former public defender, she represented clients who could not afford their own lawyers. If confirmed, she’d become the first former federal public defender to ever serve on the Supreme Court. Furthermore, Jackson was the former vice chair of the U.S. Sentencing Commission, where she worked to reform discriminatory drug sentencing practices. It’s clear that Judge Jackson is eminently qualified to serve on our nation’s highest court. As the Senate confirmation hearings continue this week, our senators need to hear from us. [Write your senators and urge them to support the nomination of Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43246622/336359137/-1231005845?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmI4MmZkYy1mMmE5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7lmiTvU3ZbSByFn1dHVoUPt70JCQJhCXBiK5JdoJBRQ=&emci=be24aa70-36a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=ffb82fdc-f2a9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172) Thank you, NextGen America
---

name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentime
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zebaqo88bfd347a2sef2ihmha05rqdijomukj2n0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u5i3epb6coqn3crjchij3db3cdr70sb2esr61pdicsor4pb56ir7atb2m9qjcttnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlcaqr9ptie9j3appjc3jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1ctie6oj1c1i649fg)
| | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg4jd98vm2dk7057cig6ag27tngbj9tv9as8jpog_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjhm4ob0chh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcd7nqha3a3s9210h5iht8htjktapvh0a3d4cg5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjhm4ob0chh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs5uh5mkhkcag47c5ennvfvl8l3rlbb343d7iuuo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjhm4ob0chh2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze0pnb7jq4uhl69fhe61epuh1lj9hulvlj7317ag_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjhm4ob0chh2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znq9qfrh2hsmr08cmvj84lj9p3eiu0gtnb8r6j20_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjhm4ob0chh2bs)

name: Laura - Team Herschel
subject: We need 2,455 more donors.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59909063:JMN5NkoNo:m:1:3317145305:2A13CE0A983F7563DEA5CE1CD1E7AE5C:r)

---
Peter,

Team Herschel has real goals we need to meet to keep our campaign functioning at 100%.
* **2,455:** That's the number of additional donors we need before March 31st. Why? Because it's crucial we identify more donors in the first quarter of this election year than we did in the last quarter of 2021. [**If 2,455 conservatives make a donation before March 31 st,**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59909063:JMN5NkoNo:m:1:3317145305:2A13CE0A983F7563DEA5CE1CD1E7AE5C:r) we'll be in good shape headed into the 2nd quarter.
* **$23 million:** That's the amount of cash our Democrat opponent has in the bank to run attack ads against me. In fact, he's already spent more than $3 million airing TV ads in the last month. We hope to match his fundraising success, [**but we'll need your help to do that.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59909063:JMN5NkoNo:m:1:3317145305:2A13CE0A983F7563DEA5CE1CD1E7AE5C:r)
* **March 31 st:** Our 1st quarter fundraising deadline. We need every ounce of support we can muster before midnight on March 31st. After this date, we'll have to make public what our campaign raised from January - March. [**It's critical to get your buy-in before the end of the month and post big numbers.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59909063:JMN5NkoNo:m:1:3317145305:2A13CE0A983F7563DEA5CE1CD1E7AE5C:r)
* **161,030:** That's the number of donations we've received since launching our campaign last summer. It's incredible - especially since Herschel has never run for office before. We know there is more support out there, and [**we're asking for you to join our team today. If you've given previously, would you consider giving another donation - even a small one of $5 or $10?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59909063:JMN5NkoNo:m:1:3317145305:2A13CE0A983F7563DEA5CE1CD1E7AE5C:r)

[**Please don't wait until March 31st to stand with us. We need your help right away.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59909063:JMN5NkoNo:m:1:3317145305:2A13CE0A983F7563DEA5CE1CD1E7AE5C:r)

[** MAKE YOUR GIFT NOW -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59909063:JMN5NkoNo:m:1:3317145305:2A13CE0A983F7563DEA5CE1CD1E7AE5C:r)
Thanks,

Laura Dunaway
Finance Director
Team Herschel

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59909064:JMN5NkoNo:m:1:3317145305:2A13CE0A983F7563DEA5CE1CD1E7AE5C:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59909065:JMN5NkoNo:m:1:3317145305:2A13CE0A983F7563DEA5CE1CD1E7AE5C:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59909066:JMN5NkoNo:m:1:3317145305:2A13CE0A983F7563DEA5CE1CD1E7AE5C:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59909067:JMN5NkoNo:m:1:3317145305:2A13CE0A983F7563DEA5CE1CD1E7AE5C:r)

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Did you see the news? Geoff has announced a running mate!
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friend,
I'm delighted to let you know that I have selected Leah (Cole) Allen of Danvers to be my running mate. Leah declared her intention to run as a Republican candidate for Lieutenant Governor earlier today. We have endorsed each other's candidacies, and we will be running together as a ticket.
---
|

| |

[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qaJmMv5WqFOVe1GFLBQQQFAJzPezWCqAfb1D7ZnQFHLIRn3bjC_aTs1vTfXDAxtlob77Zvu6zKzBgFU5sT8lvQ6p5OQPoBEZKHAh0SuR-Q2Ni4uAnm33hdDdwPHs8cQ8U3V61yCWmR45JmDaT5EHqn2QiZkcDjOLHzorIfYbtQ129Bi16WXgizdZ9DUMLWC7yriHiKmnscIiS1UajEIBjOzGVBId6920q3hAG_-A4ztVDtDNq5lsTuh8jS8bQacMHNXTGrYbRNNrFo68o9jB_g==&c=hIYhlvKgzVafVV7-qt-tAWEbMkiQdvDxAxlSKwfvfN2SL1IADzWwEw==&ch=AyxmvLkYt0k2-5zbUjp9ITtqLsnXuZ5R0ryj3CPcj4hdfqP7p0SrSg==)

| Leah and I share a strong desire to make Massachusetts a better place to live. We're both committed to individual liberty and a state government that is more accountable to the people - and we've both got the experience to back that up.

| Many will remember that Leah, who previously served in the Legislature, was part of our team back in 2014 when we campaigned against automatic increases in the state gas tax tied to the rate of inflation.
We worked well together in support of conservative principles to govern our state back then, and I believe we'll work well as a team once again as Governor and Lieutenant Governor. I am proud to run with Leah as a team.
Leading up to the Mass GOP Convention on May 21, Leah and I will be connecting with voters across our state every day. We'll be having a conversation with you, and we'll be seeking to demonstrate why we are not only the best candidates to campaign against progressive, liberal policies this fall on behalf of the Republican party, but also the most capable people to lead our state forward once elected to office.
We intend to earn your vote and to serve you with pride and integrity.
Thank you for your support.
Sincerely,

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Friend, I'm delighted to let you know that I have selected Leah (Cole) Allen of Danvers to be my running mate. Leah declared her intention to run as a Republican candidate for Lieutenant Governor earlier today. We have endorsed each other's candidacies, and we will be running together as a ticket. | | | == | | | | Leah and I share a strong desire to make Massachusetts a better place to live. We're both committed to individual liberty and a state government that is more accountable to the people - and we've both got the experience to back that up. == | | == | | == | | Many will remember that Leah, who previously served in the Legislature, was part of our team back in 2014 when we campaigned against automatic increases in the state gas tax tied to the rate of inflation. We worked well together in support of conservative principles to govern our state back then, and I believe we'll work well as a team once again as Governor and Lieutenant Governor. I am proud to run with Leah as a team. Leading up to the Mass GOP Convention on May 21, Leah and I will be connecting with voters across our state every day. We'll be having a conversation with you, and we'll be seeking to demonstrate why we are not only the best candidates to campaign against progressive, liberal policies this fall on behalf of the Republican party, but also the most capable people to lead our state forward once elected to office. We intend to earn your vote and to serve you with pride and integrity. Thank you for your support. name: Glenn Beck
subject: We are not powerless in the Ukraine crisis.
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWqCdH_HNV

M1 Ukraine Outbound

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWqCdH_HNV

Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes
more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and
within moments, terror and despair took over our television
screens.

Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine,
where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people
are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand
with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian
aid and medical care on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching
out with an urgent request for your help.

As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as
large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.

DONATE NOW

Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised
over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from
Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted
Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of
such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that,
it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be
even more effective in the future.

And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine.
These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our
direct support.

So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the
crisis in Ukraine.

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck

Founder, Mercury One

DONATE NOW

Mercury One, Inc.

P.O. Box 140489

Irving, TX 75014

name: Laurel Imer
subject: Democrats Can’t Keep Their Word
body:
Coloradans Deserve More
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r3nGPuZx2l4CzXUSyDFB010a-pIf-hgtLMTjZoQmBozFa5UwVRrrxQ-0WoD07oFgierbrCyrwvMkOySD7OEQrYArjBpb8SQCEhyS9SPdgD9xk8rtETUdeNsK-4d-tViE2zuT8KQaVLxgr6IZyqseZWEsRCGHlU7s0cXFmLufS-_5HBQ322E2fZugjddS8UwFu5tz9ctAZe324o_ZVNx17w==&c=hHhsIM2VlZH-0KurbjAYIpjtKxfEzssft8l24PP-5FKI91TjU8iRXw==&ch=nd-9-6BlzKtnDMEPXh4EiSRkOU_bQ9zyVjlR-xDQA8_8pYpikO4h4Q==)
---
|
---
| |
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,
It's crazy how we keep being jerked around without any regard to our rights...
Your right to bear arms, your right to energy independence, your right to lower taxes, and your right to vote in free and fair elections. Speaking of elections, did you hear about [Senate Bill 22-153](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r3nGPuZx2l4CzXUSyDFB010a-pIf-hgtLMTjZoQmBozFa5UwVRrrxQ-0WoD07oFgHYxuH2QLobu43CmQVDgWukHd-6W2v9fDnhe7wJCljb7LI_kJbIKrbHXSLIiXf68gNR-lQnBeOh3Eokkdc1zc1m8VHTH3RCzdVbSG_btaXXs=&c=hHhsIM2VlZH-0KurbjAYIpjtKxfEzssft8l24PP-5FKI91TjU8iRXw==&ch=nd-9-6BlzKtnDMEPXh4EiSRkOU_bQ9zyVjlR-xDQA8_8pYpikO4h4Q==)? It is the latest effort by Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold and Democrats in the State Legislature to thwart the will of the people.
Democrats can't keep their word when it comes to "protecting" the rights of American citizens.
If you were frustrated about unconstitutional mandates and think they are now a thing of the past, think again. The super-majority of Democrats in power in our legislature, executive, and judicial branch in Colorado are marching in lockstep to continue their tyrannical government overreach. Senate Bill 22-153 is a perfect example.
This bill will revoke power from local election officials and empower more tyranny in the Secretary of State's office. It will also place unconstitutional burdens on local elected officials regarding the administration of elections. This creates a real state of urgency for Coloradans to object to the passage of this bill NOW.
As America First patriots, we must disband the Democrat supermajority in power so that we can hold tyrannical government accountable in our state, instead of prolonging the abuse!
The Radical Left Democrats are jeopardizing the will of the people being able to select their leadership in free and fair elections. While Democrats package their tyranny with the rhetoric of "voter rights" and "voter integrity", it amounts to voter suppression. Coloradans deserve more than rhetoric.
As your next Congresswoman, I will serve the people instead of playing politics and acting like an elite overlord who is above the consideration of constitutional authority. Let's pursue a Conservative victory for our state, and country! Your support of my campaign in a donation of any amount today will show the supermajority of Democrats in serving in elected office that their days are numbered!
---

clean_body: Coloradans Deserve More | | | | | | | == | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, It's crazy how we keep being jerked around without any regard to our rights... Your right to bear arms, your right to energy independence, your right to lower taxes, and your right to vote in free and fair elections. Speaking of elections, did you hear about ==? It is the latest effort by Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold and Democrats in the State Legislature to thwart the will of the people. Democrats can't keep their word when it comes to "protecting" the rights of American citizens. If you were frustrated about unconstitutional mandates and think they are now a thing of the past, think again. The super-majority of Democrats in power in our legislature, executive, and judicial branch in Colorado are marching in lockstep to continue their tyrannical government overreach. Senate Bill 22-153 is a perfect example. This bill will revoke power from local election officials and empower more tyranny in the Secretary of State's office. It will also place unconstitutional burdens on local elected officials regarding the administration of elections. This creates a real state of urgency for Coloradans to object to the passage of this bill NOW. As America First patriots, we must disband the Democrat supermajority in power so that we can hold tyrannical government accountable in our state, instead of prolonging the abuse! The Radical Left Democrats are jeopardizing the will of the people being able to select their leadership in free and fair elections. While Democrats package their tyranny with the rhetoric of "voter rights" and "voter integrity", it amounts to voter suppression. Coloradans deserve more than rhetoric. As your next Congresswoman, I will serve the people instead of playing politics and acting like an elite overlord who is above the consideration of constitutional authority. Let's pursue a Conservative victory for our state, and country! Your support of my campaign in a donation of any amount today will show the supermajority of Democrats in serving in elected office that their days are numbered! | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Yours Truly, | == Laurel Imer Republican Candidate, CO-07 == | | | | | == | == == == | == | | | == | This email was Paid for By Laurel Imer for Congress This email was sent by Prodigy Consulting Group, LLC with authorization from Laurel Imer for Congress and approval by Laurel Imer | | Laurel Imer for Congress | PO Box 17747, Golden, CO 80402 | | Sent by mailto:contact@laurelimerforcongress.com powered by

name: Laura Loomer
subject: 67 Days without a missed vote?
body:
Since I announced I was running against Webster in September of last year, and gave him the nickname "Do-Nothing Dan," his absenteeism has plummeted and he's missed only nine votes.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/a2VChUIXvkpW1aXjXTiBJg/N3Y9V64vftliw8JAdwbuYA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/a2VChUIXvkpW1aXjXTiBJg/N3Y9V64vftliw8JAdwbuYA)My RINO opponent, Do-Nothing Daniel Webster, is stepping it up since I filed to run against him.

While he's still the 7th most absent member of the 117th Congress, Dan Webster hasn't missed a vote since January 13th!

Since I announced I was running against Webster in September of last year, and gave him the nickname "Do-Nothing Dan," his absenteeism has plummeted and he's missed _only_ nine votes.

Now, before that, his record of not showing up to work would have had his employer filing a missing persons report!

Well, since he's employed by his constituents, and has been missing from action and sleeping behind the wheel for years, he is not only referred to as Do-Nothing Dan, but **locals refer to him as "Rip Van Webster."**

For example, **in May of last year, he showed up to work for only THREE days during the entire month.**

It shouldn't take the threat of competition to force a politician to show up for work, and that's why Do-Nothing Dan has to go! [Help me defeat him in the upcoming Republican Primary by backing my campaign today.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/a2VChUIXvkpW1aXjXTiBJg/N3Y9V64vftliw8JAdwbuYA)

**I have just ten days left until the end of the first quarter of 2022** , and I'll admit, fundraising has been a challenge so far this year . . . but it's been tough for most candidates out there, including incumbents.

**We can 't allow a shortage of funds to stall the momentum of our growing grassroots campaign!**

If you're able, [please donate whatever amount that you can today and help me hit our fundraising goals so we can CRUSH Do-Nothing Dan for the 3rd time in a row!](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/a2VChUIXvkpW1aXjXTiBJg/N3Y9V64vftliw8JAdwbuYA)

Thanks again for all that you do, and look out for a special announcement tomorrow!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/N3Y9V64vftliw8JAdwbuYA)

name: Jenna Henry,  Keystone Progress
subject: Reminder to vote today for the most offensive Pennsylvanians.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

We need you to vote!

Who do you want to win this month's Marjorie Taylor Greene Award?

We have really awful candidates this month, who we think truly live up to this dishonor.

Former Congressman Lou Barletta : This gubernatorial candidate found a way to blame the recent Fern Hollow Bridge collapse on everyone but himself — even though he served on the House Transportation and Infrastructure Committee when he was in Congress. And this Trump-backed politician voted against the federal infrastructure law.

Everyone who backs the PA Energy Independence Act: Republican gubernatorial candidate Doug Mastriano and fellow State Sen. Scott Hutchinson saw the devastation in Ukraine, rising gas prices, and thought, how can we use this tragedy to further our anti-environmental agenda? So they introduced the PA Energy Independence Act. It will open new state lands for energy production, exempt PA plants from the EPA’s wastewater and pollution rules, and so much more that harms the planet.

Feeling sick to your stomach? Us, too. Don't wait! Let us know who should win today.

VOTE [https://www.kpef.info/mtg-poll-mar-2022]

Also, if you want to vote people like this out of office, please donate now to support our efforts to mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote for people who care about our rights and the earth.

Thank you!

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

| | Derek, This week, the Senate is considering Judge Kentanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court. Judge Jackson is by all accounts an exceptional jurist. She has been repeatedly confirmed by the Senate on a bipartisan basis. We should be thorough in vetting her, but we cannot and should not stand for needless obstruction. [_**Sign my petition if you agree: Judge Jackson deserves a swift and fair Supreme Court nomination process.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43249224/336372765/-1067566792?ms=mw_em_220322_1&refcode=mw_em_220322_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjExOGIyOS1mY2E5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fFV87Ur0MPRO_RWZParuBcS3ZTHo5PcWRmgITEs8b98=&emci=bde55327-63a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3f118b29-fca9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237) President Biden nominated to the Supreme Court a qualified judge with extraordinary credentials who has the backing of organizations across the political spectrum. Judge Jackson has demonstrated her brilliant legal mind throughout her career. So much so that she’s already appeared before the Judiciary Committee three times as a nominee for other positions. That doesn’t mean we should take shortcuts with her confirmation. We should vet her as we would any nominee to our highest court. But we’ve already heard Republicans making unnecessary requests that serve no purpose other than to slow down the process. [_**We shouldn’t be playing games with Supreme Court nominations. Sign my petition now if you want to see a fair confirmation process for Judge Kentanji Brown Jackson.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43249225/336372766/-1067566792?ms=mw_em_220322_1&refcode=mw_em_220322_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjExOGIyOS1mY2E5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fFV87Ur0MPRO_RWZParuBcS3ZTHo5PcWRmgITEs8b98=&emci=bde55327-63a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3f118b29-fca9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237) Thank you, Mark **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43249226/336372767/-1067566792?ms=mw_em_220322_1&refcode=mw_em_220322_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjExOGIyOS1mY2E5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fFV87Ur0MPRO_RWZParuBcS3ZTHo5PcWRmgITEs8b98=&emci=bde55327-63a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3f118b29-fca9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)**

# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
[**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150153&L=81741&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI1LmNvbS9jbGljaz90cnZpZD0xMjQxMyZBRklEPTEwOTUmYWZmX3N1Yj0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVBQUy0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTE=)
[](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150153&L=81741&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI1LmNvbS9jbGljaz90cnZpZD0xMjQxMyZBRklEPTEwOTUmYWZmX3N1Yj0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVBQUy0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTE=)
If last year taught us anything...
It's not IF you need a backup plan... it's **WHEN.**
It's sad, but facts are facts...
A deadly pandemic, blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids.
**Crisis mode has become the new normal.**
And you see the need to protect yourself and your family.
Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._
One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're fully ready, even when the power goes out.
Nothing feels more vulnerable than when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout.
Imagine all your critical devices, communications, comfort and protection, suddenly on borrowed time.
That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS.
**You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.**
Well now you can...
Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device...
That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run.
But if you want one, you better hurry...
Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market.
And now that the first batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long.
You're among the first to know about...

# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150153&L=81741&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI1LmNvbS9jbGljaz90cnZpZD0xMjQxMyZBRklEPTEwOTUmYWZmX3N1Yj0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVBQUy0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTE=)
[**> > Video: This mini solar generator powers devices and weighs less than a housecat**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150153&L=81741&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI1LmNvbS9jbGljaz90cnZpZD0xMjQxMyZBRklEPTEwOTUmYWZmX3N1Yj0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVBQUy0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTE=)
_"I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere – very light!"_
_Craig W.
Police Officer_
Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more!
You'll also be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets...
**And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.**
You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot.
So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes.
* $190 in FREE Bonuses
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you:
[**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150153&L=81741&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI1LmNvbS9jbGljaz90cnZpZD0xMjQxMyZBRklEPTEwOTUmYWZmX3N1Yj0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVBQUy0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTE=)
[](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150153&L=81741&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI1LmNvbS9jbGljaz90cnZpZD0xMjQxMyZBRklEPTEwOTUmYWZmX3N1Yj0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVBQUy0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTE=)
**You'll Never Run Out of Juice**
_"You can charge your phone 28 times and still have some juice left over. It has no shortage of power. It's very reliable and very good. It's the perfect addition to all of your other 4Patriots products." – Dan W._
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150153&L=81741&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazI1LmNvbS9jbGljaz90cnZpZD0xMjQxMyZBRklEPTEwOTUmYWZmX3N1Yj0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVBQUy0xNzE4LTIwMjIwMzIyLXMwMDNjMDAzLUJ1bmRsZTE=)

name: Clay Aiken
subject: gifts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94965/images/Clay%20Logo%20Light.png]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=03222022_UsingMyPlatform_1&amount=11 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=03222022_UsingMyPlatform_1&amount=11]
This is a photo of the very first moment I came onto the stage when the American Idol tour came through the Triangle – the first time I returned home after the show ended. I keep a copy in my office as a constant reminder that the opportunities I have to be in service today were given to me by the people of this area. My neighbors, my fellow North Carolinians. It’s also a reminder that with a large platform, comes a large responsibility — and I want to make sure I use it well.
The people of North Carolina are the reason I was able to stand on that stage. My hometown gave me my voice... and I want to use my platform to help the people who gave it to me.
We’re in the final stretch before the election, so we need to make sure that my message gets to as many North Carolinians as possible. If you’re able, could you chip in $11 to help get my message to more voters? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=03222022_UsingMyPlatform_1&amount=11]
donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=03222022_UsingMyPlatform_1&amount=11]
Through the spotlight American Idol gave me, I was able to start the National Inclusion Project. Since its founding, National Inclusion Project has partnered with some of the country’s largest youth organizations and most prestigious educational institutions, trained hundreds of industry leaders, and facilitated inclusive opportunities for over 15,000 children each year. It is my hope that through the National Inclusion Project, I will be able to give back to children with disabilities In North Carolina and beyond for years to come.
That’s what this race is all about to me... using my platform to give back to the home that gave me everything.
If you’re able, please consider donating $11 to my campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=03222022_UsingMyPlatform_1&amount=11] I am ready to raise my voice for North Carolina’s 4th congressional district with the full amplification that my platform provides. Because that’s what North Carolinians deserve!
Thank you,
Clay
Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina 4th congressional district. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse.
Donate now to join the chorus and help send Clay to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]

Clay Aiken for North Carolina
PO Box 13274
Durham, NC 27709
United States

| | We’ve been endorsed by the League of Conservation Voters Action Fund!
From protecting our open spaces to building climate-resilient infrastructure, Tom has prioritized the fight in the House to pass aggressive action on climate change.
This endorsement could not come at a bigger moment — our first FEC deadline of 2022 is rapidly approaching. This is the first major test of our campaign since redistricting made this the most competitive race in the country.

[**Polls show us in a dead heat with our opponent, that’s why we have to take advantage of this endorsement to build grassroots momentum. Can you join the League of Conservation Voters Action Fund in supporting our team by donating $10 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43249523/336374098/-1267168962?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20220321_1_1&refcode2=28a24588-fda9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGEyNDU4OC1mZGE5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lmamDt0NrZrDb3dKRPghwAEzmH1JPmWg6q7fWaKRcr0=)

This is the first major test of our campaign since redistricting made this the most competitive race in the country. = = Tom understands that the urgent need for climate action and environmental justice could not be more important. And with national Republicans pouring money into this race to flip Tom’s seat, this endorsement is more important than ever. All eyes are on our team. If we aren’t able to seize the momentum before all of our fundraising numbers go public, GOP strategists in Washington are going to see it as a sign their dark money is working. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = Thanks for being a part of this team, All of us @ Malinowski HQ | Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district. = = Tom Malinowski for Congress P.O. Box 263 Somerville, NJ 08876 United States | | Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress

[**_Marcy is bringing millions of dollars to Northern Ohio, and what are the Republicans doing? They are spending millions of dollars to unseat her. We need to keep Marcy in office and keep up the investment in our community. Will you contribute $5 to help us combat baseless GOP attacks and keep delivering for the people of Northern Ohio?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43249585/336374496/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220322CTW_N_K4C_20DO_4_NG_TESTA_l1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzM3NDgxYi1mZWE5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLrnItNL2R3VHtlXmB43dwdnKnWR8EgoA_u9wi307V8=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43249586/336374497/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220322CTW_N_K4C_20DO_4_NG_TESTA_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzM3NDgxYi1mZWE5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLrnItNL2R3VHtlXmB43dwdnKnWR8EgoA_u9wi307V8=) Aimee Reid, executive artistic director of Ohio Theatre's parent organization, said the **_$2.5 million_** _secured by Rep. Kaptur is a breath of fresh air:_ “It's so humbling because we're this little nonprofit of theater kids, so just to be elevated like that to this level of significance. **And it has a lot to do with Ms. Kaptur's commitment to the neighborhood.”** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43249587/336374498/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220322CTW_N_K4C_20DO_4_NG_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzM3NDgxYi1mZWE5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TLrnItNL2R3VHtlXmB43dwdnKnWR8EgoA_u9wi307V8=) [**_Spring has sprung, and it feels good to report good news! subject: A Few Reminders...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/393da5df5998/a-few-reminders?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=60391608ee&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear Friends,

This is the home stretch!

We are just WEEKS AWAY from the **final deadline to submit** the 28,000 verified signatures **required for a spot on the Republican primary ballot**. With nearly 20,000 verified signatures already under our belt, our team is **committed to gathering the remaining signatures before April 11th** , **but** **we need your help to get there!**

We will be gathering signatures all week! **Sign with a #TeamBecky member** at any of **[this week’s signature locations](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=6cf81ee07a&e=10c1db3257)** or **[print a packet](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=a3304962e2&e=10c1db3257)** and **[sign up to gather signatures](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=de6a3f76b2&e=10c1db3257)** in your neighborhood.
---
| If you have already signed or are interested in participating in the Utah Republican primary on June 28th, **don't forget to register to vote** and **update your address** at [vote.utah.gov](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=7d2578ef75&e=10c1db3257)

Utah leads the nation with our **safe and efficient vote-by-mail system**. To **ensure that you receive a Republican primary ballot** in the mail, you must **be registered to vote as a REPUBLICAN by MARCH 31**.

**Thank you to all** who have signed, collected, and supported our signature gathering efforts so far. Your participation has helped send the message that **Utah is READY for more productive, proactive, and inclusive leadership**!
---
|
---
| In other news this week, we are steadily approaching **the end of our first 2022 fundraising quarter** , making March one of our **most important fundraising months of this campaign**.

**Keep an eye out** for our special campaign fundraiser this week as we participate in our own March Madness tournament!

You’ll be able to **build your bracket based on why YOU support Becky most!** Each day, the reason that receives the most donations will advance into the next round, leaving us with one ‘champion’ reason by the end of the week.

This is an opportunity for you to **show your support** and tell Utahns why you believe Becky is the best candidate to **bring better leadership, better politics, and better solutions to Washington**.
---
| [DONATE](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=8a1a9064e7&e=10c1db3257 "DONATE")

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friends, This is the home stretch! We are just WEEKS AWAY from the final deadline to submit the 28,000 verified signatures required for a spot on the Republican primary ballot. With nearly 20,000 verified signatures already under our belt, our team is committed to gathering the remaining signatures before April 11th , but we need your help to get there! We will be gathering signatures all week! Sign with a #TeamBecky member at any of or and in your neighborhood. | If you have already signed or are interested in participating in the Utah Republican primary on June 28th, don't forget to register to vote and update your address at Utah leads the nation with our safe and efficient vote-by-mail system. To ensure that you receive a Republican primary ballot in the mail, you must be registered to vote as a REPUBLICAN by MARCH 31. Thank you to all who have signed, collected, and supported our signature gathering efforts so far. Your participation has helped send the message that Utah is READY for more productive, proactive, and inclusive leadership! | | In other news this week, we are steadily approaching the end of our first 2022 fundraising quarter , making March one of our most important fundraising months of this campaign. Keep an eye out for our special campaign fundraiser this week as we participate in our own March Madness tournament! You’ll be able to build your bracket based on why YOU support Becky most! Each day, the reason that receives the most donations will advance into the next round, leaving us with one ‘champion’ reason by the end of the week. This is an opportunity for you to show your support and tell Utahns why you believe Becky is the best candidate to bring better leadership, better politics, and better solutions to Washington. | "DONATE" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate P.O. Box 1467 Bountiful, UT 84011 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . Paid for by Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate.

body:
You may not know this, but every election VoteVets is one of the leading progressive organizations when it comes to outside spending.
#
Derek —
You may not know this, but every election VoteVets is one of the leading progressive organizations when it comes to outside spending.
One of the reasons for that is because we are great messengers in swing states where other progressive groups would turn off independent voters.
So when you look at the Senate races we need to win in 2022 — Wisconsin, North Carolina, Florida and more — we’re talking about states where our brand plays, and others do not.
But we are only able to spend like we do because of the support from people like you. We cannot do this alone. So please:
[**Can you make a contribution to VoteVets before our official FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close in just nine days? name: Roe v. Wade Alert
subject: last chance to protect abortion rights in PA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez
body:
| | |
---
| | **The New York Times reports on Democrats' greatest fear:
_"__Come July, the Supreme Court will_
_have overturned Roe v. Wade"_**
---
**Friend, you've been personally selected to respond to our LIVE poll before it closes at midnight:**
---

name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._k2ug)
---
|
---
Peter,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine - and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._YJOq12uVJC2JJdb1vw)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
