Woke education in our schools. Taxes, inflation, and the cost of basic necessities all through the roof. A fentanyl drug crisis in our neighborhoods. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=fc83fb200d&u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=943f2bf689)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=c61043e93e&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
| ,

Our country is speeding in the wrong direction.

Woke education in our schools. Taxes, inflation, and the cost of basic necessities all through the roof. Embarrassment on the international stage. A radical defund the police agenda. Open borders allowing criminal illegals and a fentanyl drug crisis in our neighborhoods.

I've seen it first-hand on the Prince William County Board of Supervisors.

The radical agenda of Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi has filtered down to our local government. Over the last several years I've found myself battling the national Democrat agenda at the local level. Instead of focusing on your best interests, even your local Democrat representatives are focusing their attention on protecting illegal immigrants and implementing a woke education agenda in our schools.

**We need to correct the course of our country, and we need to do it now.**

That's why I decided to run for Congress so that we can put an end to this national agenda, correct the course of our country, and restore commonsense at every level of government.

This November, we have an opportunity to take back a Republican majority in the House of Representatives and stop Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi - but I can't do it without your help.

My opponent will spend millions of dollars to try to save her seat and keep the radical Democrat majority. I need your help to defeat her.

[Will you consider making a small donation of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to help me reclaim a Republican majority and put an end to the radical left-wing agenda that's destroying our country?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=332f708818&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=4ea646568f&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")
---

---
| [Contribute $100](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=f790ba800f&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $100")
---
| [Contribute any amount](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=23102326eb&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute any amount")
---
|
Your contribution to my campaign is critical to taking back the House of Representatives.

Let's put an end to the disastrous leadership that's destroying our country. I appreciate your support, and I look forward to working together to restore commonsense to our country.

Thank you,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District

While Americans are paying the price, Joe Biden, Josh Shapiro, and the Harrisburg insiders aren’t doing a damn thing to help us here in Pennsylvania.
Not only has Biden, Wolf, and Shapiro destroyed jobs all across Pennsylvania with their draconian lockdowns and by viciously attacking our energy industry. But on top of that, everything has become more expensive under this disastrous administration.

We are getting in touch with community leaders, building a collective of on-the-ground organizers, planning a huge digital and TV campaign launch, and more. name: Mo Brooks
subject: Fire Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Mo Brooks for Senate Committee |
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908361:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r)
---
Peter, Ever notice how much McConnell hates Trump? Hates conservatives? Think about it:
* He turned his back on MAGA policies
* He failed to stop Biden's radical agenda
* He refused to investigate 2020 election irregularities
* He turned a blind eye to Biden's disastrous court nominees
* He spent $9 million to elect Democrat Doug Jones
* He has done nothing to stop the Biden agenda or the flood of illegals at the Southern Border

**McConnell hates the MAGA agenda and caves to the Biden agenda. ** ** ** _Does that sound like a Leader to you?_ **If I'm elected to the Senate, I will NOT vote for Mitch McConnell as our leader, and I will do ****_everything _****in my power to ensure we have a TRUE conservative leader.**
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908361:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r)
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION: DITCH MITCH >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908361:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r)
---
McConnell has repeatedly attacked my Senate campaign. He did it in 2017 when he spent $9 million to help elect Democrat Doug Jones, and he's doing it again because I have President Trump's endorsement. [**_STOP MCCONNELL >>>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908361:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r) The battle in this race is the same battle that's taking place across America: McConnell vs. Trump in a war for control of the GOP.
---
[**STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908361:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r)
---
**I'm calling on my opponents, Katie Britt and Mike Durant, and GOP Senate candidates nationwide to sign the pledge to Ditch Mitch.**
Peter, I know grassroots conservatives like you agree: the first step in saving America starts with Ditching Mitch. [**_I AGREE >>>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908361:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r)
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908361:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r)
---
**My name is Mo Brooks. I currently represent Alabama's 5th Congressional District in the U.S. House, but I'm running for the Senate because I'm tired of seeing radical, destructive policies under Chuck Schumer and Mitch McConnell's feckless leadership.** A few months into the Biden administration, we went from an America where law and order were the norm to an America where chaos reigns supreme. We went from a country with defined borders to one where the floodgates were opened to all. We went from an energy-independent country, creating good-paying jobs for American workers to one in which we ship jobs overseas and have to rely on Middle East oil. And we went from having a Capitol in Washington, D.C. that citizens could visit to a shut tight "Fort Pelosi," barring the American people from their own seat of government. _Simply put, we went from America First to America LAST._ **It's time we, as Americans, stand up once again for freedom-loving policies rather than those of the freedom-hating Socialist Democrats and RINOs.**
---
[**HELP MO KEEP AMERICA FIRST >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908361:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r)
---
**After standing up to Nancy Pelosi in the House, I'm ready to stand up to Chuck Schumer in the Senate.** I have a proven track record of standing up and fighting for conservative principles, and the accolades to back up:
* 91% lifetime rating from the American Conservative Union
* 98% rating from Heritage Action for America
* 93% rating from FreedomWorks
* 100% rating from the National Right to Life
* A+ national pro-life scorecard rating from Susan B. Anthony List
* 93% rating from the NRA
* 86% rating from Club for Growth
* U.S. Chamber of Commerce Spirit of Enterprise Award
* 2018 American Trade Hero Award from Coalition for a Prosperous America

---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908361:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r)
---
And I've received endorsements from well-respected conservative hard-hitters:
* President Donald Trump
* Sen. Ted Cruz
* Sen. Rand Paul
* Donald Trump Jr

[**_JOIN THEM: SUPPORT MO BROOKS >> _**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908361:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r) I've fought for the America First agenda in the House of Representatives, but I know there's more work to be done, this time in the Senate.. I've been fighting for the principles that made this country great my entire career: first as a prosecutor, then as a member of the Alabama House, then in the private practice of law for 20 years, then as District Attorney and County Commissioner, all before coming to Washington! You see, my parents, Jack and Betty Brooks, instilled in me the importance of standing up for principles that matter. I've taken what I learned from my parents growing up in Huntsville and brought that same mentality to Washington.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908361:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r)
---
**After standing up to Nancy Pelosi in the House, I'm ready to stand up to Chuck Schumer in the Senate.** I won't back down from a challenge. In the Senate, you can count on me to stand up to the freedom-hating policies of the Socialist Democrats. I will ALWAYS fight to stop socialist damage. But I can't do this alone. I need patriots and warriors like YOU to stand with me for America First policies. [**_Can I count on your support? >>>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908361:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r)
---
[**DONATE $100 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908362:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r)
---
[**DONATE $50 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908363:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r)
---
[**DONATE $20.22 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908364:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r)
---
[**DONATE $15 >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908365:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r)
---
[**DONATE ANY AMOUNT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908361:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r)
---
I appreciate you reading this entire email. I hope you'll take the time to stand with me today.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59908361:JvWI6koYN:m:1:3253819041:9CAB8F5CBFC1FB9AB5F8ABED3782A77B:r)

Mo Brooks

subject: CRA UPDATE and SBRA March 28th 1
body:
Wise Words from my Husband Remember, if we keep voting the same way we will keep getting the same thing. We can be part of the problem or we can be p
| |
---
|
---
|
---
# **Wise Words from my Husband**
**Remember, if we keep voting the same way we will keep getting the same thing. We can be part of the problem or we can be part of the solution, you choose. - Derrick Gates**
## South Bay Republican Assembly
---
|
---
# **South Bay CRA News**
For those that attended the CRA conference this weekend, I hope you had a wonderful time. These events are important because it takes you from being a coach to actually playing in the game. The time of being an armchair quarterback is over. Get in the game or get out of the way, we have a country to save! We would like to hear your feedback on the event, how you think it went, and what involvement you would like to have in the future through our South Bay Club.
**See the end email for a list of CRA elected offices and endorsed candidates**
## __
Also a reminder that our club will have its triumphant return from a hiatus on the 28th of this month. Don't miss this amazing time of fellowship with great speakers that will inspire you to stand and make a change.
Blessed and Free,
Nena Gates
President (pro-tem)
nenarenae2@gmail.com
**About the upcoming meeting on the 28th @ 6:15 Walter Buisness Men's Club. 24004 Neece Ave, Torrance, CA 90505**
I would like to remind everyone that we will be having our monthly meeting on March 28th at the Walteria Business Men's Club. We have some wonderful speakers that will be joining us and I look forward to hearing from each one of them.
If you have any questions please feel free to reach out to me and I will get back to you shortly.
## Monday Evening Meeting! Monday, March 28th 6:15 PM to 8:30 PM
---
---
|
---
# **Sonya Green**
Business owner of 25 years in Huntington Beach, California, Sonya Green’s sole dream was to help people be the best they can be and build unity within one’s community.
With that goal in mind, she established her own staffing company, now called WorkLand Staffing, rebranded after losing her brother in 2020. Sonya has been successful at placing over 25,000 people into gainful employment.
Sonya is the Founder of the PAC “Patriots for Freedom,” and was an Authorized Personnel for Recall Gavin 2020.
As a business owner, Sonya was awarded 2-time Entrepreneur of the Year by the Orange County Business Journal, awarded by EDD “Most Placed of Unemployed Individuals,” and awarded the One-Stop Dislocated Aerospace Workers Project, where she placed numerous displaced Aerospace workers.
Sonya has been a long-time advocate for the homeless and veterans, and frequently places unemployed U.S. Military Veterans into gainful employment, easing the transition into civilian life. Sonya has recently formed an alliance to remove those who abuse their power in government.
She has been consistently vocal about the mishandling of our judicial system, educational indoctrination, political fractures, budget mismanagement, government overreach and the disregard for our Constitution.
"An alliance of community is a necessity to combat those who are trying to destroy it"
~ Sonya Green
|
---
# **Siaka Massaquoi**
Actor Siaka Massaquoi entered Hollywood with big dreams. However, after witnessing racism firsthand and seeing colleagues lose roles because of their skin color, he began to ask questions. This is his story of breaking free. Siaka is now running for State Assembly and has committed the last several years to fighting for your freedom.
|
---
# **Cole Brocato**
God, family and country are pillars in the Brocato household. Cole was raised to respect his elders, police and first responders. He was taught to have courage and fight for what is right, to respect and love his country, to stand for the flag and kneel before God. With his wife Stephanie by his side, they instill these same principles to their sons Caleb and Xander. Their boys are taught to believe all goals and dreams are achievable, if they are willing to work hard even through life’s adversities. Without a doubt, these opportunities exist because of America’s greatness. The forethought of our founding fathers, the sacrifices made by them and all who’ve fought since that time, are looked at with much gratitude in their family.
**Point of Interest:**
**CRA Endorsed some of the following Candidates**
# __
Governor: Jenny Rae Le Roux
Attorney General: Eric Early
Senate: Dr. Cordie Williams We will have a complete list of endorsed candidates soon Below are the results of the CRA Officer Elections at the 2022 Annual Convention in Buena Park:
Executive Vice President (Two-year Term)
Carl Brickey - 114 votes - Elected
George Grachen - 37 votes
Vice President (5 two-year term positions and 1 one-year term position)
Molly Analla - 115 votes - Elected to Two-year Term
Celeste Greig - 109 votes - Elected to Two-year Term
Davina Keiser - 106 votes - Elected to Two-year Term
Jennye Bigelow - 98 votes - Elected to Two-year Term
Justin Hardcaslte - 97 votes - Elected to Two-year Term

We can be part of the problem or we can be p | | | | Wise Words from my Husband Remember, if we keep voting the same way we will keep getting the same thing. We can be part of the problem or we can be part of the solution, you choose. - Derrick Gates South Bay Republican Assembly | South Bay CRA News For those that attended the CRA conference this weekend, I hope you had a wonderful time. These events are important because it takes you from being a coach to actually playing in the game. The time of being an armchair quarterback is over. Get in the game or get out of the way, we have a country to save! We would like to hear your feedback on the event, how you think it went, and what involvement you would like to have in the future through our South Bay Club. See the end email for a list of CRA elected offices and endorsed candidates Also a reminder that our club will have its triumphant return from a hiatus on the 28th of this month. Don't miss this amazing time of fellowship with great speakers that will inspire you to stand and make a change. Blessed and Free, Nena Gates President (pro-tem) nenarenae2@gmail.com About the upcoming meeting on the 28th @ 6:15 Walter Buisness Men's Club. 24004 Neece Ave, Torrance, CA 90505 I would like to remind everyone that we will be having our monthly meeting on March 28th at the Walteria Business Men's Club. We have some wonderful speakers that will be joining us and I look forward to hearing from each one of them. If you have any questions please feel free to reach out to me and I will get back to you shortly. Monday Evening Meeting! Monday, March 28th 6:15 PM to 8:30 PM | Sonya Green Business owner of 25 years in Huntington Beach, California, Sonya Green’s sole dream was to help people be the best they can be and build unity within one’s community. With that goal in mind, she established her own staffing company, now called WorkLand Staffing, rebranded after losing her brother in 2020. Sonya has been successful at placing over 25,000 people into gainful employment. Sonya is the Founder of the PAC “Patriots for Freedom,” and was an Authorized Personnel for Recall Gavin 2020. As a business owner, Sonya was awarded 2-time Entrepreneur of the Year by the Orange County Business Journal, awarded by EDD “Most Placed of Unemployed Individuals,” and awarded the One-Stop Dislocated Aerospace Workers Project, where she placed numerous displaced Aerospace workers. Sonya has been a long-time advocate for the homeless and veterans, and frequently places unemployed U.S. Military Veterans into gainful employment, easing the transition into civilian life. Sonya has recently formed an alliance to remove those who abuse their power in government. She has been consistently vocal about the mishandling of our judicial system, educational indoctrination, political fractures, budget mismanagement, government overreach and the disregard for our Constitution. "An alliance of community is a necessity to combat those who are trying to destroy it" ~ Sonya Green | Siaka Massaquoi Actor Siaka Massaquoi entered Hollywood with big dreams. However, after witnessing racism firsthand and seeing colleagues lose roles because of their skin color, he began to ask questions. This is his story of breaking free. Siaka is now running for State Assembly and has committed the last several years to fighting for your freedom. | Cole Brocato God, family and country are pillars in the Brocato household. Cole was raised to respect his elders, police and first responders. He was taught to have courage and fight for what is right, to respect and love his country, to stand for the flag and kneel before God. With his wife Stephanie by his side, they instill these same principles to their sons Caleb and Xander. Their boys are taught to believe all goals and dreams are achievable, if they are willing to work hard even through life’s adversities. Without a doubt, these opportunities exist because of America’s greatness. The forethought of our founding fathers, the sacrifices made by them and all who’ve fought since that time, are looked at with much gratitude in their family. name: =?utf-8?Q?Ed=20Thelander=20for=20Congress?=
subject: WANTED: Stronger Leadership on the World Stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by The Committee to Elect Ed Thelander for Congress, Inc
body:
Years in the future, when the historians are done analyzing our present moment, they may well find it was more harmful to us than COVID-19. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/918bfdbc67ef/a-strong-finish-to-8866350?e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| | [ ](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=f26772ebab&e=f8a0a76a2b)
---
| |
> | | |
> ---
> * * *
> * * *
> **WANTED: Stronger Leadership on the World Stage**
>
> By Ed Thelander
>
> _(This column first appeared on[The Maine Wire](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=ca00fde821&e=f8a0a76a2b) on March 16, 2022)_
> Weakness is a contagion. Years in the future, when the historians are done analyzing our present moment, they may well find it was more harmful to us than COVID-19. This past weekend, Iranians fired missiles towards the U.S. consulate in Erbil, Iraq. In first calculating whether this was a good move, they surely considered our lack of military response to Russia’s vicious and unprovoked war on Ukraine.
> Leaders in both Russia and Iran remember a time not so long ago when America sought to bend the world to our will. Now it seems those days are over, and the world’s despots who were once too frightened to challenge us directly are lining up and taking turns.
> When he rejected Poland’s offer to give us MiG-29 fighter jets we could then pass onto Ukraine to aid its self-defense, President Joe Biden sent two troubling messages at the same time. First, he waffled – which is common for a career politician – initially being open to the exchange and then shutting it down. But more worrisome, when he finally rejected the deal, Biden made it clear it was because he feared what Russian President Vladimir Putin would think if he didn’t.
> Throughout his 14 months in office, Biden has done nothing meaningful to deter Russian aggression. While his allies in Congress used Ukraine as a political football, and his son Hunter as an ATM, Biden himself failed time and again to communicate to Moscow the seriousness of America’s resolve when it comes to invading independent democracies.
> This comes only three months after hosting a global “Summit of Democracies.” No wonder the world’s authoritarians now believe our word is hollow. After all, they watched us leave more than $80 billion worth of weaponry on the field in Afghanistan after our hasty and poorly-planned retreat.
> Now is not the time for belaboring how we got here. It would be more useful to ask, as Biden himself is fond of doing, whether this is who we really are. Unlike Russia, Iran, or China, America is not a country whose course is set by one man. As I travel around Maine, I hear veterans and civilians alike express dismay that we’re not doing more to help Ukraine. Many have taken matters into their own hands.
> As a retired Navy SEAL who spent my career in hot spots around the globe, I know firsthand what American involvement looks like. By no means am I advocating U.S. boots on the ground in Ukraine right now, but I know there are things we could have been doing, and should be doing, to make a difference.
> Arming the Ukrainians, for instance, to withstand a continuing, violent uptick in Russia’s tactics is a way to help a fledgling democracy defend itself from a much bigger, expansionist dictatorship. We can do more in this regard. For instance, three squadrons of our A-10 “Warthog” anti-tank aircraft are about to be mothballed. Instead, we can give them to people who vitally need them. If the Russians were paying bounties on U.S. servicemen in Afghanistan, as Democrats insisted not so long ago, why are we so timid about equipping a free people with the tools they need for their defense?
> Second, we revisit the “leading from behind” approach pioneered during the Obama administration. Was it as pragmatic, or effective, as it was once thought? Not really. Had Russia paid a real cost for its 2014 annexation of Crimea, Ukraine would probably not be facing the devastation it is today. Instead of swatting down the efforts of NATO allies like Poland to be helpful, we should be the innovators of bold, proactive actions.
> Finally, we prepare for the possibility of a Russia without Putin, as democracy activists in that country have been demanding for years now. When the Soviet Union collapsed, we did too little to help the newly-independent states prepare for the “New World Order” former President George H.W. Bush predicted. What are we doing to learn from those lessons and to help the people around the world who are courageous enough to put their lives on the line for human freedom to build resilient countries? If the answer is not much, let’s change that now.
> Cringing before danger has never been a good approach, but it seems to be our new default position. We are not the world’s policeman, but we can be a global force for good. We just need better leadership to get us there.
>
> _Ed Thelander is a retired Navy SEAL who lives in Bristol, Maine, and is a candidate for Congress in Maine’s 1 st Congressional District. This column first appeared in [The Maine Wire](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=2a0b539c8e&e=f8a0a76a2b)._
>

clean_body: Years in the future, when the historians are done analyzing our present moment, they may well find it was more harmful to us than COVID-19. | | | | | | | | | | --- WANTED: Stronger Leadership on the World Stage By Ed Thelander (This column first appeared on on March 16, 2022) Weakness is a contagion. Years in the future, when the historians are done analyzing our present moment, they may well find it was more harmful to us than COVID-19. This past weekend, Iranians fired missiles towards the U.S. consulate in Erbil, Iraq. In first calculating whether this was a good move, they surely considered our lack of military response to Russia’s vicious and unprovoked war on Ukraine. Leaders in both Russia and Iran remember a time not so long ago when America sought to bend the world to our will. Now it seems those days are over, and the world’s despots who were once too frightened to challenge us directly are lining up and taking turns. When he rejected Poland’s offer to give us MiG-29 fighter jets we could then pass onto Ukraine to aid its self-defense, President Joe Biden sent two troubling messages at the same time. First, he waffled – which is common for a career politician – initially being open to the exchange and then shutting it down. But more worrisome, when he finally rejected the deal, Biden made it clear it was because he feared what Russian President Vladimir Putin would think if he didn’t. Throughout his 14 months in office, Biden has done nothing meaningful to deter Russian aggression. While his allies in Congress used Ukraine as a political football, and his son Hunter as an ATM, Biden himself failed time and again to communicate to Moscow the seriousness of America’s resolve when it comes to invading independent democracies. This comes only three months after hosting a global “Summit of Democracies.” No wonder the world’s authoritarians now believe our word is hollow. After all, they watched us leave more than $80 billion worth of weaponry on the field in Afghanistan after our hasty and poorly-planned retreat. Now is not the time for belaboring how we got here. It would be more useful to ask, as Biden himself is fond of doing, whether this is who we really are. Unlike Russia, Iran, or China, America is not a country whose course is set by one man. Second, we revisit the “leading from behind” approach pioneered during the Obama administration. Was it as pragmatic, or effective, as it was once thought? Not really. Had Russia paid a real cost for its 2014 annexation of Crimea, Ukraine would probably not be facing the devastation it is today. What are we doing to learn from those lessons and to help the people around the world who are courageous enough to put their lives on the line for human freedom to build resilient countries? name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Conservative Senators need YOU!
body:
Peter,
Our way of life is under attack by the radical Left in the Senate.

They’re SO CLOSE to destroying what makes America great, but there’s one final line of defense against them - _your Republican vote_.

_**Your conservative **__**Senators need YOU to TAKE BACK THE SENATE and stop the socialist Democrats before it’s too late.**_
We want to make sure every patriot is on board this November, so we want to confirm your status as a loyal Republican voter.

body:
They're calling New Hampshire “one of the swingiest electorates in the country,” and they're not wrong.
| | |
---
Did you see what Nate Silver's 538 said about this race?

They're calling New Hampshire “one of the swingiest electorates in the country,” and they're not wrong. I won my last race by a razor-thin 1,017 votes, and political experts recently labeled this seat as a toss up.
**[_Before I go any further, can I ask you to pitch in ahead of our first FEC deadline of 2022 to help us hit our fundraising target?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43252007/336386184/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk787-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTZmZDFjZC0wN2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IUtXrmS2d9rRppoalfEgl_aUHXM5-CHxNIRX38HnBE8=)**

This is the first quarter that we'll be able to see what my Republican opponents have raised, and our initial numbers are a pretty big deal. How we start off will send a strong message about the strength of our campaign.
That message is especially important here in a deeply purple state like New Hampshire and where Mitch McConnell and his buddies have already spent over $7.5 million to defeat me.

Look, I’m not relying on dark money support from far-right megadonors. My campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5 whenever you can because you believe in what we’re fighting for. In fact, our average online donation this quarter is just $25.68 – I’m really proud of that.

With the Senate majority boiling down to this race in New Hampshire, multiple anti-choice Republicans running against me, and the GOP spending millions to defeat me, I'm making a personal request ahead of our first FEC deadline of the year: **[_Please will you rush $5, or whatever you can spare, to help us win in New Hampshire and protect the Democratic Senate._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43252011/336386188/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk787-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTZmZDFjZC0wN2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IUtXrmS2d9rRppoalfEgl_aUHXM5-CHxNIRX38HnBE8=)**
Thank you for stepping up!

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

That message is especially important here in a deeply purple state like New Hampshire and where Mitch McConnell and his buddies have already spent over $7.5 million to defeat me. Look, I’m not relying on dark money support from far-right megadonors. My campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5 whenever you can because you believe in what we’re fighting for. In fact, our average online donation this quarter is just $25.68 – I’m really proud of that. With the Senate majority boiling down to this race in New Hampshire, multiple anti-choice Republicans running against me, and the GOP spending millions to defeat me, I'm making a personal request ahead of our first FEC deadline of the year: = Thank you for stepping up! With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can . Click here to . Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. Paid for by Maggie for NH |

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Re: Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s confirmation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
This is an important moment for the American people to get to know the Judge Jackson I know.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43236943/336330439/396464211?refcode=em-logo&source=em220322-1-a&refcode2=1140d736-e7a9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=7QzYWEYFbWD0YKW6PIMLpVw9LIGBuUMtRJlAd5PzKiWOlmUkbuH8TU+3ToROeH/K&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQwZDczNi1lN2E5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_qeN0X0TCrjYrC9DAcpbxFBxZJim8uAMIBtaKtxVogY=)
Friend —
Now more than ever, Americans need a Supreme Court that will uphold the promise enshrined above its doors: _Equal justice under law._
Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson's record and experience demonstrate her deep commitment to making that promise real — for everyone.
In fact, her outstanding qualifications, integrity, and approach to the law earned her bipartisan support in the Senate in prior confirmations, including one just last year.
That's why it's reprehensible that Republicans like Josh Hawley and others are reportedly gearing up to lob out-of-context, outlandish attacks against Judge Jackson's record — likely in hopes of raising their profiles before the rapidly approaching GOP Presidential primary season.
These confirmation hearings are an important moment for the American people to get to know the Judge Jackson I know and voted to confirm last year. And she deserves a fair process that treats her with the respect that she, and the country, deserve.
Enough political games. And enough grandstanding. Americans’ trust in this process and our highest court is at a historic low — and for good reason. Let’s start turning that around this week.
[**If you agree, will you please add your name to demand each U.S. Senator give Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson the fair and professional confirmation process that she, and the American people, deserve?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43236944/336330440/-1674893162?source=em220322-1-a&refcode2=1140d736-e7a9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=7QzYWEYFbWD0YKW6PIMLpVw9LIGBuUMtRJlAd5PzKiWOlmUkbuH8TU+3ToROeH/K&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQwZDczNi1lN2E5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_qeN0X0TCrjYrC9DAcpbxFBxZJim8uAMIBtaKtxVogY=&emci=0a22c730-e7a9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1140d736-e7a9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2216363)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43236945/336330441/-1674893162?source=em220322-1-a&refcode2=1140d736-e7a9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=7QzYWEYFbWD0YKW6PIMLpVw9LIGBuUMtRJlAd5PzKiWOlmUkbuH8TU+3ToROeH/K&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTQwZDczNi1lN2E5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_qeN0X0TCrjYrC9DAcpbxFBxZJim8uAMIBtaKtxVogY=&emci=0a22c730-e7a9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1140d736-e7a9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2216363)**
Thank you in advance for speaking up.
Onwards,
Chris

name: Mister Rod
subject: Four Black Republicans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
If this is true, Dems face a wipeout. This is INCREDIBLE, especially when President Trump went from receiving 6% of the black vote in 2016 and 8% of t |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.electroddorilas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_s=41793f1e7c034a9d8533daf177d849fc&_t=8LErrAtfPRZNWNODuRuRthLJ-L8bVgHJVESaq60n9BXNGRkewl3y7eqzeU-YtYPhVScwHeNahjwlcPWTim1__2QK-jR8nk6lMGZjEmCTaHGFLzIcASZi41tB4WPbJ4Z4bBzxyB26C2R0Wn0MpDThk0tq3pGGeow83hJdD44xJmA%3D).

[](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=41793f1e7c034a9d8533daf177d849fc&_e=Lnt9XQP7xoXcuwZFrl7Men-_tE9r4T50P9PzesaYDbev3m20gYgjlikMlO0-jsWY1oRsG6JFiK0YgcNPHzrVZlFL8YKY8sQy3beGSwATGi_cbjF5-AbjEl42jyql7FpMeZ6LQ2vrE4llO1w8LwR3CUDTcqejT3Ld2EGxQ2VBJk6jQ4M3plvYHYct3KNc5xHbaPGEbQqHtZmystA2qoGinsbXZW5WOSvIJ9d6dzvEZ4d8w3nhrzJOV63_sA-fST5OdbCgx6l1Pkkxj3KEf9-QDxbNQPn0K0G74JbMQFuTOh_DOnTI8dyo59jvBxnihpkjbLGGfank_smudrOU-3Gxmr0qkFetAwLsGOEoE0yMP4wAcaoZoSC8qMEzL8NVmu3kF7PDrCZx9Fu0apkR_rNb8xFCPCKD_2rWoEnTB7I5s9zWjoPYRVcgv8o8dS51UhmBEtRItJ4HXXR1t23-sbwIuA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

According to a WSJ poll out last week, “ _**support for a Republican candidate rose to 27% among black voters, up from 12% in November**_.”

This is **INCREDIBLE** , especially when President Trump went from receiving 6% of the black vote in 2016 and 8% of the black vote in 2020.

If Republicans end up getting even close to 27% of the black vote in 2022, Dems will have to do some serious introspection.

As a first-generation American and son of Haitian immigrants, I can attest to this: **America the beautiful doesn’t care about the color of one’s skin**. But for generations, Black Americans have voted for Democrats by default, falling in line with the voting patterns of our parents and our grandparents.

You don’t know me well, or at all, but today I’m coming to you with a simple request: **help me send a message to Democrats that come November, black Republicans won’t be a rarity in Congress anymore, but a real force to be reckoned with**.

[](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=41793f1e7c034a9d8533daf177d849fc&_e=Lnt9XQP7xoXcuwZFrl7Men-_tE9r4T50P9PzesaYDbev3m20gYgjlikMlO0-jsWY38j4Btrvh5g8WiEFaCPArcalU9KNsp-LVs4fmWp2YlJiXNShK6YQNPWGAm9Nx_OyuRISebz4NKWE5cST6ptMf7M_72AWaxEQeZCV6XXkmaxBR50c05Wn129n_E3wsaNjfoYnjQr1_Jf9miQA5dBZUN7Jh8nnS9HB82wnTHqPtg0GQM4Klbxu2jdcsF7x736CiZbovCSJiZmu7bX8-0CNyPHmO83FaumfFzH28aM1ZZddEzu6-GppYai4mFW-qZW02vunwBgcAtCctx3CX66bkH9qeSebZVsVf9i0UTRq93nrw3kePQlkvAhwruzAnNfcPb2uKFxBp8ExojZipg7XJq6ougN3oMCB6HP45RSag1Nfey3MtKpBfkOOY5BTsMssgAJI-oORdISmHjbd4XksRopf2oJ6au3v09RK-nf95Hc%3D)

[**CHIP IN $4 to make me the 4th Black Republican in Congress**](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=41793f1e7c034a9d8533daf177d849fc&_e=Lnt9XQP7xoXcuwZFrl7Men-_tE9r4T50P9PzesaYDbev3m20gYgjlikMlO0-jsWY1oRsG6JFiK0YgcNPHzrVZlFL8YKY8sQy3beGSwATGi_cbjF5-AbjEl42jyql7FpMeZ6LQ2vrE4llO1w8LwR3CUDTcqejT3Ld2EGxQ2VBJk6jQ4M3plvYHYct3KNc5xHbaPGEbQqHtZmystA2qoGinsbXZW5WOSvIJ9d6dzvEZ4d8w3nhrzJOV63_sA-fST5OFaCYvS8-JzbY2tn4DEMUrblM6J7qlYv_rP9055cczMNnnprTuTcUK-GaiCUFO0oEGW_qXJWn8W8BLCvf2GSutDf7YQXYt8wPYOEi-tRwMqBqgoY5nF1BBeCRxJoB_Loo1nWOCSPppHrhKZY1paFHjXdORzgO4Sa9W0yPyNIKYVwThyjrKR39iAcKuPrLqusltFZz0O7tfPxNjcc91Kv-Vw%3D%3D)

Before I ask you to help make me the 4th Black Republican in Congress, a few things about myself I’d like to share with you:
* I’m a military veteran (I joined at 17),
* I’m a lawyer (I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

[](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=41793f1e7c034a9d8533daf177d849fc&_e=Lnt9XQP7xoXcuwZFrl7Men-_tE9r4T50P9PzesaYDbev3m20gYgjlikMlO0-jsWY38j4Btrvh5g8WiEFaCPArcalU9KNsp-LVs4fmWp2YlJiXNShK6YQNPWGAm9Nx_OyuRISebz4NKWE5cST6ptMf7M_72AWaxEQeZCV6XXkmaxBR50c05Wn129n_E3wsaNjfoYnjQr1_Jf9miQA5dBZUN7Jh8nnS9HB82wnTHqPtg0GQM4Klbxu2jdcsF7x736CiZbovCSJiZmu7bX8-0CNyLzl-GZcvAm5CnhPt5Wur-fR7cqVrWyCA8iwTfNnsCM-DHSd0iwul1IcUvzG8dfZN4CX0TWrjKlW-shwV4tL-b35BC8x4O23G4spnoHiFuFddI_B-52fxrZO-6gbcUijJKxKpOtiZh0DX9Z7gE6ZmRo6O3YUIXQdk90fyFjli9k9H_wDPVSbDARFAnNKmjzcfhJuPUIO7VKrcg9S1adT54I%3D)

It’s been nearly 100 years since FDR passed the New Deal and picked up a legion of new faithful voters for the Democrat Party.**What worked for our communities then doesn’t work for our communities today**. I’m running for Congress as a Republican because I believe that every American – regardless of race – must stand on their own to make their American Dream. **If my parents could make it after arriving in Florida with no money in their pockets – from one of the world’s poorest nations (Haiti), then anyone can.**

[**CHIP IN $4 to make me the 4th
Black Republican in Congress>> **](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=41793f1e7c034a9d8533daf177d849fc&_e=Lnt9XQP7xoXcuwZFrl7Men-_tE9r4T50P9PzesaYDbev3m20gYgjlikMlO0-jsWY1oRsG6JFiK0YgcNPHzrVZlFL8YKY8sQy3beGSwATGi_cbjF5-AbjEl42jyql7FpMeZ6LQ2vrE4llO1w8LwR3CUDTcqejT3Ld2EGxQ2VBJk6jQ4M3plvYHYct3KNc5xHbaPGEbQqHtZmystA2qoGinsbXZW5WOSvIJ9d6dzvEZ4d8w3nhrzJOV63_sA-fST5OhQjK1K1FCvLracHUmQ4k4h-MZGnIsQ_IScQBi7EkIgKaPxdWmbXueUXTGLxoEIen2x_1B-HgNpXpEz3GeIIJvPF7hSb8XkjLFfoYjGPNOM6C8NPRCbxoXMj4QLQm6gzVrtVNSFeTQuMWzaDGSFc_UMbLO5cszZTTfQRCtyIXLhwmqkiYPKAzdqnK1EW6Ey-ljfSijzvMpa_NV3n7bHlPnw%3D%3D)
I’m asking you to take a chance on me and to consider supporting my campaign for Congress today. **[I’m running in a district that, while leaning Democrat, can be put into play with the right candidate and enough money to run a professional campaign](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=41793f1e7c034a9d8533daf177d849fc&_e=Lnt9XQP7xoXcuwZFrl7Men-_tE9r4T50P9PzesaYDbev3m20gYgjlikMlO0-jsWY1oRsG6JFiK0YgcNPHzrVZlFL8YKY8sQy3beGSwATGi_cbjF5-AbjEl42jyql7FpMeZ6LQ2vrE4llO1w8LwR3CUDTcqejT3Ld2EGxQ2VBJk6jQ4M3plvYHYct3KNc5xHbaPGEbQqHtZmystA2qoGinsbXZW5WOSvIJ9d6dzvEZ4d8w3nhrzJOV63_sA-fST5OwEff-z08vS8IJiksIn597APr_tvOC_oI-ejFc2aGkMKJ3JDPNLC8D85Kx4pfKWr436tuHjafd5klRgE9Y5oM9jSYuQ9xUWdI0_AtfUH52tvrXcawOtpIYNFrC9DhP7kpeJbDRmdSA7Y3vkcY4OHtba6s7F5g0-3X9fD3UURJ1OREPYjWibENjp0VyxPFUdw_VAQTRaGRBhjFk8id_2jRdA%3D%3D)**.

I appreciate your consideration today,

Rod Dorilás

[** I'M WITH ROD >> **](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=41793f1e7c034a9d8533daf177d849fc&_e=Lnt9XQP7xoXcuwZFrl7Men-_tE9r4T50P9PzesaYDbev3m20gYgjlikMlO0-jsWY1oRsG6JFiK0YgcNPHzrVZlFL8YKY8sQy3beGSwATGi_cbjF5-AbjEl42jyql7FpMeZ6LQ2vrE4llO1w8LwR3CUDTcqejT3Ld2EGxQ2VBJk6jQ4M3plvYHYct3KNc5xHbaPGEbQqHtZmystA2qoGinsbXZW5WOSvIJ9d6dzvEZ4d8w3nhrzJOV63_sA-fST5OQ3D1IBYe7um56l9ux41okrIw_zUYKohY0zMhN2YbAvnyF_yiuKP0oS7EZ_OXDtfnJcv3udftRffjJrVNqbg5viXkJQVcqWbx0F3IJkBNkDm8k2TyLbLdSYWelundXtV8u6KPdP6sXHfSkKauRTqkkVT4Tg5XPw49WPMWFYzd8xdrn9mjDzx6xefmeoIbH0NkZtbYmbuwM9jG5d37pINl3Q%3D%3D)

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

[**Will you stand with Rod?**](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=41793f1e7c034a9d8533daf177d849fc&_e=Lnt9XQP7xoXcuwZFrl7Men-_tE9r4T50P9PzesaYDbev3m20gYgjlikMlO0-jsWY1oRsG6JFiK0YgcNPHzrVZlFL8YKY8sQy3beGSwATGi_cbjF5-AbjEl42jyql7FpMeZ6LQ2vrE4llO1w8LwR3CUDTcqejT3Ld2EGxQ2VBJk6jQ4M3plvYHYct3KNc5xHbaPGEbQqHtZmystA2qoGinsbXZW5WOSvIJ9d6dzvEZ4d8w3nhrzJOV63_sA-fST5OUDhZzchSRx7JVi8Yj0ib6w77eO4sMnhbkja8AuEFV_L4QZ0aIwRKPAkwR-SNx2UjgGZGO4mC2h9cH9gdhJS7635jIxtdG16uDnEQJ5BZIJnwNxqe1FJChPeQK0Y-iPLiSRnQS--R5wGNDkePa-s7vlmV79YWyUHYcQWhB5Qh9kappuBHPRPeOP2nVJivHTKVL0SdobCC-xb7YuOI_4giiQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: If this is true, Dems face a wipeout. This is INCREDIBLE, especially when President Trump went from receiving 6% of the black vote in 2016 and 8% of t | No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may . Fellow American, According to a WSJ poll out last week, “ support for a Republican candidate rose to 27% among black voters, up from 12% in November.” This is INCREDIBLE , especially when President Trump went from receiving 6% of the black vote in 2016 and 8% of the black vote in 2020. If Republicans end up getting even close to 27% of the black vote in 2022, Dems will have to do some serious introspection. As a first-generation American and son of Haitian immigrants, I can attest to this: America the beautiful doesn’t care about the color of one’s skin. But for generations, Black Americans have voted for Democrats by default, falling in line with the voting patterns of our parents and our grandparents. You don’t know me well, or at all, but today I’m coming to you with a simple request: help me send a message to Democrats that come November, black Republicans won’t be a rarity in Congress anymore, but a real force to be reckoned with. Before I ask you to help make me the 4th Black Republican in Congress, a few things about myself I’d like to share with you: I’m a military veteran (I joined at 17), I’m a lawyer (I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school) I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office. The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success. It’s been nearly 100 years since FDR passed the New Deal and picked up a legion of new faithful voters for the Democrat Party.What worked for our communities then doesn’t work for our communities today. I’m running for Congress as a Republican because I believe that every American – regardless of race – must stand on their own to make their American Dream. If my parents could make it after arriving in Florida with no money in their pockets – from one of the world’s poorest nations (Haiti), then anyone can. I’m asking you to take a chance on me and to consider supporting my campaign for Congress today. . I appreciate your consideration today, Rod Dorilás | ABOUT ROD** Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service. At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer. Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China. Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left. | Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Neil=20Kumar=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Biden is destroying the US Dollar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
We're losing our superpower status | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066241?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=a76024da1f&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

America is losing her place on the world stage, and we're losing our economy with it.

In its blind hatred of Russia, the Biden Regime has made a series of incalculably stupid moves that have—in the span of less than 2 weeks—put our country in the _weakest_ position it’s been in history.

The world’s biggest oil producers are now conducting business in Chinese Yuan instead of American Dollars.

Saudi Arabia and the UAE refused to even pick up the phone when our illegitimate “President” Joe Biden called.

The Saudis are meeting with Xi in a few weeks.

Russia and China are now entangled in an unbreakable economic alliance.

Even India, China’s ancient enemy, is being pushed into China’s arms.

_The rest of the world is moving on, building a new global order without America in it._

World leaders know that Joe Biden is senile, and they know that he was not legitimately elected.

They don’t respect him. Why should they?

_Even foreign criminals don’t fear the U.S. Government anymore._

Last week, a Mexican drug cartel shot up the outside of a U.S. Consulate just miles away from the Texas border.

**Our criminal, decadent Ruling Class is intentionally destroying the Dollar—and with it, our economy.**

_Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, struggling to afford basic necessities. It’s only going to get worse with these fools in charge._

**_We have to replace THEM before they replace US._**

clean_body: We're losing our superpower status | | | | | | | Fellow Patriot: America is losing her place on the world stage, and we're losing our economy with it. In its blind hatred of Russia, the Biden Regime has made a series of incalculably stupid moves that have—in the span of less than 2 weeks—put our country in the weakest position it’s been in history. The world’s biggest oil producers are now conducting business in Chinese Yuan instead of American Dollars. Saudi Arabia and the UAE refused to even pick up the phone when our illegitimate “President” Joe Biden called. The Saudis are meeting with Xi in a few weeks. Russia and China are now entangled in an unbreakable economic alliance. Even India, China’s ancient enemy, is being pushed into China’s arms. The rest of the world is moving on, building a new global order without America in it. World leaders know that Joe Biden is senile, and they know that he was not legitimately elected. They don’t respect him. Why should they? Even foreign criminals don’t fear the U.S. Government anymore. Last week, a Mexican drug cartel shot up the outside of a U.S. Consulate just miles away from the Texas border. Our criminal, decadent Ruling Class is intentionally destroying the Dollar—and with it, our economy. Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, struggling to afford basic necessities. It’s only going to get worse with these fools in charge. We have to replace THEM before they replace US. . We need PATRIOTS who willFIGHT for the AMERICAN people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back. Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America, Neil Robinson Kumar Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03 P.S. body:
Everyone will be looking at it to see the strength of our gun-safety movement—especially the NRA, NSSF, and the rest of the gun lobby.
#

Friends -
In less than two weeks, we close the books on one of the last official FEC fundraising deadlines of the midterm elections.
These deadlines are important.
We're legally required to publicly report our fundraising numbers when the period ends. Everyone will be looking at our numbers to see the strength of our gun-safety movement—especially the NRA, NSSF, and the rest of the gun lobby.
They want to see if our movement is losing momentum, and if they think so, then they will see an opening to attack us even more.
We can’t let that happen.
So please. If you have been waiting for the right time to make your first $3 contribution to Giffords PAC, today is the PERFECT day.
What do you say?
[**Can you please make a contribution—$5, $10 or whatever you can afford—to Giffords PAC before our FEC deadline ends? Our movement to save lives is strong because of supporters like you.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-mar22?refcode=em220322-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1724_3935704_gDFtno&akid=1724%2E3935704%2EgDFtno)

The team at Giffords

Hey Fellow American, it’s Tyler (the Marine who did four overseas tours and is now on a mission to secure a seat in Congress). [**I need a quick favor.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1ad3d798e0cd471191d0abeb29ae8a58&_e=XBWhVslU7hdeP9AVJ_UsD7Cbin-iTc_O3XNTpJfnUs34Iu_KjdRBqzIhn__MpZOqG2jRtnAQ8ULttsAex2fvMHHOygqgoShdoBkHUl20nJgUaeN4EKlA49HaAqqfG1Y3ZOgLNZJUNW4zG2sxTWFWmUJ9EDeKKbk6UUJWGPEmJHaq-2fNj2t1ngOITGaT3Syf6tqVj15lf2-FD6PP30OqnYDpwyPwJsNFnVTN2donTlmm8ok6WjKCQd5NIYoYVo083nOsxhhkc_syE3s2Pce83_nKHDtsPlQ1fLd_INJS1hoOL1kDJZ_Sjh92rdcmCyfMlGGaQZIHqpnX6pdBr8GXup3Qih8peqyNt-IW19wI-KYW4C8wykXor_jkJemrXoVC93VPtetYlzPyXQdjdyp4vg%3D%3D)

**The short version:**
I’m facing my biggest deadline yet at the end of March, and I need to know if you’ll [**have my back**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1ad3d798e0cd471191d0abeb29ae8a58&_e=XBWhVslU7hdeP9AVJ_UsD7Cbin-iTc_O3XNTpJfnUs34Iu_KjdRBqzIhn__MpZOqG2jRtnAQ8ULttsAex2fvMHHOygqgoShdoBkHUl20nJgUaeN4EKlA49HaAqqfG1Y3ZOgLNZJUNW4zG2sxTWFWmUJ9EDeKKbk6UUJWGPEmJHbChWOSbTYNIEVkaNgTiRI7q-TqlwvZHPhYeg85pxg2VLTrTPNxCcY9FJ-YKbbagdnRqzVZM23vmpBpSx9Pc-pzWOeKkH9UFgfjlzRbObEo18Vj08t7G72pZl-3xfb0egGi3lHIQvsBlvstpnnTpWtv18WbVYIyGpSFpm5TYF6A8Le-2afYXjvZ210hOOqMq5z-GqnXWq5rSx_mmIQHmmGTyJGI3ZimNXdDTXncGQRBpg%3D%3D) in the next 15 minutes.

**The long version:**
This is what I didn’t want to have to send to you, but my team and I are going over the numbers before our big end-of-quarter deadline, and essentially, I need to pick up the pace on our fundraising numbers. **We are 41% short of meeting our biggest goal yet** , and I don’t know what we’re going to do.

I’m sure you know how bad things are...

My super-DEM opponent and liberal media will be patiently waiting to comb through my next round of publicly accessible finance reports so they can spot potential weaknesses or shortcomings that they can use against me.

**Dark money groups have already poured MILLIONS into my opponent’s bank account, because they know she’ll rubber stamp Pelosi’s America-last agenda.**

This is the same far-left Democrat who beat me in 2020 by just 2% _and since then has voted with Pelosi 98% of the time._

So now you see why I had to email you and ask for your immediate support. [**Will you tap the secure link and make an emergency donation to help us pick up the pace?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1ad3d798e0cd471191d0abeb29ae8a58&_e=XBWhVslU7hdeP9AVJ_UsD7Cbin-iTc_O3XNTpJfnUs34Iu_KjdRBqzIhn__MpZOqG2jRtnAQ8ULttsAex2fvMHHOygqgoShdoBkHUl20nJgUaeN4EKlA49HaAqqfG1Y3ZOgLNZJUNW4zG2sxTWFWmUJ9EDeKKbk6UUJWGPEmJHZFokIv_9_NJvUG8Bpv5C71BUHOAnLajBYooD81NkiyYDBoO6TZOLZ2ge7GkGbVSgU897M61MzgklbpJ2SNKiL-nlvxZhMmRDR1RN0-pMC9ubMoUgGIyCeSIZUsRRmmfyq2OQ3b5JaDR6QWnkyOpU2eSTJVYd9Ak_-z8BI2J5SGPhPRJz04jZzoJ_GLUW8JjZUE8k-GWCjkhJT1flLp-ifoFQlVacBGFyz0VgHUj7G1qA%3D%3D)

[**EMERGENCY DONATE**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1ad3d798e0cd471191d0abeb29ae8a58&_e=XBWhVslU7hdeP9AVJ_UsD7Cbin-iTc_O3XNTpJfnUs34Iu_KjdRBqzIhn__MpZOqG2jRtnAQ8ULttsAex2fvMHHOygqgoShdoBkHUl20nJgUaeN4EKlA49HaAqqfG1Y3ZOgLNZJUNW4zG2sxTWFWmUJ9EDeKKbk6UUJWGPEmJHaA7IPRTuLpwicDBg_d704Zc2WIl2lvcfSzOKeoZgiBy7HQbfaQAnGnRugA2HZORd6H2jLnLTePtdy5nv_HMZf2NBTqszSCUyBVlTU4nSX9IeY673KeiQzfuYkajgDMuYM068THSHyDXjgNExLYUd5qM1bpac4LmQZmYV44kqan2bNbQjmrh_Jl9_jkYsdy1CXtN3nsR_5Dr3BlLaPTE6G2z9PWHK4NtR7PbuxKrHa3gw%3D%3D)
All eyes are on this seat, Fellow American. Dems and Republicans have qualified this as **one of the most competitive races this cycle.**

If Republicans are going to retake control of the House, then it’s essential to win seats in suburban district like the one I’m running in. With just five seats needed to take control, we must PUT EVERY SINGLE SEAT IN PLAY.

If Dems hold the House majority in 2022, they’re going to go wild...

Winning this seat is the key to regaining the majority - [**which is why I’m asking for your help today. Will you spare any amount today so that I can hold my ground?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1ad3d798e0cd471191d0abeb29ae8a58&_e=XBWhVslU7hdeP9AVJ_UsD7Cbin-iTc_O3XNTpJfnUs34Iu_KjdRBqzIhn__MpZOqG2jRtnAQ8ULttsAex2fvMHHOygqgoShdoBkHUl20nJgUaeN4EKlA49HaAqqfG1Y3ZOgLNZJUNW4zG2sxTWFWmUJ9EDeKKbk6UUJWGPEmJHbrwHXmByvvojErLTSLQRWpfa8YAz0Wlovf2jGp6q4_1wYOUzWySiM5mf8jBIFQEwF8Bpvms4gusnVX1fE2VE8BstrS1l9w7hn0Wuj79z1e9tf45XhBoC013vLIUdQ65yt2VfjCUaR2r0Ge1mDm5ayCpbGPCaUXuYzM8Gb-qitwb5cwbNnYUBenW_QkwnznX39_Y6FXALWvh92JisfzKb4iLqler10urtp5JaKBgumVIg%3D%3D)

[**EMERGENCY DONATE**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1ad3d798e0cd471191d0abeb29ae8a58&_e=XBWhVslU7hdeP9AVJ_UsD7Cbin-iTc_O3XNTpJfnUs34Iu_KjdRBqzIhn__MpZOqG2jRtnAQ8ULttsAex2fvMHHOygqgoShdoBkHUl20nJgUaeN4EKlA49HaAqqfG1Y3ZOgLNZJUNW4zG2sxTWFWmUJ9EDeKKbk6UUJWGPEmJHazPSyaMiEQ57R_S31tdA5KJfqMb7uXpP3ld3JUklViKjFvqbG_rfqUDvxIouKqpaG6t-OaxJ_cNnfuAsyW8gxJK5NaJB-m3hPw_eLFteF_jko8a1ctG2p8Kwmz9PWGOVOUpFaTvGKjI2nwAUr14dnrzZ9PeUn16upelFpzDAIm1rlDmBaFWHa03x37_VzQEZFaY7dHlemhFadQUfTSkFIB9aS8KcKj77heNz00OFVRGQ%3D%3D)
I hope I can count on you in this critical moment.

In service,
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1ad3d798e0cd471191d0abeb29ae8a58&_e=XBWhVslU7hdeP9AVJ_UsD7Cbin-iTc_O3XNTpJfnUs34Iu_KjdRBqzIhn__MpZOqG2jRtnAQ8ULttsAex2fvMHHOygqgoShdoBkHUl20nJgUaeN4EKlA49HaAqqfG1Y3ZOgLNZJUNW4zG2sxTWFWmUJ9EDeKKbk6UUJWGPEmJHbxdlVOEOEarrVZbbGH1DbyoBF441Op46N1PKkOaLWcqPLQcJtK7nOPDz5-pZ6Gk7ehbSCIPlzbouqGmEmSsFfToaaEg_mPQDT6SRvd6Z2wDNcDLtC-jeuvVqFeKSp4YdYxpur8NSZqMS6waZbiTFZ9zArivWO5h-9XvlL13sqmTadadjFt0h3Emxeos8jyura2YolWz40UUOtUW6y0Y-UIZ3iLv2UPgB4pRApvck6YOA%3D%3D)
Tyler Kistner
Father. Husband. Marine.

| **_Tyler Kistner_**
* * *
Tyler Kistner is a native Minnesotan who served 10 years on active duty, mostly in the elite Marine Special Operations Forces unit known as the Marine Raiders. Like so many Minnesotans, Tyler is concerned about the direction of America and its future, not only for our generation but for our children and future generations of America. And that’s why he’s running for Congress - to serve Minnesota’s 2nd District for America’s future.

clean_body: Hey Fellow American, it’s Tyler (the Marine who did four overseas tours and is now on a mission to secure a seat in Congress). | Hey Fellow American, it’s Tyler (the Marine who did four overseas tours and is now on a mission to secure a seat in Congress). The short version: I’m facing my biggest deadline yet at the end of March, and I need to know if you’ll in the next 15 minutes. The long version: This is what I didn’t want to have to send to you, but my team and I are going over the numbers before our big end-of-quarter deadline, and essentially, I need to pick up the pace on our fundraising numbers. We are 41% short of meeting our biggest goal yet , and I don’t know what we’re going to do. I’m sure you know how bad things are... My super-DEM opponent and liberal media will be patiently waiting to comb through my next round of publicly accessible finance reports so they can spot potential weaknesses or shortcomings that they can use against me. Dark money groups have already poured MILLIONS into my opponent’s bank account, because they know she’ll rubber stamp Pelosi’s America-last agenda. This is the same far-left Democrat who beat me in 2020 by just 2% and since then has voted with Pelosi 98% of the time. So now you see why I had to email you and ask for your immediate support. All eyes are on this seat, Fellow American. Dems and Republicans have qualified this as one of the most competitive races this cycle. If Republicans are going to retake control of the House, then it’s essential to win seats in suburban district like the one I’m running in. With just five seats needed to take control, we must PUT EVERY SINGLE SEAT IN PLAY. If Dems hold the House majority in 2022, they’re going to go wild... Winning this seat is the key to regaining the majority - I hope I can count on you in this critical moment. In service, Tyler Kistner Father. Husband. body:
|
| | | _**Peter, congratulations!**_

The Washington Circle - the premium tier of our flagship 1776 Donor Club - was just unlocked, and we picked YOU to join! This is an exclusive invite: only 1,776 patriots were invited to the highest level of this exclusive Conservative donor club.

---

---
We heard you're a Conservative fighter... So what are you waiting for? _**[You only have until MIDNIGHT to accept this invitation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59911223:JHYCLkoNJ:m:1:3317145305:D88BF3D713D3A29C1C93B8707F8BF66F:r "You only have until MIDNIGHT to accept this invitation.")**_ _**Otherwise, we 'll be forced to move to the next patriot on our list.**_

**We are creating a network of patriots across the country who are committed to putting America First ahead of this critical midterm election.** We need to know who's willing to join this fight. _**[Can we count on you to join us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59911223:JHYCLkoNJ:m:1:3317145305:D88BF3D713D3A29C1C93B8707F8BF66F:r "Can we count
on you to join us?")**_
---
| | | [JOIN THE WASHINGTON CIRCLE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59911223:JHYCLkoNJ:m:1:3317145305:D88BF3D713D3A29C1C93B8707F8BF66F:r "JOIN THE WASHINGTON CIRCLE")
---
Anything and everything you can do to stand with House Conservatives matters. We don't have the same luxury as the Democrats do, to ask mega millionaires for huge donations. Republicans rely on grassroots supporters like you - but that comes at a cost. _**It means that when people get emails like this and just ASSUME other people will toe the line ... we fall seriously short. **_

Joining the Washington Circle of our 1776 Club means stepping up for Conservative patriots serving in the House and putting America First and laying the groundwork for winning BIG in 2022. _**[Join today>>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59911223:JHYCLkoNJ:m:1:3317145305:D88BF3D713D3A29C1C93B8707F8BF66F:r "Join today
>>>")**_
---
| | | [JOIN THE WASHINGTON CIRCLE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59911223:JHYCLkoNJ:m:1:3317145305:D88BF3D713D3A29C1C93B8707F8BF66F:r "JOIN THE WASHINGTON CIRCLE")
---
House Republicans thank you.

Izzy
1776 Club Membership Chair
---
| |
* * *

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59911224:JHYCLkoNJ:m:1:3317145305:D88BF3D713D3A29C1C93B8707F8BF66F:r "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59911224:JHYCLkoNJ:m:1:3317145305:D88BF3D713D3A29C1C93B8707F8BF66F:r "Can we count

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

Trump to be identified by Sponsor (approximate retail value $2,500). The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,500. Additional restrictions apply as outlined in these Rules. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the . The Sponsor is Servant Leadership Fund, 824 S MILLEDGE AVE STE 101, ATHENS, GA 30605.

name: Dr. Kelli Ward
subject: Join me in Alabama for Mo Brooks!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KELLI WARD
body:
Are you sick and tired of the Washington Uniparty? Do you want to support real MAGA candidates who want seek the approval of their voters not the media?

| | |
---
[Unsubscribe](https://for.az.kelliward.com/unsubscribe.php?M=22208987&C=04032ac65d70499c58422a6a52349eb2&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=1040&N=150169&AGENCY=PMI) | [View in browser](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150169&L=81705&F=H&drurl=aHR0cDovL2tlbGxpd2FyZC5jb20vZW1haWwtbGV0dGVycy8yMDIyMDMyMi13YXJkLWFzay1icm9va3M/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXdhcmQmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVtYWlsJnV0bV90ZXJtPWJyb29rcw==)

Patriot,

MAGA congressman Mo Brooks is running for the U.S. Senate and he’s promising to attack the heart of the Washington Uniparty— RINO Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell. That’s right! Mo Brooks is promising to vote against McConnell for majority leader.
> “America can’t afford a Senate leader who is a weak-kneed, debt junkie, open-border RINO Republican and who, worse yet, sells out America for special interest group cash.”
Patriots agree that this something you should back. That's why on three separate occasions— between Thursday March 24th and Friday March 25th— I will be in Alabama stumping for Mo and I want to see you there.
* **[Montgomery Fundraiser](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150169&L=81706&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9tb2Jyb29rcy9yc3ZwLW1vbnRnb21lcnk/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXdhcmQmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVtYWlsJnV0bV90ZXJtPWJyb29rcw==)** , Thursday, March 24th
\- Time: 5:30-8:00pm
\- Location: Wynlakes Country Club, 7900 Wynlakes Blvd Montgomery, AL 36117
* **[Orange Beach Fundraiser](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150169&L=81707&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9tb2Jyb29rcy9yc3ZwLW9yYW5nZS1iZWFjaD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09d2FyZCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZW1haWwmdXRtX3Rlcm09YnJvb2tz)** , Friday, March 25th
\- Time: 9:00-10:30 am
\- Location: Cobalt, The Restaurant, 28099 Perdido Beach Boulevard Orange Beach, AL 36561
* **[Spanish Fort Fundraiser](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150169&L=81708&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9tb2Jyb29rcy9yc3ZwLXNwYW5pc2gtZm9ydD91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09d2FyZCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZW1haWwmdXRtX3Rlcm09YnJvb2tz)** , Friday, March 25th
\- Time: 5:30-7:00pm
\- Location: 23 Signal Hill Road Spanish Fort, AL 36527

Share this with your friends and family and let’s show MAGA support for Mo Brooks. Let's face it, the country cannot survive another round of McConnell's weak leadership. Come out and join me for great food and fun to benefit Mo Brooks for Senate. I hope to see you there!

Sincerely,

Dr. Kelli Ward

body:

| | | [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/2428b29d676d61c8/0ad2ab39ba742e67c3d6b838967d376c/40313)

Friend, Thank you again for being a part of the Indiana Republican Party team. We know that strong Republican leadership and our conservative values are a big part of what makes Indiana one of the top states to live, work, play, study, and stay. But we can’t take our position for granted. In fact, D.C. Democrats are determined to up their ground game and sway voters to their side. We need to fight fire with fire, and that’s why we’re reaching out to you today. We need grassroots volunteers on campaigns across Indiana to help us fight back against the mobilizing Democrats and keep Indiana RED. Even if you only have an hour or two, we can really use your time. Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,

The false narrative about fraud in Michigan’s 2020 election just won’t die.

secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=032222 [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=032222] Since the 2020 election, election extremists in our state have become more active and better funded. Now, Trump is bringing the MAGA circus and the Big Lie conspiracy theory to Michigan because he wants to supercharge this growing extremist movement.

And why is he rallying for DePerno and Karamo 8 months before election day? It’s because he knows that if they were in office, they would’ve fought to overturn the Michigan election in 2020, and been one step closer to destroying American democracy. So now he wants to make sure that they’re in power to clinch a victory in Michigan in 2024.

We can’t let that happen. Trump, Deperno, and Karamo are building a well-funded fringe movement to try to take over the Michigan elections process. But we have the larger pro-democracy cause on our side. That’s why we're going to outraise them now and defeat them come November.We know he’s going to bring in an avalanche of money from big-ticket donors. We have to fight back. This week, we’re setting a goal to raise $10,000 from grassroots donors and ensure that we have the resources to protect our democracy come November. Donate now to support our goal and re-elect Jocelyn.

clean_body: We need to EXPOSE Zuckerberg for rigging our elections... | Peter, Earlier this month, I told you about how Facebook founder Mark Zuckerberg funneled millions of dollars into my state under the guise of “COVID relief” to rig our elections... Now, President Trump is also calling for Zuckerberg to be EXPOSED through a full audit of the $417 MILLION he spent to take over local election offices in key counties across the country. Which is why my U.S. Senate campaign has started our very own Election Security Fund to answer President Trump’s call. We will expose these left-wing puppet masters and ensure our race for the 1 SEAT we need to END Kamala’s 50-50 Senate majority is FREE and FAIR. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Nick Savas, Wade Herring HQ
subject: Why I’m proud to work with Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wadeparade?refcode=whem032222 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wadeparade?refcode=whem032222]
Peter –
It’s no secret that Wade has spent decades working, volunteering, and serving our neighborhoods. He genuinely cares about our community and makes an effort every day to better places & people around him.
Recently while visiting Brunswick, Wade read an article in the paper about an exceptional student at Brunswick High – Jeremiah Austin. Wade decided to write a letter to Jeremiah congratulating him on his accomplishments and for his hard work. Jeremiah wrote Wade back, and the next time Wade was in Brunswick he stopped by one of Jeremiah’s golf tournaments to meet him!
This past weekend, The Brunswick News published a letter from Jeremiah recounting the experience. [https://thebrunswicknews.com/opinion/letters_to_editor/students-thanks-political-candidate-for-taking-interest-in-youth/article_673d655f-f0b6-5581-ae95-292c9626c2d7.html] Please read for Jeremiah’s story – and his thoughts about how Wade really means what he says.
https://thebrunswicknews.com/opinion/letters_to_editor/students-thanks-political-candidate-for-taking-interest-in-youth/article_673d655f-f0b6-5581-ae95-292c9626c2d7.html [https://thebrunswicknews.com/opinion/letters_to_editor/students-thanks-political-candidate-for-taking-interest-in-youth/article_673d655f-f0b6-5581-ae95-292c9626c2d7.html]
Jeremiah’s story is only one of many that folks have about Wade. Wade isn’t a politician. He’s a member of our community who values truth, respect, honor, and service and wants to bring those values to Washington.
Wade is truly committed to every person in the First District, even those who aren’t yet old enough to vote for him. This is what our campaign is about – bringing people together and electing a representative who will serve everyone in our district.
I’m proud to work with Wade, and I’m proud of the impact he’s already having on our community.
Thank you,
Nick Savas
Campaign Manager, Wade Herring for Congress

Friends,

In case you haven't noticed, our campaign is calling the shots. This is because we are fighting on the side of working people and kitchen table issues. We are fighting against the corporate greed that hurt our communities and our planet. Gas companies are gouging working people at the pump. My opponent, Lou Correa, took **$25,000 from the Oil & Gas industry last year alone. ** He has been in public office for nearly 25 years and has consistently opposed solutions to the climate crisis. People like Lou are getting in the way of the progress we need for our children to breathe clean air and drink clean water. [We've been endorsed by Center For Biological Diversity Action Fund](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43244635/336351914/-900200512?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTA2ZTJjMC1mMGE5LWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PQiCrX-JIDkZDnQ9KLxfSnqjQnwjlHeiMhNf2fhPkic=&emci=cf318d0d-76a9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3106e2c0-f0a9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=12523946), who said about Mike: _"Ortega is a climate champion challenging an incumbent who has long been in the pocket of Big Oil and Gas donors. clean_body: Another important endorsement, and why we're fighting. | = Friends, In case you haven't noticed, our campaign is calling the shots. This is because we are fighting on the side of working people and kitchen table issues. We are fighting against the corporate greed that hurt our communities and our planet. Gas companies are gouging working people at the pump. My opponent, Lou Correa, took $25,000 from the Oil & Gas industry last year alone. He has been in public office for nearly 25 years and has consistently opposed solutions to the climate crisis. People like Lou are getting in the way of the progress we need for our children to breathe clean air and drink clean water. , who said about Mike: "Ortega is a climate champion challenging an incumbent who has long been in the pocket of Big Oil and Gas donors. With so much at stake right now, we cannot afford business as usual." have promised not to take a dime of that corrupt money, so we need your help. Yours In Solidarity, Alex Coronado Campaign Manager | Our campaign is fueled by everyday people like you chipping in whatever they can. Can you give $25 or whatever you can right now to help us stay on track on our campaign costs? =_ | = | Paid for by Ortega For Congress Ortega For Congress PO Box 1271 Anaheim, CA 92815 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
I want to give Karen some good news before she takes the stage tonight.

Hey there — I need your help. Tonight at 6:00, Karen is taking the debate stage for the first time since the official ballot was finalized.

It's also the first debate since news broke that one of our opponents spent over $4.4 _million_ in their first month. At this rate, they're on pace to spend over $20 MILLION — and that's just in the primary. There's no telling how expensive this race will get, which is why I need your help showing Karen we have her back.

I know that Karen is going to do an incredible job — she's been working so hard to prepare. That's why I want to give her some good news right before she goes on stage. Our team got together and set a goal to raise $5,000 before the debate, and I'm hoping I can tell her we hit it tonight.

**The short version:**
