name: Leora Levy
subject: ▶️ Play Now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leora Levy for U
body:
People often ask me the question of why? Why I’m running for U.S. Senate? Why I care so much about America? Why would I do anything to defend freedom | No longer want to receive emails from Leora Levy for U.S. Senate? You may [unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com here](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_s=52745281c8c641eb9bb3fcd973643761&_t=gGwwwVh7PHKBUilSA4ZzR700PG-oxxTYZaKHQ0fpWDG0qOjqQGclV08totc_jRraAzpB78uoDvZSrFo41zcSy_BnL4zT3dALpLLdshXpYmPXhWiyrQfpWr8Ppy7IcYz_Gz4KuxcpT4NzYPdJzaYTpfOU3ux2iAVDJeOxbbScShY%3D).

[
](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=52745281c8c641eb9bb3fcd973643761&_e=7elQa5dBVIlYlo-fNi9yvlIw5divRGBSPX-f0Nu3twAk4sBKTevNZarOLLVmjf_GsZDPZ26TBJ9UgA6xkedxZeO75czGmf1qANKIj3nSfmpsypzOE2A0jNA-kFrZpSmNpdwJ1cxanFtT4uai2MvA2rqBWvl2v8CnFDTkLm8yVFb8EqG42uDUlrCr0ZgiSuvu2Kp9IH7M8dLhtaJhAORXI8ilE4al7Yw-BSVW8bzP7-nlAKQKA3hVhTu3ZmYLXRcXls2ZsYcHLmUY0ub8csOA0LT_TRUEgXmVMu0ndA98FBmmvow-En99-9H_sGOC4sW08R_to_nJi0-sudms8XilB2jmrbj8_2BZw8ykJhfgK3iyAWOHn4FJ_fR72NGoOa7gzgytSf5SGObAvnHjn-meXjckCWVZ1BaHTuB7OnJwnTG4bzaF3QmJkXCEXQdbsM9uc1G_qHrXJJMlxxBnS__mlw%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

People often ask me the question of _**why?**_

_Why I’m running for U.S. Senate?_

_Why I care so much about America?_

_Why would I do _anything_ to defend freedom and protect liberty?_

I’ll tell you why, Fellow Conservative - I know exactly what it’s like when communism comes knocking on your door. **I escaped communist Cuba with my family in 1960.** In 1940 my mother and her parents escaped the Holocaust.

I came to America as a child, filled with hope and many blessings, and I was able to pursue the American dream because of the opportunity and freedom we are promised in this country. **And now that freedom is being threatened by the radical Democrats, it is my absolute duty to protect that very same freedom I was granted many years ago.**

[**If you want to hear more about why I’m running, and why this race is so imperative to restoring our Nation, tap the link to watch below:**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=52745281c8c641eb9bb3fcd973643761&_e=7elQa5dBVIlYlo-fNi9yvlIw5divRGBSPX-f0Nu3twAk4sBKTevNZarOLLVmjf_GsZDPZ26TBJ9UgA6xkedxZeO75czGmf1qANKIj3nSfmpsypzOE2A0jNA-kFrZpSmNpdwJ1cxanFtT4uai2MvA2rqBWvl2v8CnFDTkLm8yVFb8EqG42uDUlrCr0ZgiSuvu2Kp9IH7M8dLhtaJhAORXI8ilE4al7Yw-BSVW8bzP7-mCeZJgRFahVx9B5uHitxJVnBNUr1zG3FCPCKLk5ZKm06D7E09c3-Wl3mWjJFfEp1tuqWbcwJXXF05oE9R97MboMW4iVUQ58Ay17F34x2wZk_eyY6hHL1GlWMgdVJXbIp36GE8sWbluDOgeF_U-3eHZuLhkt9sjKQMfnxic5h2aClFkn3o3J7iwgdeSTRC3V2v3lcllbteDW3FlvlQDx79rJCQBkBNt6uLl79D82739Zg%3D%3D)

[
](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=52745281c8c641eb9bb3fcd973643761&_e=7elQa5dBVIlYlo-fNi9yvlIw5divRGBSPX-f0Nu3twAk4sBKTevNZarOLLVmjf_GsZDPZ26TBJ9UgA6xkedxZeO75czGmf1qANKIj3nSfmpsypzOE2A0jNA-kFrZpSmNpdwJ1cxanFtT4uai2MvA2rqBWvl2v8CnFDTkLm8yVFb8EqG42uDUlrCr0ZgiSuvu2Kp9IH7M8dLhtaJhAORXI8ilE4al7Yw-BSVW8bzP7-kCeZd3lurc_ibuxgXBy09skWx-5Auris6kNy6jQur6Q9AHUDcLls6RNoK_0koJHbak1813tR8sYE6V_6G0eRq0YDL6aOdnYD0PiKEQvqzlFbn-EQjgpByxgmqSiZH2vyT9n71shErLDDpHRRLmoUwQzg8M-O0hc66PO7rkgwoooLwpjzB6I8D7FZqqxrQdSN_idcnxJpIdeIPbl5n4VjFwcq9N4807mZgWnbxtSCv_sw%3D%3D)

I know that you don’t need another greedy, self-serving, politician in Washington who tosses out you and your family’s needs when times get rough. _There are plenty of people like that in the Senate already._

What you do need is someone that is going to fight for neighbors, teachers, police officers, firefighters, farmers, parents; the very people that make our nation so great.

[**I have always felt a calling to give back and serve my country.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=52745281c8c641eb9bb3fcd973643761&_e=7elQa5dBVIlYlo-fNi9yvlIw5divRGBSPX-f0Nu3twAk4sBKTevNZarOLLVmjf_GsZDPZ26TBJ9UgA6xkedxZeO75czGmf1qANKIj3nSfmpsypzOE2A0jNA-kFrZpSmNpdwJ1cxanFtT4uai2MvA2rqBWvl2v8CnFDTkLm8yVFb8EqG42uDUlrCr0ZgiSuvu2Kp9IH7M8dLhtaJhAORXI8ilE4al7Yw-BSVW8bzP7-mc85K23YuTPOOBERB5paV0ijGIqgJi5ucgO0QZe2qYGIEoj4NIl8tQLr5gVwhwUF-BzX3z6WAZvY5lpiPHrGwsXCCEG2CaPgrEu0Hd-nDJh2-7JIrsq6CnfsjstO1UOnZw19TdkcDROE4ZTILKxptO1PtWWdBT9GLHgeP4mi-HxPm8pcOeAqlOEqSYdiVjcIaLr6c4n9N4_mrMJzY5uszROr5idhcTiF2GnZOs4iHrbw%3D%3D)

If you agree that America needs a fighter, someone who’s not afraid to stand up to the radical ideals that are plaguing this country, [**then I need you to join my team. Every single dollar my campaign raises is a dollar put towards a better future for this country.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=52745281c8c641eb9bb3fcd973643761&_e=7elQa5dBVIlYlo-fNi9yvlIw5divRGBSPX-f0Nu3twAk4sBKTevNZarOLLVmjf_GsZDPZ26TBJ9UgA6xkedxZeO75czGmf1qANKIj3nSfmpsypzOE2A0jNA-kFrZpSmNpdwJ1cxanFtT4uai2MvA2rqBWvl2v8CnFDTkLm8yVFb8EqG42uDUlrCr0ZgiSuvu2Kp9IH7M8dLhtaJhAORXI8ilE4al7Yw-BSVW8bzP7-kzW5DIq67S3dsbXZygpDAvyoopNjNj3L0BvnEPWHOCdKiyAJhQPXetW1h-aiVJYfy_yYE3v1a-lcci8ySrigroB9FJu0UQ4qZdwAucncon6Y6Cw2l-itAiGtnCsIKcsIFIE3AQ4rFizX0BvJNqWms2_sS-TnxhDLk4t_GSkfHu_HpelLMZRTFUVdSEVb0YgSuIk6Cdv81P08-Co0KcXEDPWINNksj8tUN9vUVSlII9Rg%3D%3D)

So, when people ask me why I’m running for Senate, I will tell them: it’s because I have a responsibility to this country --_a country that granted me the opportunity to have everything I could ever dream of_ -- and it is my greatest honor, and responsibility to ensure everyone has that same opportunity here in America.

I’m running because the current 'leaders' have sold out freedom for their own political gains.

I’m running because at the end of the day, someone must stand up and fight for this country that we love so much. [**I hope I can count on your support.**](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=52745281c8c641eb9bb3fcd973643761&_e=7elQa5dBVIlYlo-fNi9yvlIw5divRGBSPX-f0Nu3twAk4sBKTevNZarOLLVmjf_GsZDPZ26TBJ9UgA6xkedxZeO75czGmf1qANKIj3nSfmpsypzOE2A0jNA-kFrZpSmNpdwJ1cxanFtT4uai2MvA2rqBWvl2v8CnFDTkLm8yVFb8EqG42uDUlrCr0ZgiSuvu2Kp9IH7M8dLhtaJhAORXI8ilE4al7Yw-BSVW8bzP7-nj_UOn8iDqbg9TviiTkbeMIeLcu9h3K-1ABDAtjE6hRBA534_UkG_7aNsGD4hdHt33PcH_haSXBWueVCRHDIFxKSyymHwvf3DNQiBR3FIzDoTFxe-muDz7NxWsSugFZM3y-0N3mmg6tlCnmVmE59OayAeY0F2Du1oHdvCOXQ4OaOHAEYkFyLRNZu4hShMV2ny6xvV-OBnqCHJJFR33gwyHj7CkzdP-LRAjm-fbEL-MFg%3D%3D)

---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43255642/336402211/-1658601434?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQ5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODgzZjg0MS0xM2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W7QqGvgP183PPrHJ1XXncBtoI-qhmERTY6b4je9KYc4=&emci=f7511868-0895-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6883f841-13aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8410825)

Friend,

Angela started this campaign just about two months ago out of a fierce commitment to bringing the issues, concerns, and struggles of everyday people to Washington.

We'd like to talk about a few of those issues because right now, times are tough for _so many_ Maryland families. After two years of a raging pandemic, the cost of living is skyrocketing, and schools are severely understaffed – impacting the quality of education and the wellbeing of students _and_ educators. If that wasn’t bad enough, uncertainty around COVID continues to traumatize our communities.

Even _before_ the pandemic, the exorbitant costs of health care, childcare, housing, and education were at a breaking point. We need leaders in Congress who understand these challenges and aren't afraid to fight as hard for _all_ families as they do for their own.

**Angela is exactly that kind of leader.** As a working mom of 5 kids in public school, she understands the immense anxiety around having kids back to in-person learning during a pandemic. She knows the challenges of balancing school and work schedules and how important universal pre-K and affordable childcare are to getting families ahead.

**She not only understands these issues, but she will fight for them in Congress with the conviction and resolve required to get things done.**

**[We need leaders in Washington who understand and care. body:

---
Friend,
---
This could financially RUIN me...
---
**_...A New York Supreme Court justice is now letting a $2.7 _BILLION_ defamation lawsuit proceed against me, Fox News, Lou Dobbs, Maria Bartiromo, among others. _**
---
Would you be shocked to hear that the judge is a Democrat who got elected in 2020?
---
_With my back to the wall, I have nowhere else to turn but you_. The Left is trying to DROWN me in an avalanche of legal battles, and this $2.7 BILLION fight could finally do me in.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue to relentlessly FIGHT for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn9uor8ofvcnvd6ch32n8fsfk61stk23oariedso_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjjmaor4c5h2bs)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqja42n4i3s4e57ug747v8cg99jbvghhjr62akg8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjjmaor4c5h2bs)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3lflgakb8r2tted82pj2o155tt5k47pl7j7maco_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjjmaor4c5h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z660sp4fkqeo5rj047ssoqhocmeene26cl1oh8go_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjjmaor4c5h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zapu5vils6mn1vjlj68i0o4bh21gspqns9nt5js0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjjmaor4c5h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp2q8v2nv47ub0fq9a99qf4f9jjnuk9ml1e8if40_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjjmaor4c5h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj4tfpedq5e6kk6jhuadkb3r8r6usb5gkp15u6g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjjmaor4c5h2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsfge7diin9lb5t61nfv1v1mscrlbnmcocmvcbb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjjmaor4c5h2bs)**
---
---
This $2.7 BILLION lawsuit alleges that I spread “disinformation” about the 2020 election.
---
Let’s take a moment to talk a little bit about accusations of “disinformation.”
---
**...In 2020, just weeks before the election, I was accused of spreading “disinformation” when I warned the public about the contents of Hunter Biden’s laptop.**
---
**In fact, Hunter’s laptop was called “ _Russian_ disinformation!” **
---
But NOW, even the liberal _New York Times_ is admitting that the emails on the laptop were _not_ Russian propaganda, but were indeed **_AUTHENTIC:_**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zibd9n28v6ab3epiicpkbtbudb0745amoeju1elo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjjmaor4c5h2bs)
---
**Will I get an apology for being accused of spreading Putin propaganda?**
---
_Of course not._
---
But the Deep State and their patsies in the media don’t care about truth and integrity.
---
**They only care about ruining their political opponents like me.**
---
_And there’s no doubt about it: if I lose this $2.7 BILLION lawsuit, I will be _ruined_. _
---
**But I’m not afraid.**
---
Thanks to the generosity of patriots like you, I’ve overcome every single thing the Deep State has thrown at me.
---
Almost exactly one year ago, 7 FBI agents banged on my door at 6:00 in the morning and raided my apartment.
---
**And despite the ongoing attacks and harassment I’ve been subjected to, our opponents have not been able to find a SINGLE crime to charge me with.**

clean_body: This would RUIN me. This would RUIN me. | Friend, This could financially RUIN me... ...A New York Supreme Court justice is now letting a $2.7 BILLION defamation lawsuit proceed against me, Fox News, Lou Dobbs, Maria Bartiromo, among others. Would you be shocked to hear that the judge is a Democrat who got elected in 2020? With my back to the wall, I have nowhere else to turn but you. The Left is trying to DROWN me in an avalanche of legal battles, and this $2.7 BILLION fight could finally do me in. This $2.7 BILLION lawsuit alleges that I spread “disinformation” about the 2020 election. Let’s take a moment to talk a little bit about accusations of “disinformation.” ...In 2020, just weeks before the election, I was accused of spreading “disinformation” when I warned the public about the contents of Hunter Biden’s laptop. In fact, Hunter’s laptop was called “ Russian disinformation!” But NOW, even the liberal New York Times is admitting that the emails on the laptop were not Russian propaganda, but were indeed AUTHENTIC: Will I get an apology for being accused of spreading Putin propaganda? Of course not. But the Deep State and their patsies in the media don’t care about truth and integrity. They only care about ruining their political opponents like me. And there’s no doubt about it: if I lose this $2.7 BILLION lawsuit, I will be ruined. But I’m not afraid. Thanks to the generosity of patriots like you, I’ve overcome every single thing the Deep State has thrown at me. Almost exactly one year ago, 7 FBI agents banged on my door at 6:00 in the morning and raided my apartment. And despite the ongoing attacks and harassment I’ve been subjected to, our opponents have not been able to find a SINGLE crime to charge me with. Their only hope is to drag me through a never-ending series of costly lawsuits until I can no longer pay the legal bills and I’m forced to surrender. ...And a $2.7 BILLION fight could finally do it. | | | Dear Peter,

Joe Biden has been a complete disaster for America. Thanks to Biden, our southern border is still wide open, we have skyrocketing inflation, and gas prices have reached an all-time high.

_Biden’s failure is going unnoticed by the Democrats because they don’t truly care about our country or you_.

**Hardworking, taxpaying Americans nationwide are being FORCED to pay for the consequences of Biden and the Democrats’ awful leadership**.

Our country is being destroyed right before our eyes. We need to take a stand. I am running for reelection so I can continue calling out Biden, Pelosi, and AOC on their dangerous policies.

[Support me in my fight so we can get this country back on track](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=e1eb408f0f&e=645b3b1338)!

The mainstream media is not doing enough to keep Biden accountable for this. It is clear how disastrous his presidency has been for our nation. Gas prices are higher than they were in 2008! Our inflation is out of control and way higher than it was during the 2008 financial crisis!

The Biden administration, working with Nancy Pelosi and the Democrat establishment are making Americans suffer every single day. They NEED to be kept accountable for this. [A donation to my campaign will ensure I can remain in Congress and keep fighting for you](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=179a47502b&e=645b3b1338).

America cannot survive if these Democrats keep up their work. If I remain in Congress, I can create an army of powerful, fearless Republicans to STOP Biden in his tracks. [The time for change is right now! Support me by donating TODAY](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=431d354203&e=645b3b1338)!

name: Owen Elrifi
subject: Barnstorm? What's a barnstorm?
body:
Barnstorms are an event pioneered by Bernie Sanders’ 2016 Presidential campaign and used in other major progressive campaign's like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez's. | | | Hi Friend, Over the next few months, Matt and Cynthia plan to travel across the state hosting barnstorms, listening to the issues that matter to people, sharing their vision for the state, and talking about how folks can help us build a movement for a government that works for all of us.
At this point, you’re probably wondering: what's a barnstorm? Barnstorms are an event pioneered by Bernie Sanders’ 2016 Presidential campaign and used in other major progressive campaign's like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez's. Barnstorms are a hybrid event between a town hall, a rally, and an organizing event. Matt and Cynthia will share about the campaign, answer questions, and will talk about how you can get involved in the campaign. I’ll be sure to send you an email if we’ve got a barnstorm near you, but in the meantime there's a lot we need to do in order to get this organizing started. We have to pay for venues, campaign materials, and tools to reach voters and invite them to these events. clean_body: Barnstorms are an event pioneered by Bernie Sanders’ 2016 Presidential campaign and used in other major progressive campaign's like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez's. | | | Hi Friend, Over the next few months, Matt and Cynthia plan to travel across the state hosting barnstorms, listening to the issues that matter to people, sharing their vision for the state, and talking about how folks can help us build a movement for a government that works for all of us. At this point, you’re probably wondering: what's a barnstorm? Barnstorms are an event pioneered by Bernie Sanders’ 2016 Presidential campaign and used in other major progressive campaign's like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez's. Barnstorms are a hybrid event between a town hall, a rally, and an organizing event. Matt and Cynthia will share about the campaign, answer questions, and will talk about how you can get involved in the campaign. I’ll be sure to send you an email if we’ve got a barnstorm near you, but in the meantime there's a lot we need to do in order to get this organizing started. We have to pay for venues, campaign materials, and tools to reach voters and invite them to these events. You already know that we’re up against candidates who aren’t shy about taking money from big corporate PACs. That’s not us – we need money to start organizing now so we can have hundreds of volunteers knocking on doors this summer and fall.**** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thanks so much. Solidarity, Owen | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Matt and Cynthia for RI, please .

name: Christina Sofia-Comer
subject: ICYMI: The Nonsense State Helps No One
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
Dear ,
I wanted to make sure you saw this email from Rob Astorino.
Please consider joining Rob's team today and contributing to his efforts to become Governor of New York.
Thank you,
Christina Sofia-Comer Finance Director
---
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,
March 16, 2022
John,
New York can give away $2.1 billion in cash to illegal immigrants, but it can't fix a damn pothole.
It can release Marxist cop killers from life sentences, but it can't protect subway riders from violent lunatics.
It taxes more than any state in the nation, but rubs nickels together when it comes to charter schools that actually move people out of poverty.
Say anything about these issues and the Democrats call you xenophobic, racist, or reactionary -- while their policies hold us back and even get people killed.
It's maddening.
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W8vsKn_PQ0LmtwmWrQCJ4_UjymlvqbHBP3rUBL_P6FTd0SK_VPojBjNoVtrNel3LL79Ob4DZ-TyeAPrYO8CRhLqKyPzLaXpk0u8mFrVS1WPJp4VbZZ7YxarWphzh5dcxl6o2dcdTd7Wq6zSKT6FjghfBWT-QgLxyaz8i6qUqJH6YImWKr6n_8GI4_WClmAef&c=xq4q7dsJOqSUHJOnhkbJckvrEFLQMHriwjx-K61mMdvE_JoqnG2Pmw==&ch=zzyZol1_9orw5ApGibwP-zEqqQtd7JoxjKIVHCwJQ-BrGW_wb8kZDg==)
---
| If you feel the way I do -- you've had it with Albany's hypocrisy, corruption, and stupidity -- I'm your candidate for governor. I have a clear mind and a big heart, but no stomach for nonsense, and that's what New York has become: The Nonsense State.
The establishment GOP's anointed candidate for governor, Lee Zeldin, was part of the problem in Albany. I like him, he's a nice man, but when he was in the State Senate he was just another reliable RINO for Governor Andrew Cuomo and the Democrats. In fact, he voted more with Governor Cuomo in Albany than he did with President Trump in Washington!
I will govern New York as a true conservative reformer, as I did in Westchester, because conservative reforms are compassionate reforms. They're what the little guy needs -- tax cuts, strong policing, small business relief, parental input in schools -- and yes -- roads that don't swallow cars. During my 8 years as county executive, I cut property taxes (never once raised them), maintained a flat budget, helped create over 44,000 jobs, invested in our infrastructure, and kept crime low.
With what we pay, New York should be the best run state in the country. It should have the best schools, superb infrastructure, the safest streets, and the best public services. The fact that it doesn't tells us that something is seriously wrong.
Republicans and conservatives have waited years for a real opportunity to take back the Governor's Mansion. This is that year. We cannot blow it.
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W8vsKn_PQ0LmtwmWrQCJ4_UjymlvqbHBP3rUBL_P6FTd0SK_VPojBjNoVtrNel3LL79Ob4DZ-TyeAPrYO8CRhLqKyPzLaXpk0u8mFrVS1WPJp4VbZZ7YxarWphzh5dcxl6o2dcdTd7Wq6zSKT6FjghfBWT-QgLxyaz8i6qUqJH6YImWKr6n_8GI4_WClmAef&c=xq4q7dsJOqSUHJOnhkbJckvrEFLQMHriwjx-K61mMdvE_JoqnG2Pmw==&ch=zzyZol1_9orw5ApGibwP-zEqqQtd7JoxjKIVHCwJQ-BrGW_wb8kZDg==)
---
| Please support the real conservative candidate for governor by chipping into my campaign today. [Whatever you can afford will be appreciated, be it $25, $250, $2,500 or more.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W8vsKn_PQ0LmtwmWrQCJ4_UjymlvqbHBP3rUBL_P6FTd0SK_VPojBjNoVtrNel3LL79Ob4DZ-TyeAPrYO8CRhLqKyPzLaXpk0u8mFrVS1WPJp4VbZZ7YxarWphzh5dcxl6o2dcdTd7Wq6zSKT6FjghfBWT-QgLxyaz8i6qUqJH6YImWKr6n_8GI4_WClmAef&c=xq4q7dsJOqSUHJOnhkbJckvrEFLQMHriwjx-K61mMdvE_JoqnG2Pmw==&ch=zzyZol1_9orw5ApGibwP-zEqqQtd7JoxjKIVHCwJQ-BrGW_wb8kZDg==) It will help me communicate my vision for a better, smarter, more streamlined state with voters in each of New York's 62 counties.
You and I are conservative because we believe in the power and primacy of the individual. We understand that people and families -- not government bureaucrats -- know what's best for them. The job of government is to maintain a stable, safe environment so we can thrive. That's my vision for New York.
God bless you for keeping the faith in this brutally "woke" environment. It's we who are the compassionate ones; we are the ones who know how to make this state livable again for 20 million New Yorkers.
I am so grateful for your generosity and friendship. It means the world to me.
Help is on the way!
---
|
---
| Rob Astorino Former Westchester County Executive Republican Candidate for Governor
---
| | | [JOIN THE TEAM TODAY](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W8vsKn_PQ0LmtwmWrQCJ4_UjymlvqbHBP3rUBL_P6FTd0SK_VPojBjNoVtrNel3LL79Ob4DZ-TyeAPrYO8CRhLqKyPzLaXpk0u8mFrVS1WPJp4VbZZ7YxarWphzh5dcxl6o2dcdTd7Wq6zSKT6FjghfBWT-QgLxyaz8i6qUqJH6YImWKr6n_8GI4_WClmAef&c=xq4q7dsJOqSUHJOnhkbJckvrEFLQMHriwjx-K61mMdvE_JoqnG2Pmw==&ch=zzyZol1_9orw5ApGibwP-zEqqQtd7JoxjKIVHCwJQ-BrGW_wb8kZDg==)
---
| | | [To donate by mail please click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001W8vsKn_PQ0LmtwmWrQCJ4_UjymlvqbHBP3rUBL_P6FTd0SK_VPojBjNoVtrNel3LK9kOUN2ZqWzImmznzr1GsrMZ9NmyUvFe9yrHssef5vNi4kvhaDbykOiCmke_W12FGFptwoxeRcCzLjoejCFyon5t6MVW12oW0Q6-j73oNgVUvuar_oFcnnV2Ss4rlEnIS9nScT1zIvLST-qboJPjgSpGKmBL6RNLt3DZMEpeT9c4U0I9e_uQbg==&c=xq4q7dsJOqSUHJOnhkbJckvrEFLQMHriwjx-K61mMdvE_JoqnG2Pmw==&ch=zzyZol1_9orw5ApGibwP-zEqqQtd7JoxjKIVHCwJQ-BrGW_wb8kZDg==)
---

# **Friend — You’ve probably seen my name on the pump at your local Georgia gas station. **

---
As Agriculture Commissioner, one of my jobs has been to make sure you get what you pay for and that your fuel is safe. **But thanks to Joe Biden and Raphael Warnock, the cost of gas is out of control. I saw it when I filled up this week, and I’m sure you have to. ** [**When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll make energy independence a top priority. SIGN your name to stand with me here.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e1b177e71e4c29ec/149a47b676dadc4fc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
---
Biden has assaulted American energy production, and Warnock has enabled him every step of the way. Let’s get the Keystone pipeline open. Let’s start new drilling on federal lands. And let’s stop depending on foreign dictators for oil. **Will you stand with me in this effort?[Hope you’ll SIGN our petition for energy independence NOW.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e1b177e71e4c29ec/c1226ece871e2dd3c3d6b838967d376c/37793)**

---
Gary Black
---
[**MAKE AMERICA ENERGY INDEPENDENT »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e1b177e71e4c29ec/248a9a2a4cb7fa40c3d6b838967d376c/37793)

---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.

[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/e1b177e71e4c29ec/372239562e253a4dc3d6b838967d376c/37793)

name: Alvin Williams
subject: Will YOU stand with Capt. Wesley Hunt?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC Action Fund
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0203&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0203&n=1)
---
| Dear Peter, Fed up with corrupt, career politicians in Washington selling out our values and America's future for their own selfish gain... ...a Black conservative Army veteran (and rising star) from Texas is taking matters into his own hands by running for Congress. This American hero is fighting to retake a critical U.S. House seat seized by Democrats last election... | [](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0203&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0203&n=2)
---
**...but he needs patriotic conservatives like you and me to have his back.**
I'm hoping you'll join me in endorsing Wesley Hunt for U.S. House this election...
...but first let me explain why Democrats are so afraid of Captain Wesley Hunt.
As you know, Peter, the Democrats are gearing up to seize power in Washington this election so they can transform the _"Land of the Free"_ into a **socialist nightmare**...
...but their hostile takeover of America hinges entirely on their ability to **scare** Black voters into supporting Democrats with the vicious **LIE** that all conservatives _like you and me_ are all **racists**.
That's why they bombard Black voters with the "Republicans are racist" LIE, stoke the flames of racism and hatred in America, and viciously attack anyone who dares to challenge their empire of lies.
# But Democrats are freaking out...
...now that Wesley Hunt has WON the Republican Primary and is officially the GOP Nominee.
Because if there's anything Democrats fear more than a Black conservative exposing the truth about the Liberal LIES to Black voters...
...it's an intelligent, successful, fearless, Black, conservative, American hero like **Capt. Wesley Hunt** leading the fight to reclaim Black voters from the Democrat Party.
[](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0203&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0203&n=3)
---
##### Capt. Wesley Hunt
West Point graduate, Apache helicopter pilot, and lifelong conservative with 3 graduate degrees (MBA, MPA and MILR) from Cornell University.
**Peter, the Democrats are terrified of Wesley Hunt because recent polling shows he has a REALLY good shot at plucking this crucial U.S. House seat right out of Nancy Pelosi's hands.**
**Just look at how he plowed through his competition in the Republican primary...**
[](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0203&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0203&n=4)
---
And right now, his Democrat opponents are locked in a runoff, which means Hunt will have more time to reach voters while the Democrats rip into each other.
As a U.S. Congressman, Hunt would have a national stage to speak the truth to millions of Black voters across the country - _which he'll use to:_
* **EXPOSE** the Liberal Lies to the entire nation
* **RECLAIM** Black voters to the Republican Party
* **END** the Democrats' death-grip on the Black Community

Peter, the Democrats will do anything - anything - to keep their stranglehold on Black voters because...
**...they know that if they lose _just 12%_ of the Black vote nationwide, it'll be mathematically impossible for them to ever win another election.**
# That's why Democrats are so terrified of Wesley Hunt and will stop at nothing to destroy him!
That's why I really need to know, Peter...
| [Will you endorse Wesley Hunt for Congress today?](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0203&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0203&n=5)
---
Once I receive your endorsement, I'll send it directly to Wesley so he'll know he has the full support of patriotic conservatives like you.
**[Along with your endorsement, I pray you'll also make an urgent donation of $20.22, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000 or more to help Wesley FIGHT BACK against the Democrats' vicious attacks!](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0203&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0203&n=6)**
Your endorsement and financial support are crucial to:
* Recruit more conservatives like you to endorse Wesley Hunt
* Run advertising campaigns in Texas up through Election Day
* Propel Wesley to victory in this crucial U.S. House race

With Democrats funneling tens of millions of dollars into an all-out assault on this American hero...
**...it's up to patriots like you and me to help Wesley Hunt FIGHT BACK.**
**[So please sign your personal endorsement to Wesley Hunt today...](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0203&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0203&n=7)**
**[...and make an urgent donation of $20.22, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000 or more to beat back the Democrats' attacks and propel Wesley Hunt to victory!](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0203&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0203&n=8)**
**[Or if that's more than you can afford right now, then please give $15, $10, or even $5 as a symbol of your support.](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0203&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0203&n=9)**
**[Thank you, Peter, and God Bless.](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0203&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0203&n=10)**
| [](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0203&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0203&n=11)
---
_For America,_ |
---
**Alvin Williams**
President & CEO
BAMPAC, BAMPAC Action Fund
[DONATE](https://www.bampac.org/endorsewesleyhunt?info=2022EA0203&recruiter_id=62273&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0203&n=12)
---
---

---
You're receiving this email because you've been critical to our mission of reclaiming Black voters, destroying the Liberal Lies, and supporting Black conservative candidates like John James, Tim Scott, and Burgess Owens. If you're giving up on this critical fight, then please [click here](https://www.bampac.org/unsubscribe?e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022ea0203&n=13) to stop receiving emails.

name: Aadland For Congress
subject: Important Press Release from Erik Aadland Campaign
body:
A lawsuit is coming
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wx7Nn9V0Yb9FmrErcxx2fhZ-OzLWnwV70ZZPGUs9qHnzl6VZRTYTV8304yPIIaU2Zy_ZGz1EVfxCitSY1xA26_9xZ9DiS7qdwCClAzWI0y5CCCkyzZfE2bVBMLGiyG8S9ESh3784eOrCbOL7ZJwIXYD9UjNhVfwdqSnsaK5ND2wRFV5llISH4js7CLfr9OmttE-aqQLtYdv9qjlLSQXQaA==&c=EfFBA2z0sbBdJ80ufgpNBK-Gq-oc-A-OlOUjirbHzDToiH8nwNruZw==&ch=o6G5wGPYPcxw5PFOtOSWr6XMQNwbarbFU7FKhUOMPIwhvANaCqHrTQ==)
---
|
# Press release from the Erik Aadland Campaign
---
| (Mar 22, 2022) Republican candidate for Congress Erik Aadland, a two-time Bronze Star (one for valor) winning combat veteran and former energy sector executive who is running in District 7, is suing the Colorado Secretary of State for erroneously invalidating his petitions. For the benefit of all candidates, Aadland is challenging the Statement of Insufficiency issued by the Secretary of State finding that Aadland did not have enough signatures for placement on the June 28, 2022, primary ballot for Republican Party nominee for Colorado Congressional District 7. "The Secretary of State, well-known for being a partisan hack, has thrown out hundreds of my petition signatures (over 26%) unjustly and without merit. These signatures were all professionally verified to be registered Republicans living in District 7. Unfortunately, it seems Secretary Griswold has once again put her finger on the scale assuming candidates will not have the means to launch a costly and time-intensive lawsuit," states Aadland. "It appears that she has abused her powers to unduly prevent me from being on the ballot. Not only does this smell of corruption, but it is a dangerous precedent that can affect the outcome of our elections," states Aadland. "I am launching this lawsuit on behalf of all candidates regardless of party because ballot access and election integrity are fundamental to our democratic process and the workings of a free country." Irrespective of the outcome of this litigation, Aadland will stay the course and participate in the Congressional District 7 Assembly where he has every confidence that delegates will recognize that he is the best candidate to win this Congressional seat. "I am proud to be participating in the CD7 assembly, a time-honored process, where I will seek the support of those most invested in this grassroots process, and who are rising to the occasion to select the best candidates to serve the United States and Colorado in this time of great crisis. This is my first step to stand against corruption and abuse of powers." says Aadland.
---
|
---
|
### About Erik Aadland:
Pine, CO-resident Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor-- from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---

clean_body: A lawsuit is coming | | | | == | Press release from the Erik Aadland Campaign | (Mar 22, 2022) Republican candidate for Congress Erik Aadland, a two-time Bronze Star (one for valor) winning combat veteran and former energy sector executive who is running in District 7, is suing the Colorado Secretary of State for erroneously invalidating his petitions. For the benefit of all candidates, Aadland is challenging the Statement of Insufficiency issued by the Secretary of State finding that Aadland did not have enough signatures for placement on the June 28, 2022, primary ballot for Republican Party nominee for Colorado Congressional District 7. "The Secretary of State, well-known for being a partisan hack, has thrown out hundreds of my petition signatures (over 26%) unjustly and without merit. These signatures were all professionally verified to be registered Republicans living in District 7. Unfortunately, it seems Secretary Griswold has once again put her finger on the scale assuming candidates will not have the means to launch a costly and time-intensive lawsuit," states Aadland. "It appears that she has abused her powers to unduly prevent me from being on the ballot. Not only does this smell of corruption, but it is a dangerous precedent that can affect the outcome of our elections," states Aadland. "I am launching this lawsuit on behalf of all candidates regardless of party because ballot access and election integrity are fundamental to our democratic process and the workings of a free country." Irrespective of the outcome of this litigation, Aadland will stay the course and participate in the Congressional District 7 Assembly where he has every confidence that delegates will recognize that he is the best candidate to win this Congressional seat. "I am proud to be participating in the CD7 assembly, a time-honored process, where I will seek the support of those most invested in this grassroots process, and who are rising to the occasion to select the best candidates to serve the United States and Colorado in this time of great crisis. This is my first step to stand against corruption and abuse of powers." says Aadland. | | About Erik Aadland: Pine, CO-resident Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor-- from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children. | | | For information about area coordinator opportunities, please contact mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com. | | | | | | | == | | | PO Box 630552 Littleton, co 80163 | == == == | | | | | | | Aadland For Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | | Sent by mailto:info@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with |

name: Charles Booker
subject: We deserve to be seen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, I sometimes
get the question: “Why are you running?”

I am running for the parent paying the rent with the light bill money.

The miner battling Black Lung Disease. The kid on the wrong side of town,
fighting to survive.

I am running for the forgotten people. I am running for you.

Because you and I, we deserve representation that works for us, not just
for corporations and the wealthy. We deserve leadership who sees us and
tells us that we deserve to feel safe, be cared for, and lead a dignified
life.

Something has to change,
Peter. And that’s exactly why I’m
running for Senate. I know that together, we have the power to change the
future of Kentucky. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220322?refcode=em20220322-1677&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1677_346206_vTHska&akid=1677%2E346206%2EvTHska ]If you’re with me — if you’re with us — please chip
in $5 to our campaign today.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220322?refcode=em20220322-1677&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&refcode2=1677_346206_vTHska&akid=1677%2E346206%2EvTHska ]DONATE NOW →

Rand has remained in power for over a decade, thanks to his rich friends
and big industry executives who cut him hundreds of thousands of dollars
in checks — all while neglecting his duty to legislate for the people who
elected him.

But Rand knows that most Kentuckians aren’t happy with his work, so he’s
worked very hard to disenfranchise our votes and suppress our voices. And
Peter, you can
bet that he’ll try to buy his way into another six years of power this
time around.

That means if we want to replace Rand Paul, we need to build a widespread,
diverse grassroots coalition of voters. We need to organize in every
corner of Kentucky and center our conversations around the challenges too
many families in Kentucky face right now. That’s who I’m running for — and
why.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220322?refcode=em20220322-1677&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1677_346206_vTHska&akid=1677%2E346206%2EvTHska ]Together, we have the power this election to replace Rand Paul and
make history here in Kentucky. But I need your support to make this future
possible.

It’s going to take a powerful, grassroots funded movement to organize and
mobilize enough folks to take back our power. If you can today, please
consider chipping in $5 or anything you can to our
campaign:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220322?refcode=em20220322-1677&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1677_346206_vTHska&akid=1677%2E346206%2EvTHska ]DONATE NOW →

Together,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220322-1677-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1677_346206_vTHska&akid=1677%2E346206%2EvTHska

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1677%2E346206%2EvTHska

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: tough times
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
When I think about the toughest times in my life, I am thankful I’ve always had a support system around to help me through.
#

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220322-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2407_6688874_AJWgJU&akid=2407%2E6688874%2EAJWgJU)

_Gabby and me during her recovery_
Friends —
When I think about the toughest times in my life, I’m thankful I’ve always had a support system around me to help me through.
Being raised by two working parents who sometimes struggled to make ends meet wasn’t always easy.
Flying combat missions in Desert Storm wasn’t easy.
Watching Gabby recover in the days, weeks, and months after her shooting wasn’t easy.
Running for the U.S. Senate and having Donald Trump and National Republicans relentlessly attack me personally, that hasn’t been easy either.
But as a kid, I had my brother Scott.
In combat, I had my wingmen.
With Gabby, we had a whole country offering support.
And in these campaigns, I have you.
I could not do this without you. And while I know you haven’t made a donation to my campaign yet, there is no better time than right now as we’re approaching this FEC fundraising deadline.
[**Please, can you make a $3 contribution to my re-election campaign before our FEC fundraising deadline ends and we’re required to report our fundraising numbers for all to see?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?refcode=em220322-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2407_6688874_AJWgJU&akid=2407%2E6688874%2EAJWgJU)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-mar22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220322-1-7&t=21&refcode2=2407_6688874_AJWgJU&akid=2407%2E6688874%2EAJWgJU)**

clean_body: When I think about the toughest times in my life, I am thankful I’ve always had a support system around to help me through. Gabby and me during her recovery Friends — When I think about the toughest times in my life, I’m thankful I’ve always had a support system around me to help me through. Being raised by two working parents who sometimes struggled to make ends meet wasn’t always easy. Flying combat missions in Desert Storm wasn’t easy. Watching Gabby recover in the days, weeks, and months after her shooting wasn’t easy. Running for the U.S. Senate and having Donald Trump and National Republicans relentlessly attack me personally, that hasn’t been easy either. But as a kid, I had my brother Scott. In combat, I had my wingmen. With Gabby, we had a whole country offering support. And in these campaigns, I have you. I could not do this without you. And while I know you haven’t made a donation to my campaign yet, there is no better time than right now as we’re approaching this FEC fundraising deadline. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** I am so thankful for you. I wouldn’t have a chance if you were not in this fight with me. Mark Kelly Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Diehl challenges state lawmakers to forgo stipends and raises if they don't suspend the state gas tax
body:
| | | |
---
| DIEHL CHALLENGES STATE LAWMAKERS TO FORGO STIPENDS AND RAISES IF THEY DON'T SUSPEND THE STATE GAS TAX BOSTON, Mass. - Geoff Diehl, Republican candidate for Governor, issued a challenge to state legislative leaders today: if they are unwilling to suspend the state gas tax, then lawmakers should give up stipends they receive as part of their pay. "I think it's very simple," Diehl said. "Massachusetts residents are facing inflation rates of about 8 percent. That includes sky-high gas prices at the pump. They need a break. But, state legislative leaders have been unwilling to help them out. It's time to call out their hypocrisy and make them show whose side they're really on."
---
---
According to a recent Wall Street Journal poll, about half of people making less than $60,000 annually say they are feeling major economic pain due to inflation, while only about 13 percent of those making more than $150,000 a year said the same. "It's no wonder the Senate President and House Speaker, both of whom earn taxpayer-funded salaries of more than $175,000 a year, don't think it's important to suspend the gas tax," said Diehl. "They don't feel the sting. In fact, taxpayers fund their transportation costs through a pay stipend they and other legislators receive. I'm here to fight for the people of Massachusetts who are feeling pain at the pumps, the grocery store, and elsewhere due to higher prices." "The Senate President and House Speaker closed the Statehouse to the public for more than 700 days during the pandemic," Diehl continued. "During this time, many legislators weren't in the building. They weren't traveling into Boston for meetings with the public, because they couldn't meet in person. And yet, most continued to collect compensation stipends, in part to reimburse them for supposed costs of commuting into Boston from their home districts. Now, these same legislators are going to tell Massachusetts residents they're not going to use billions of dollars of excess revenue to give them a break at the gas pumps? That's outrageous!"
Diehl said he supports legislation (S.D. 3052) recently filed by State Senator Ryan Fattman and co-sponsored by many Republican colleagues in the House and Senate, that would suspend collection of the state gas tax through Labor Day. "If I were Governor, I would advocate for passage of this bill and sign it into law immediately," said Diehl. "And, if lawmakers refuse to pass it, I would call on them to forgo their stipend payments through the rest of this year, and refuse to accept any legislative pay raises. On behalf of the taxpayers of this state, I'm here to tell legislators that they can't keep having it both ways." Diehl has consistently called for suspension of the state gas tax in recent weeks. He is also widely credited with having led a 2014 ballot campaign to block automatic increases in the state gas tax tied to the rate of inflation.
---
| |
---

body:
if you like me, you’ll pay special attention to this email | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yMpviJTlcDW1hBGomgG04rsE9QtYk-9YwkQLqk3RrxroBRkeMHiZgZ8T7N6ds0QL2u6SG95VCOcH2DSLE78j2pPm86FFnqa2ud9VPnoPmhzWFcP2wCAbTmDAJlb6riwTfMH8Chx9GS--eBmZfmPYqofTzRiszuInRTNfYYxGnmnNtFEnkNyh7lJAh4uBbwEMxMcjbLBxBeXqMA_FOBB199rqK3G2OgQeMvhemkEPCGpyFveO9QQxI9SVM2tQbTaOeYD3XMBC40UcR-IpklBMea5-jLQg2S5IWF8PZLQiQwDwlrhdtnHU0p6wHJ3isbstq5Vo9mYUk9sDD1jsghpr2l/3kk/BZ8wR5GPSa-eD_3sFxFPGw/h0/nN5A3nHMQcw9PYZ8LA1BOEcA9PP1Bv8q_MaApjWzSaY) Friend,

here are some of my favorite pics of me and tom throughout the last two years:

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yMpviJTlcDW1hBGomgG04rsE9QtYk-9YwkQLqk3RrxroBRkeMHiZgZ8T7N6ds0QL3_HShgKljdlAm2iOjN7EzZkNGo0lK_05Z7LhY3b9PkTWBJQH2fu7G33WAhxBXF_RN1O6XGzj9gHlj0j7ZiPzfWVCiNp0QV6sVI5XvlbBYMdORwWns45tzudGo-3YVTSyZzgZsZ1pq_tslp3g7I7ytNbJwMjy7M8ERg09sqN9IUf-z1a9fOd7O8eY5eLbCv-ckZ4v5BJjiHqJnXg7V1TCSI-dgZ3czmdf5yvoZxJVjq1Z8yhoMyC32pqs_JgQFJHy1Axod58d55I7YzKIXokzVb/3kk/BZ8wR5GPSa-eD_3sFxFPGw/h1/amOBjXIq1SoXcd_Tdf0LOnbxFcBoMOHBX-Iy8OmUGlo)
anyway, i want to make my special day even more special by asking you, one of tom’s top supporters, to make a donation to his grassroots campaign... in honor of me, of course.

i made this special link for you to chip in (jk, obviously i didn’t make this link, i don’t have thumbs!)

_[**secure.actblue.com/garywinter**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yMpviJTlcDW1hBGomgG04rsE9QtYk-9YwkQLqk3RrxroBRkeMHiZgZ8T7N6ds0QL2-DQ6-F2o5uGiXNeYJqe0X8GQgfeT_h-dhOn1rMk13gduKxq5BM0VW5mjLtr9hegXGwt5HGs4GHkfZ0R_LzTe31Jelbal-5zfApo-7RcQKF5AqJB-xFnzGxNy3TwiWbRz40xfgAqq4veUhhgt7-iKKqRlqrOKLVcvicD-6iqz4uxZVFGSDjEmpc3KuURL0T98ocpN92tYeH0uC7V3N-EyeObtT0JqhpRFyGwcPrV_XDrwtgneaM_y4rkO0GJRYu_ZUmwcGBz6ms1uCFuzXAv70/3kk/BZ8wR5GPSa-eD_3sFxFPGw/h2/Ibqh_tbEC3GJCVA7D0m274jrrYoGzLmLHrl5SpRdnqY)_

but i have to tell you why my growls are particularly strong for ryan zinke. when he was a part of the tr*mp administration, he wanted to sell off federal public lands to the highest corporate bidder (aka getting rid of some of my fave places to frolic in montana and do cool dog stuff).

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: The conclusion of a 7 month journey
disclaimer_text: Paid for BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresshttps://elissaforcongress.com/ [https://elissaforcongress.com/]
Friend,
I wanted to send a note today to tell you the end of a story that began seven months ago.
Last August, my team and I – with the help of a group of veterans, former national security professionals, non-profit leaders, and brave folks on the ground – were able to evacuate 114 Afghans out of Kabul as Afghanistan fell.
This round-the-clock effort began when we learned of a group of Afghan nationals that had ties to Michigan State University. This group, as well as a group of former deputy ministers and staff of the former Afghan government, had worked for or with the United States – and were now in danger because of it.
It was a two week journey filled with many sleepless nights as we managed to transport this group successfully through Taliban checkpoints to the airport, and finally safely aboard flights to Albania. The Washington Post covered this journey in great detail, which you can read here. [https://elissaforcongress.com/wapo-afg/] Back in November, I was able to visit them in Albania with a bipartisan group of Senators and Representatives. The trip was without a doubt one of the most moving experiences of my career.
I am deeply thankful to Spirit of America – a non-profit organization that covered their expenses – and for the Albanian government, who welcomed these folks into their country (on extremely short notice), and worked with us to provide a safe waiting place until the next step of their journey.
And that next step is where we find ourselves today.
It took a lot of lobbying from me and a bipartisan group of legislators – but we were able to help get this group through all necessary vetting procedures and earlier today, I greeted them at the airport as they took their first steps into the United States. In this line of work, it’s not every day you get to see the tangible results of government when it works.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87595/images/DSC02946.png][https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87595/images/DSC02925.png]
In a career filled with working in war zones, this seven-month journey is one of the things I’m most proud of. When I visited in November, the Afghans had one ask of me: not to forget them. In each of their faces, I saw my grandparents and great-grandparents who also made the terrifying journey from everything they had ever known for a better life in the United States. I’m humbled I was able to witness these Afghans' first steps into a country that has given me so much. Forgetting them is impossible.
Thank you for reading,
Elissa

[https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/-/spacer.gif]
Paid for BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
Elissa Slotkin for Congress
PO Box 244
Holly, MI 48442

clean_body: Elissa Slotkin for Congress [] Friend, I wanted to send a note today to tell you the end of a story that began seven months ago. Last August, my team and I – with the help of a group of veterans, former national security professionals, non-profit leaders, and brave folks on the ground – were able to evacuate 114 Afghans out of Kabul as Afghanistan fell. This round-the-clock effort began when we learned of a group of Afghan nationals that had ties to Michigan State University. This group, as well as a group of former deputy ministers and staff of the former Afghan government, had worked for or with the United States – and were now in danger because of it. It was a two week journey filled with many sleepless nights as we managed to transport this group successfully through Taliban checkpoints to the airport, and finally safely aboard flights to Albania. The Washington Post covered this journey in great detail, which you can read here. [] Back in November, I was able to visit them in Albania with a bipartisan group of Senators and Representatives. The trip was without a doubt one of the most moving experiences of my career. I am deeply thankful to Spirit of America – a non-profit organization that covered their expenses – and for the Albanian government, who welcomed these folks into their country (on extremely short notice), and worked with us to provide a safe waiting place until the next step of their journey. And that next step is where we find ourselves today. It took a lot of lobbying from me and a bipartisan group of legislators – but we were able to help get this group through all necessary vetting procedures and earlier today, I greeted them at the airport as they took their first steps into the United States. In this line of work, it’s not every day you get to see the tangible results of government when it works. [] In a career filled with working in war zones, this seven-month journey is one of the things I’m most proud of. When I visited in November, the Afghans had one ask of me: not to forget them. In each of their faces, I saw my grandparents and great-grandparents who also made the terrifying journey from everything they had ever known for a better life in the United States. I’m humbled I was able to witness these Afghans' first steps into a country that has given me so much. Forgetting them is impossible. Thank you for reading, Elissa [] Paid for BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS Elissa Slotkin for Congress PO Box 244 Holly, MI 48442 United States Click here [] to receive fewer emails

Peter,

During her time in the Ohio State House, Emilia has been a relentless fighter for voting rights in Ohio. Whether calling out unjust voter suppression bills or organizing platforms for people across the state to raise their voice, she has never been afraid to speak up for Ohioans’ constitutional right to vote.

[**Now, she’s asking you to stand with her as she continues her fight to protect voting rights on the federal level. Will you join her by calling on Congress to protect voting rights and adding your name below?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43257386/336411820/-2140240920?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDM3MDc3MS0xYmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pH6fQe065O9fYf0-L4Tp7aolKDmKlDlr_Jy0nnHIWAM=&emci=d1ccb2a0-0baa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f0370771-1baa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11703046)

The GOP has executed the same voter suppression efforts for years now, so we know exactly what to expect as we get closer to Election Day. Republicans have released a wave of policies that make it harder to access the ballot, such as restrictive voter ID laws, slashing access to early voting, and limiting voting locations.

**These efforts are designed to silence people who threaten their power – and they disproportionately impact disabled folks, people of color, older voters and more.**

[**Peter, we need Congress to protect voting rights before the GOP has a chance to attack them any more. Will you stand with Emilia in calling on Congress to fight voter suppression and protect our most fundamental constitutional right?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43257388/336411822/-2140240920?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDM3MDc3MS0xYmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pH6fQe065O9fYf0-L4Tp7aolKDmKlDlr_Jy0nnHIWAM=&emci=d1ccb2a0-0baa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f0370771-1baa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=11703046)

subject: I’ll cut to the chase, Peter

body:
Please think carefully about the consequences of what you do next.
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59912674:6UR6CkoNR:m:1:3317145305:10A68373BAFA361495DF2FF8A8B432D3:r)
You know me.
I'm not the kind of person to beat around the bush. President Trump and I have that in common.
**So I hope you 'll listen to me when I tell you that I'm devastated:**
The Democrats pulled in over a BILLION dollars online last year with one express purpose: to wipe out each and every ally of President Donald J. Trump. It's more cash than any of us could have imagined. This is bad. VERY bad.
_So I 'll cut to the chase:_
I know it's a lot to ask, but we need a [**surge of donations**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59912674:6UR6CkoNR:m:1:3317145305:10A68373BAFA361495DF2FF8A8B432D3:r) ASAP if we're going to save President Trump's closest allies... tomorrow will be too late.
I'm hoping you'll rise to the occasion right now before the end of the day.
[**Help Save President Trump 's Top Allies >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59912674:6UR6CkoNR:m:1:3317145305:10A68373BAFA361495DF2FF8A8B432D3:r)
Please think carefully about the consequences of what you do next.
**The way I see it, you only have two choices:**
You can either delete this email, wave the white flag, and let the Democrats overwhelm ALL of President Trump's most loyal allies in Congress with their massive fundraising advantage...
[**... OR YOU CAN STAND WITH US, FIGHT BACK, AND WIN!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59912674:6UR6CkoNR:m:1:3317145305:10A68373BAFA361495DF2FF8A8B432D3:r)
I've made my decision. I'm standing with President Trump. _What about you?_
For freedom,
Jim Jordan

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Curry?=
subject: Fighting for the American Dream
body:
Stand for Freedom |
---
| | [ ](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=2e3d83570a&e=598f6aa24c)
---
| | Friend,

As President Ronald Reagan said, “The American people unleashed the energy and individual genius of man to a greater extent than has ever been done before.There is no arsenal more powerful than the moral courage of the American people."
[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=bb8473aa93&e=598f6aa24c)
---
|
---
| The American people will not surrender our freedoms, but we now have a government that is threatening the American Dream that the generations before us have sacrificed so much for. It is time for leaders that will fight for the ideals that made our country the greatest anywhere in the world.

I will step up and fight for these ideals that President Reagan spoke of. I will fight everyday and sacrifice like so many before us did. I will fight to ensure that there is nothing in the United States that is out of reach for you and your family. [If you want to restore the American Dream, Join my Team today!](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=2442382d34&e=598f6aa24c) I fear that if we do not reverse course soon, the America that President Reagan spoke of will be a story of the past, not the country of our future. That is why I am running for Congress. I can not sit back and watch the country I love become a weak, failed, socialist state led by Joe Biden and the radical left.

Watch my full ad [HERE](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=23b7153196&e=598f6aa24c) [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=74364b9a03&e=598f6aa24c) [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=49a5fb1854&e=598f6aa24c) [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=ef61d8c007&e=598f6aa24c) [](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=9df03816f1&e=598f6aa24c)
Thank you,
David Curry
---
| | **[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=d47ab8e002&e=598f6aa24c)[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=2f6a280609&e=598f6aa24c)[](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=b03b4560b4&e=598f6aa24c)**
---

clean_body: Youth 4 Kina is leading the way. | | | , last night, our Youth 4 Kina team made over 10,000 phone calls to support our campaign, and I am deeply inspired. We’ve had the same representation in IL-7 since before any member of our Youth 4 Kina team was even born, and they are stepping up to make a new future for their community. This election is about a generational shift in power. It is time for the Democratic party to make space for a new generation of leaders, a new generation of voters, a new generation of volunteers. We can win, but it is going to come down to one thing: spreading the word. Spreading the word with Spreading the word with Spreading the word on Spreading the word with Join us. In solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

Here on Dr. Caraveo’s team, we’re working to elect the first Latina ever sent to Congress from Colorado — so we truly understand why representation is so important. Judge Jackson’s historic nomination is a watershed moment for generations of Black activists, scholars, and civil rights leaders. For the first time, Black women and girls will see themselves represented in the highest court in the land.
Equally important, Judge Jackson’s experience as a public defender — also a first for a Supreme Court justice — shows that she will stand up for marginalized communities. For too long, our legal system has catered to the wealthy and well-connected at the expense of working people who can’t afford expensive lawyers to advocate on their behalf. Confirming a former public defender to the Supreme Court is the first step in fixing that imbalance.
**With _Roe v. Wade_ and voting rights under attack everywhere, Judge Jackson’s nomination couldn’t have come at a better time.**
We can’t let the Republicans’ smear campaign stop her confirmation. | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests.

Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. clean_body: | = The Supreme Court nomination hearings are in full swing, Peter. If confirmed, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson would be the first Black woman and the first public defender to serve on the Supreme Court in U.S. history. | Here on Dr. Caraveo’s team, we’re working to elect the first Latina ever sent to Congress from Colorado — so we truly understand why representation is so important. Judge Jackson’s historic nomination is a watershed moment for generations of Black activists, scholars, and civil rights leaders. For the first time, Black women and girls will see themselves represented in the highest court in the land. Equally important, Judge Jackson’s experience as a public defender — also a first for a Supreme Court justice — shows that she will stand up for marginalized communities. For too long, our legal system has catered to the wealthy and well-connected at the expense of working people who can’t afford expensive lawyers to advocate on their behalf. Confirming a former public defender to the Supreme Court is the first step in fixing that imbalance. With Roe v. Wade and voting rights under attack everywhere, Judge Jackson’s nomination couldn’t have come at a better time. We can’t let the Republicans’ smear campaign stop her confirmation. Thanks! Team Caraveo | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests. Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. = | = | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Glenn Beck
subject: We’re rushing support to Ukraine. You can help.
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z74oopodn65905os0rrvc6vaqoa086o3civ6n640_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp78djgc6qrfddic5r72ojlckpbdcrmcpq61ollm4ob2shnmlgm3chlegoebctgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lhbbd77mtgmcd30mdg6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5jm9o74c1h60oh5u)
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk7j4vrcb434ilbts1ts43relesi4bnhruememfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjge8o32c1h2bs)
---
|
---
Fellow American,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcvdpnoavstoef89sp6snh2o4cgdcntln4c9nuuo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjge8o32c1h2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo72e7n5jsdlh3lhjn00ki8njmfpq0hkkp378bkg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjge8o32c1h2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpaf92dkr0osrao86m7641ib14qje38s4d4o34ho_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjge8o32c1h2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---

name: Katie Hill
subject: A good day to be a woman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Sr65cJuUgURTDegyBZ4WSzY8YnFMUPSA7krV-t7M9cM=/PYW-XiP5FvULDsaaDY_9XQhrBu9pAu9R6Tgfkv4xjkQ=)
It took way too many years, but the Violence Against Women Act has _finally_ been reauthorized. While it doesn't include the key provision to criminalize revenge porn federally, and while our fight for that legislation must continue, this is still a big win.
**Survivors of abuse and sexual assault will be safer and better supported thanks to this law.**
That is a victory, pure and simple -- and a reminder that it's worth it to keep up the fight.
[Let's keep pushing for legislation that makes women safer, more supported, and more successful. Will you donate now to support the Congresswomen fighting for all of us?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Sr65cJuUgURTDegyBZ4WSzY8YnFMUPSA7krV-t7M9cM=/2osoxZH5tegJ6eMT1uCknDb5Ox7ElX22t2JCiv9RNPc=?refcode=X_032222_VAWA)
Thank you!
-- _Katie_

| I hope you'll take a moment to watch this [MUST-SEE video message](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=c7a3b869b9&e=89fb4d5220) from President Trump.

President Trump is heading to Georgia for a big rally for us on **Saturday, March 26th at 7:00 PM** at Banks County Dragway in Commerce.
**[WATCH PRESIDENT TRUMP'S VIDEO HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=b7fcc64e60&e=89fb4d5220)**

[](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=27abbe7a91&e=89fb4d5220)

_**"Hello to all of the great people of Georgia.

I’m going to see you in Commerce. That’ll be on Saturday afternoon, probably around 7:00.

Now we’re going to have a lot of fun.

We’re going to support a great gentleman, a great candidate, he’s running for Governor, David Perdue.

He’s going to clean things up. He’s going to do a great job."**_

**– President Donald J. Trump**

name: Glenn Beck
subject: How you can help in Ukraine now:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KELLI WARD
body:
These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.

| | |
---
[Unsubscribe](https://for.az.kelliward.com/unsubscribe.php?M=22208987&C=04032ac65d70499c58422a6a52349eb2&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=1040&N=150208&AGENCY=PMI) | [View in browser](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150208&L=81712&F=H&drurl=aHR0cDovL2tlbGxpd2FyZC5jb20vZW1haWwtbGV0dGVycy9rdy1yZXYtYm0tYmVjay0yMDIyLTAzLTIy)
[ |
---
|
--- ](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150208&L=81713&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9tZXJjdXJ5LW9uZS5yZXZ2LmNvL2UtYm0tYmVjay11a3JhaW5lLWhmXzAzMjEyMDIyP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9a3c=) |
---
| | | | | | [](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150208&L=81713&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9tZXJjdXJ5LW9uZS5yZXZ2LmNvL2UtYm0tYmVjay11a3JhaW5lLWhmXzAzMjEyMDIyP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9a3c=)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150208&L=81713&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9tZXJjdXJ5LW9uZS5yZXZ2LmNvL2UtYm0tYmVjay11a3JhaW5lLWhmXzAzMjEyMDIyP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9a3c=)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150208&L=81713&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9tZXJjdXJ5LW9uZS5yZXZ2LmNvL2UtYm0tYmVjay11a3JhaW5lLWhmXzAzMjEyMDIyP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9a3c=)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=150208&L=81713&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9tZXJjdXJ5LW9uZS5yZXZ2LmNvL2UtYm0tYmVjay11a3JhaW5lLWhmXzAzMjEyMDIyP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9a3c=)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---

Friend, The Build Back Better Act would be transformative for New Jersey families. **The bill would deliver affordable healthcare, lower prescription drug costs, cheaper childcare, climate action, and middle-class tax relief.** Plus, it would keep a quarter-million New Jersey children out of poverty thanks to the extended Child Tax Credit. **[Bill has been a champion for this legislation since it was first announced, and he's still fighting for it. Will you sign on to support our fight to "Bill" Back Better?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXd5XIJlToiKqHiKJ2pu-n4W0-_QZRCx3ghU-EpFUPXvT6gfpYMfu6JSuesW7aqWoFNvSrhmJHHpnbg5Z49zBkz9_NQgCpm0b98kCSEeibSbrfuLINOaQftMmz2fHjk-VxoAmtixP7o2SFMHT6xpSJHHvGzYIv7vtO92zzuxPfmaGebIFDTnn3Qb_F7HhfEXSexKwRBbCAJ1Nb1R28tNsM22oQ98c6F4zz6BuMnFEgVmaCeZo4zWeO5hziQOyN3UAdVNbUwusU3N8GV-UhA-BvAv8nPpbR7u22LE_t3iA9xZj/3kk/vHG3-3gmRlOwnKgfvtDUxg/h1/tCkEhNToLwPTjb3Svag3IYUkuBReaW-Dm3lborUaDEg)** **[Add your name! →](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXd5XIJlToiKqHiKJ2pu-n4W0-_QZRCx3ghU-EpFUPXvT6gfpYMfu6JSuesW7aqWoFNvSrhmJHHpnbg5Z49zBkz89125P4F64gCqqvUgNxllI4Wd0RsPnl2BA1485uuLFZe45yKD8bLZxG6AU4xXcv_jUJGhpPkMxXN2qMj61wWswnz3I8CBY37vEkmKLVhA_rh4GR77j4u89Esrl0Y1txBOhOHgfBDjL_NrOYUNC9j_yRY-2X7j3G7-mVXYfwe9YsqMq2zahb5PNxbGhaGvMr_uY9--Ao47XyNab2DIk1Lrv/3kk/vHG3-3gmRlOwnKgfvtDUxg/h2/vHdEjCH2GJQxpspzac2_x65Kep4paKc_uy2_rxHaJTQ)** Thank you, friend! \- Team Pascrell

The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare.
