clean_body: Sign on to help us "Bill" Back Better → | | | Friend, The Build Back Better Act would be transformative for New Jersey families. The bill would deliver affordable healthcare, lower prescription drug costs, cheaper childcare, climate action, and middle-class tax relief. Plus, it would keep a quarter-million New Jersey children out of poverty thanks to the extended Child Tax Credit. Thank you, friend! \- Team Pascrell The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare. Bill wants to rebuild New Jersey's aging roads, bridges, and tunnels. And Bill Pascrell is our strongest advocate for tax fairness and restoring the state and local tax deduction for our middle-class families. Thanks for having Bill's back! Prefer to donate by mail? Make checks payable to Pascrell for Congress P.O. Box 100 Teaneck, NJ 07666

name: Chief Val Demings
subject: They tell me I don't belong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Marco Rubio is attacking my 27 years of law enforcement service
| | |
---
Friend, Marco Rubio is attacking my 27 years of law enforcement service, so I'm reaching out to set the record straight.

Back in 1983, **I answered a call to serve because I loved my community and wanted to protect it from harm.** And while I was working the midnight shift, Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician.

But the problem is, some voters have only heard Marco Rubio's lies about me, and I need more resources to share my story of service with more Floridians before it's too late. Please understand, friend: How quickly I'm able to correct the record for voters will make or break this election.

**[If you can spare $5, will you donate before midnight to help me counter Rubio's attacks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43258081/336415802/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk2394-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODU3YmRmNS0yMGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48bWpFpL43KyqzxZsqA_NVEQhLlq25OnpJLCA49_VtQ=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43258082/336415803/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2394-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODU3YmRmNS0yMGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48bWpFpL43KyqzxZsqA_NVEQhLlq25OnpJLCA49_VtQ=)
I was one of eight women in a class of 30 when I joined the police academy – but I always remembered what my mom had told me: "Be the best you can be, even if people say you don't belong."
And when it came time to choose a class president, one of the other women in our class convinced me to run. I was nervous, but I went for it – and I won by a landslide.
**I graduated not only as class president, but at the top of my class.** When I got out of the academy, I went straight to work protecting and serving my community. And after decades of service, **I became the first Black woman to serve as Orlando's chief of police.**
Fast forward to today, I'm about to take on my biggest challenge yet. There are obstacles ahead, but with my "never tire" attitude and a massive grassroots movement behind me, I know that I can become Florida's next U.S. senator and expand our Democratic Senate majority.

**[If you're on my side, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now to help me share my story with more voters and defeat Marco Rubio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43258083/336415804/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2394-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODU3YmRmNS0yMGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48bWpFpL43KyqzxZsqA_NVEQhLlq25OnpJLCA49_VtQ=)**

**I'm no stranger to adversity, friend. If naysayers like Rubio think their attacks will make me feel defeated, they've got another think coming. I've heard it all before – and I've only come out stronger.**
Thank you for joining this grassroots movement.

Chief Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, **[click here if you’re on mobile](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43258084/336415805/1417698435?refcode=jtk2394-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODU3YmRmNS0yMGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=48bWpFpL43KyqzxZsqA_NVEQhLlq25OnpJLCA49_VtQ=&emci=2baef970-19aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=9857bdf5-20aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100) or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates.**

Hello Somebody!
Sorry to be so direct, but we're asking you to **[make your first contribution to Nina Turner’s campaign for Congress — before our FEC deadline at the end of the month.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43258188/336416560/-1971788355?refcode2=a13e431c-22aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220322-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTNlNDMxYy0yMmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3JfTCWbg_RBj_aSgnG-DFYjGWVeYHTL70XSWrnT2wKg=)**
We know our campaign emails you a lot asking for money. Believe me, we get these emails too.
But the truth is, donations in response to emails like this one are a HUGE part of how we fund this campaign. **We absolutely could not do this without you.**
Billionaires and corporate lobbyists aren’t exactly lining up to write max-out checks to our campaign. And that’s ok by us, because we don’t want their money.
But that means that in order to hit our goals before our FEC deadline and ensure we have the resources to win this race, _we’re counting on a massive surge of donations from grassroots supporters like you._
**[If you can afford it, please make a contribution to Nina’s campaign for Congress. We’re building this campaign one volunteer, one phone call, and one $27 donation at a time, and we cannot do it without you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43258190/336416562/-1971788355?refcode2=a13e431c-22aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220322-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTNlNDMxYy0yMmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3JfTCWbg_RBj_aSgnG-DFYjGWVeYHTL70XSWrnT2wKg=)**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43258192/336416564/-1971788355?refcode2=a13e431c-22aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220322-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTNlNDMxYy0yMmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3JfTCWbg_RBj_aSgnG-DFYjGWVeYHTL70XSWrnT2wKg=)**
We’re running to truly transform our country and make a real difference in the lives of the poor, the working poor, and the barely middle class right here in Cleveland and across the country.
That means fighting for Medicare for All, for a Green New Deal, to eliminate ALL student loan debt, and so so much more.
This race is our chance to send a champion for working people to Congress — but it’s ONLY going to happen if we’re willing to stand together and fight for what we believe in.
Thank you for being in this fight with us.
With these hands,
Team Nina Turner

There are so many reasons to support Becky, and each is important, but we want to know **why YOU support her**. Look over our **eight reasons to back Becky** and** ** select the most important reason to you.

**Contribute any dollar amount** at the link below and use the drop-down box online to **select the reason you support**. Then, **find out which reasons have advanced** to the next round in **tomorrow's bracket update email**.

We will be sharing these bracket updates all week, and **on** **Friday, we will announce the champion reason** **for why Utahns are choosing to back Becky**.

If you thought Tina and Oregon Democrats had the November elections in the bag, this article from Willamette Week should be a wake-up call.

**As the article says, this year is the Republicans' "best shot ... to win the state's highest office."**

Peter, there is way too much at stake to take this election for granted. It's never mattered more to have a progressive fighter like Tina in Salem to take on the housing crisis, protect abortion rights, and stand up for working families.

**[Republicans are spending millions to mislead Oregonians – and if too many Democrats sit on the sidelines, they could win this race. Don't let that happen. Please donate $5 or more before March's end-of-quarter deadline to help give Tina the resources she needs to win the primary and take the fight to the Republicans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43250272/336378676/1009447514?refcode=em22_220322_eoq1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTFmMmQ4Ny0wMWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4RSUFTgUha-HUxUWPHxXmY17zJlH_oqUhNgIO_OY7uQ=)**

Here are the really scary parts from the Willamette Week article about the Republicans in the race against Tina and Democrats like you:
_"Virtually all of them told the audience they wanted to restrict abortion ... and trash Oregon's vote-by-mail system."_

Hey Fellow American, it’s Tyler (the Marine who did four overseas tours and is now on a mission to secure a seat in Congress). [**I need a quick favor.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=011d40e3853047139611576c65f73e01&_e=UAhD-Z4Z1BvUVIONy0jgVvnbsxvkhWUzPlBz71_UgB5noUE164jQK6QUMPs8crBA6F_zQ6M3I4gqNlxPQ6t-nMwGMqy7ro_W0u0btT8tRSLrLCzgJVe1w5nNEeh8FWkVXIRZnUrAbAEO4CXrog1_Gj-R86IePsUAQvA2CJn2z4bEtzkuuGPZsl5HoD_7rXqHIR8pimJ7r2s2PU7WKEnB6_8BZRmJQuBzAsNsUzoQLuxl6h2Ai93d6TgnBFKZPo3wn29wvC3tdDKbdtv5EtWuLjcRLngXfR5ROS29w2lmaifXDszMHe1pktlFY27ohzD7aMAN34SSEQiVzdYHzFjcUaBWGtPxB607S8Toze7xPRYLztfmNKUA-ks78kzEnASK)

**The short version:**
I’m facing my biggest deadline yet at the end of March, and I need to know if you’ll [**have my back**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=011d40e3853047139611576c65f73e01&_e=UAhD-Z4Z1BvUVIONy0jgVvnbsxvkhWUzPlBz71_UgB5noUE164jQK6QUMPs8crBA6F_zQ6M3I4gqNlxPQ6t-nMwGMqy7ro_W0u0btT8tRSLrLCzgJVe1w5nNEeh8FWkVXIRZnUrAbAEO4CXrog1_Gj-R86IePsUAQvA2CJn2z4aINwRziDJ-eJ7CGBGGrqb_fe67U-AdfUyK573M3PxCNb0qimOwTifa0OE7N3HQ6EcRb4NHnRo9Wh51uJmCYJzjRkOuaTpTcrwzcyMhKZMEsX5v1e2MYuJ3I40lh8Q97otOaFtJoECTV03nEFf1tblsXITxg-tUfRLKKa6xIviJbZ3iSG5Jqi0IdRZQueHdCWMpOgPjgeKETtwSn342CeBL) in the next 15 minutes.

**The long version:**
This is what I didn’t want to have to send to you, but my team and I are going over the numbers before our big end-of-quarter deadline, and essentially, I need to pick up the pace on our fundraising numbers. **We are 41% short of meeting our biggest goal yet** , and I don’t know what we’re going to do.

I’m sure you know how bad things are...

My super-DEM opponent and liberal media will be patiently waiting to comb through my next round of publicly accessible finance reports so they can spot potential weaknesses or shortcomings that they can use against me.

**Dark money groups have already poured MILLIONS into my opponent’s bank account, because they know she’ll rubber stamp Pelosi’s America-last agenda.**

This is the same far-left Democrat who beat me in 2020 by just 2% _and since then has voted with Pelosi 98% of the time._

Peter,

We just made it back to Oregon after spending a week in DC with future Speaker Kevin McCarthy, Steve Scalise and other Republican dignitaries. We flew across the country because I was recently named a NRCC “Young Gun” candidate.

We wouldn’t have made it into this esteemed program without your help. You see, the NRCC only names candidates who meet certain criteria – i.e., candidates who have a robust fundraising operation, proven communications strategy and a compelling message that resonates with voters in the district.

Young Gun candidates, the NRCC’s website reads, “represent the most competitive congressional seats in the 2022 election cycle.”

After announcing the latest slate of “Young Gun” candidates, Leader McCarthy had this to say:

_**"The newest candidates to the list show how we plan to take back the House by holding their Democrat opponents accountable for the disastrous policies we have seen from the One-Party Democrat Rule of Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi."**_

After having been awarded this honor and all that comes along with it, we cannot fall short.

**[Are you able to make a gift of $1 or more right now to help us make headway in reaching this lofty goal? clean_body: It’s official - I'm a NRCC Young Gun. We just made it back to Oregon after spending a week in DC with future Speaker Kevin McCarthy, Steve Scalise and We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | Peter, We just made it back to Oregon after spending a week in DC with future Speaker Kevin McCarthy, Steve Scalise and other Republican dignitaries. We flew across the country because I was recently named a NRCC “Young Gun” candidate. We wouldn’t have made it into this esteemed program without your help. You see, the NRCC only names candidates who meet certain criteria – i.e., candidates who have a robust fundraising operation, proven communications strategy and a compelling message that resonates with voters in the district. Young Gun candidates, the NRCC’s website reads, “represent the most competitive congressional seats in the 2022 election cycle.” After announcing the latest slate of “Young Gun” candidates, Leader McCarthy had this to say: "The newest candidates to the list show how we plan to take back the House by holding their Democrat opponents accountable for the disastrous policies we have seen from the One-Party Democrat Rule of Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi." After having been awarded this honor and all that comes along with it, we cannot fall short. name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentime
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zj8e6tvlitsh39k9b5c4nvi37bqtbhu0flrampgo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjge4o72chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sj7mmpr6sb2cmpj2pb4s8rbfdhje6q71pdleoorepb0cupbbc5me1q3adb4s9rrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aollmjjreoj66pgb6o77m2qmash5u)
| | | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z35h1rvcb59jgokap38cn2nic10q1lii0np4dhhg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjge4o72chh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4urjeded4d38nmv8f4v4imogrpmd67p915jgq7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjge4o72chh2bs)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z584riqc876mnc1jdrpu2kt34jh648tgb95k2alg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjge4o72chh2bs)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfaurq15ah8v58gkuing1qk9vsitmoje1hcj8tdo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjge4o72chh2bs)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfv69pq4nmtd6dlsvju5rdvftmv6da5qj1ls4u80_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjge4o72chh2bs)

Irving, TX 75014 Mercury One is a trusted 501(c)(3) non-profit | EIN no. 45-3929881

1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

body:
We’ve got real goals we need to meet in order to keep our campaign functioning at 100%. As of this writing, we’re still looking for 2,455 donors this |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d1ecb566b228496a86bf3db02b98d9f6&_e=g7GtjhFQyWradZUs_ijTK_U9iTkO1MKbw4GdfumFG8HFc2Is0vQx2SEkw4xUSSdlATo4yqi29rH_3dcSUJci_1QRsTmYiiExp9bN194_buLbtB9ld5cxqU8O8A_CvLoVY2AUvNXiI0x-CbEeCdHhNSSkg-u_liaH1twbGrWpCDVlWaGBNYdOCrSYKPp_PaF479-sZCW9j0crLrChQ4tunS6p9qGdjW7a3wYZodl-ElCmNfqlu46ZXbq3sqiaLL2VmGuN33l0_1ZRvFNIZscRX1k91-f5XWjLl1xK9be2vTkml2ljD1T35VbshKVrEJGtVlD9c5J6NBYIQetoEC6t6c_lfllSLQYK--rqB_U0hoPAdQdkBQ4xJyLX6LsljyBjaP9-p1jOQJ0JzikRentdKmawy7QNKm-tW43PJuWWNyuXzPlwyKPA-0WXv1Z8hc0s)

---
Peter,

Team Herschel has real goals we need to meet to keep our campaign functioning at 100%.
* **2,455:** That's the number of additional donors we need before March 31st. Why? Because it's crucial we identify more donors in the first quarter of this election year than we did in the last quarter of 2021. [**If 2,455 conservatives make a donation before March 31 st,**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d1ecb566b228496a86bf3db02b98d9f6&_e=g7GtjhFQyWradZUs_ijTK_U9iTkO1MKbw4GdfumFG8HFc2Is0vQx2SEkw4xUSSdlATo4yqi29rH_3dcSUJci_1QRsTmYiiExp9bN194_buLbtB9ld5cxqU8O8A_CvLoVY2AUvNXiI0x-CbEeCdHhNSSkg-u_liaH1twbGrWpCDVlWaGBNYdOCrSYKPp_PaF479-sZCW9j0crLrChQ4tunS6p9qGdjW7a3wYZodl-ElCLE9DRLjk-ynz4TRifjztwogkQS-eXnLguGASggmJvsKALAG4J4msI9P4_UiRsV-9svdjO2w-dOvl6F_Ge-aDetAQpj0OpTOCJ5kMjD7-WYazp2skhjO6ByWWHsMlknKUtOqjZ4Kgaj1qCyaJkc5_Yn_eJb8findmpIduL-5XV_-exHMb5txJGA5MO8w8M4386V5lyKJ5DNi24Fgc68UAR) we'll be in good shape headed into the 2nd quarter.
* **$23 million:** That's the amount of cash our Democrat opponent has in the bank to run attack ads against me. In fact, he's already spent more than $3 million airing TV ads in the last month. We hope to match his fundraising success, [**but we'll need your help to do that.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d1ecb566b228496a86bf3db02b98d9f6&_e=g7GtjhFQyWradZUs_ijTK_U9iTkO1MKbw4GdfumFG8HFc2Is0vQx2SEkw4xUSSdlATo4yqi29rH_3dcSUJci_1QRsTmYiiExp9bN194_buLbtB9ld5cxqU8O8A_CvLoVY2AUvNXiI0x-CbEeCdHhNSSkg-u_liaH1twbGrWpCDVlWaGBNYdOCrSYKPp_PaF479-sZCW9j0crLrChQ4tunS6p9qGdjW7a3wYZodl-ElDQTC93FXH9Xcmoax13RczZctAicbsd0xMjlBqomgFpfc-MMh3m-S1LhPffw08nAAnRlWf7FmJDOuZAmAIODGf1zVFkK2grinL1VXzrVdzgdzEuplaDOszskTBPD85CVJGKe31la12oA2GGWxAUN7o278lDe9rkXo1kOU2Uq1AaD5TljiWXe9jDzXC-rL__bFmIxX4EjizhCXfS3AO7H_UB)
* **March 31 st:** Our 1st quarter fundraising deadline. We need every ounce of support we can muster before midnight on March 31st. After this date, we'll have to make public what our campaign raised from January - March. [**It's critical to get your buy-in before the end of the month and post big numbers.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d1ecb566b228496a86bf3db02b98d9f6&_e=g7GtjhFQyWradZUs_ijTK_U9iTkO1MKbw4GdfumFG8HFc2Is0vQx2SEkw4xUSSdlATo4yqi29rH_3dcSUJci_1QRsTmYiiExp9bN194_buLbtB9ld5cxqU8O8A_CvLoVY2AUvNXiI0x-CbEeCdHhNSSkg-u_liaH1twbGrWpCDVlWaGBNYdOCrSYKPp_PaF479-sZCW9j0crLrChQ4tunS6p9qGdjW7a3wYZodl-ElAKMl-w9Whvj7J-fW3_If088tTQ3vtaRuHzAYvemnlqbi-Y8gKOAwLerPQ8HQdnTl4qij314V8lPYJ4d9zMOe0o3I3wraeWFrIw45Zo2Mlq7O54S5s_wq5gMa1pEtEftYFSEAhCP378T2f751yC3AI5N6TL1Gy2KNx5AjWD50-8Z7SD6n8DbmGT4IiELiBbqYXMBx1cn-qayC6EhD3u0B37)
* **161,030:** That's the number of donations we've received since launching our campaign last summer. It's incredible - especially since Herschel has never run for office before. We know there is more support out there, and [**we're asking for you to join our team today. If you've given previously, would you consider giving another donation - even a small one of $5 or $10?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d1ecb566b228496a86bf3db02b98d9f6&_e=g7GtjhFQyWradZUs_ijTK_U9iTkO1MKbw4GdfumFG8HFc2Is0vQx2SEkw4xUSSdlATo4yqi29rH_3dcSUJci_1QRsTmYiiExp9bN194_buLbtB9ld5cxqU8O8A_CvLoVY2AUvNXiI0x-CbEeCdHhNSSkg-u_liaH1twbGrWpCDVlWaGBNYdOCrSYKPp_PaF479-sZCW9j0crLrChQ4tunS6p9qGdjW7a3wYZodl-ElDsj84sQySEoxR2TMNvmm9hvOdR3InNjhJVjmj86MGaA4nSeNA07O4xzRCsWY5mcGAa_d7YIqOAA-7EOtzJ6MotzV6MPgGuGCXEKXy6FMk5gSqnLOZkoeRqGC_5uIOsCGo-VPBufJUoO9h1wNOrlKdzcJkOlTdgWaeOekxJlk-bTW1_Wrv9pRPmgGqD45mOjejv22MpEy7WSbLcdS11eBsI)

clean_body: We’ve got real goals we need to meet in order to keep our campaign functioning at 100%. As of this writing, we’re still looking for 2,455 donors this | Peter, Team Herschel has real goals we need to meet to keep our campaign functioning at 100%. 2,455: That's the number of additional donors we need before March 31st. Why? Because it's crucial we identify more donors in the first quarter of this election year than we did in the last quarter of 2021. we'll be in good shape headed into the 2nd quarter. $23 million: That's the amount of cash our Democrat opponent has in the bank to run attack ads against me. In fact, he's already spent more than $3 million airing TV ads in the last month. We hope to match his fundraising success, March 31 st: Our 1st quarter fundraising deadline. We need every ounce of support we can muster before midnight on March 31st. After this date, we'll have to make public what our campaign raised from January - March. 161,030: That's the number of donations we've received since launching our campaign last summer. It's incredible - especially since Herschel has never run for office before. We know there is more support out there, and - Thanks, Laura Dunaway Finance Director Team Herschel | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43259458/336422691/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGZiMjQyNi0yOGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E_9nDnimVv7SIKzforkaePZBuPKEXvP0hzk4utcQndI=&emci=89260c50-23aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ddfb2426-28aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter, **Climate change is an immediate emergency. Oregonians have seen it firsthand, with extreme heat, droughts, and the wildfires that have ravaged too many communities. Like many of my neighbors, I was evacuated during the 2020 fire season – we didn't lose our home, but too many families weren't so lucky.** The impacts are here and increasingly obvious, but that doesn't mean fighting climate change hasn't been one of the greatest struggles of our era. The Supreme Court is part of the problem here. Here's an example: the court's majority is far-right, and they've indicated they are ready to roll back the EPA's powers to regulate greenhouse gas emissions. **[The answer is straightforward: people-power, starting with a movement to urge Congress to take aggressive action.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43259459/336422692/185050059?source=2022ClimatAction_VH&referrer=group-val-hoyle-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-val-hoyle-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2022-03-climatechange-email%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGZiMjQyNi0yOGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E_9nDnimVv7SIKzforkaePZBuPKEXvP0hzk4utcQndI=&emci=89260c50-23aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ddfb2426-28aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9636579)** I promise you that, if elected to serve the people of Oregon in Congress, I will do everything in my power to reestablish the United States as a global leader in addressing climate change. **It absolutely has to happen. For our kids. For our future.** If the Supreme Court moves us in the wrong direction? It's up to us to organize, win, and do better for our country and our planet's future. Clean electricity? Renewable energy? Moving away from fossil fuels? All while creating the jobs of tomorrow with strong labor standards and investments to support our communities? Yes. Please. **[This effort continues in 2022, with urging our leaders in Congress to take immediate climate action. Join me in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43259460/336422693/185050059?source=2022ClimatAction_VH&referrer=group-val-hoyle-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-val-hoyle-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2022-03-climatechange-email%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGZiMjQyNi0yOGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E_9nDnimVv7SIKzforkaePZBuPKEXvP0hzk4utcQndI=&emci=89260c50-23aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=ddfb2426-28aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9636579)** name: Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
subject: Roy Cooper: “Cheri Beasley is the right person at the right time.”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
This moment demands someone who can lead us to victory in North Carolina.
#

Team - Governor Roy Cooper filmed an important message that we wanted to share with you:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220322-1-subs&refcode2=576.357359.hlKZai&t=1&akid=576%2E357359%2EhlKZai)
This moment demands someone who can lead us to victory in North Carolina. That requires a proven fighter for the people. To flip this seat, we need someone who understands the hopes and needs of working people.
We need someone who can speak to the diversity of our state — who knows how to organize and win in every community from the mountains to the coast, urban and rural. That’s what it takes to win.
Nobody understands this more than Roy, and that’s why he knows Cheri Beasley is the person who can get the job done in November. The right person at the right time.
[**Roy is counting on all of us to do our part, so will you please donate $3 to help us flip North Carolina’s U.S. Senate seat? Our official FEC deadline is quickly approaching, and we need to make clear that we have the grassroots strength to win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220322-1-subs&refcode2=576.357359.hlKZai&t=2&akid=576%2E357359%2EhlKZai)

clean_body: This moment demands someone who can lead us to victory in North Carolina. Team - Governor Roy Cooper filmed an important message that we wanted to share with you: This moment demands someone who can lead us to victory in North Carolina. That requires a proven fighter for the people. To flip this seat, we need someone who understands the hopes and needs of working people. We need someone who can speak to the diversity of our state — who knows how to organize and win in every community from the mountains to the coast, urban and rural. That’s what it takes to win. Nobody understands this more than Roy, and that’s why he knows Cheri Beasley is the person who can get the job done in November. The right person at the right time. body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hey
[1]Jessica Peter, it’s Jessica,
Cisneros Kina, Rana, Odessa, and Summer. The 2022 JD congressional
slate. Jessica Cisneros
We’re adding you the group chat, because we’re hoping to get [2]Kina
your help. Kina Collins
[3]Rana The five of us are running for Congress to help defeat the
Abdelhamid status quo, and to represent the working people in Congress.
Rana abdelhamid
That means we aren’t accepting corporate cash. Because you can [4]Odessa
either represent the corporations 💰 or you can represent the Kelly
people. ✅ Odessa Kelly
With so many of our races happening in the next few months,
[5]Odessa it’s critical that we all individually reach our end-of-quarter
fundraising goals. Summer Lee
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/98595?refcode=em20220322-22510&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=22510%2E1203867%2E-Hgs5t ]You can help by splitting a $3 contribution
between all of our campaigns. Your contributions support the [7]Jessica
field, digital, and organizing infrastructure needed to win Cisneros
our competitive races. Jessica Cisneros

Collins to try to defeat us. But we have you, and the Justice Democrats
movement behind us. Kina Collins
When you chip in during a major moment like this, you amplify [9]Summer
the work that all five of us are doing to bring true Lee
representation to our communities. Summer Lee
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/98595?refcode=em20220322-22510&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=22510%2E1203867%2E-Hgs5t ] Peter,

will you chip in to help us reach our end-of-quarter goals?
None of this is possible without you. Odessa Kelly

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/98595?refcode=em20220322-22510&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=22510%2E1203867%2E-Hgs5t ]Contribute »

name: Team Trish
subject: Standing up for transgender kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43252032/336386298/368400405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjBmMzg2OS0wOGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pm-Xjq-Ux_IBEUuROeffJgbK_p1psx5KkCHHYYRa4tI=&emci=1e882bf7-3ba9-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=460f3869-08aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14943357) Peter, Most Americans want less anger and more healing and understanding within our communities and in our politics. But shameless GOP lawmakers are only looking out for themselves—and it doesn’t matter who gets hurt. Take the hateful targeting of transgender kids that we are seeing throughout the country. Elected Republicans in Missouri have never lifted a finger for girls’ sports. But now they’re saying they want to save girls’ sports? To borrow an apt phrase from President Biden, that’s just malarkey. **Ann Wagner, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Lauren Boebert and the rest of the GOP’s immoral majority have done enough damage to our country and our kids.** It’s more important than ever that Democrats hold on to our majority in the House, because extremist Republicans are so desperate that they’ll do anything to keep Americans divided. [_**We're coming up on an extremely important fundraising deadline. If you can, please donate today to help Trish run a winning campaign to defeat Ann Wagner this clean_body: Peter, Most Americans want less anger and more healing and understanding within our communities and in our politics. But shameless GOP lawmakers are only looking out for themselves—and it doesn’t matter who gets hurt. Take the hateful targeting of transgender kids that we are seeing throughout the country. Elected Republicans in Missouri have never lifted a finger for girls’ sports. But now they’re saying they want to save girls’ sports? To borrow an apt phrase from President Biden, that’s just malarkey. Ann Wagner, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Lauren Boebert and the rest of the GOP’s immoral majority have done enough damage to our country and our kids. It’s more important than ever that Democrats hold on to our majority in the House, because extremist Republicans are so desperate that they’ll do anything to keep Americans divided. =: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Trish is winning support from all corners of this district. Everyone in MO-02 is ready for a change, and with your help we will flip this seat and send Trish to DC. In Gratitude, -Team Trish = Trish Gunby for Congress PO Box 430114 Saint Louis, MO 63143 United States Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Need your help so we can get this done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

There's too much money, too many special interests, and too little accountability in Washington, D.C. That's why, during the 117th Congress, Derek and House Democrats are moving forward legislation that will strengthen our democracy, protect voting rights, and prevent future corruption.

Derek has always stood by the belief that if our democracy isn't working for the people, then it's not really working. He's been a champion for anti-corruption legislation like the For the People Act and the Protecting Our Democracy Act (both include bipartisan proposals Derek wrote!). And he proudly helped pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act through the House.

Now, with a slim majority in the Senate, this year is our chance to pass laws that will strengthen our democratic systems, restore our government's system of checks and balances, and strengthen accountability and transparency. **We need your help so we can keep attention on the need to move forward these common sense reforms - and put the American people first. **

**[Strengthening our democracy so elected officials are working for the public interest is something every American should agree on. If you're with Derek in the fight to defend and strengthen American democracy, add your name now to call on Congress to support democracy reform.](https://act.myngp.com/el/ExQAs8f6zfjcU3cwOL05KAQD-Xysn3KU_vOfGNbFDmQ=/Jbk1R4H-o0hkjHX1iqz1p3ghX9EjvVQGbYzd0o2OsnE=)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/ExQAs8f6zfjcU3cwOL05KAQD-Xysn3KU_vOfGNbFDmQ=/Jbk1R4H-o0hkjHX1iqz1p3ghX9EjvVQGbYzd0o2OsnE=)
Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/ExQAs8f6zfjcU3cwOL05KAQD-Xysn3KU_vOfGNbFDmQ=/a6QKg1aQWNM5XmSCUmCFLnIjuG7IRQJ4bxgItnIe3C4=?refcode=em22_220322_demrfm_adv_gq_act_JA_tk_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220322_demrfm_adv_gq_act_JA_tk_ettx&utm_medium=email)

clean_body: My friend, With high inflation and rising gas prices putting pressure on all Americans, An America United believes it's time to put partisan politics aside for the greater good. Governor Larry Hogan was the first Governor to pass a policy suspending the gas tax. He secured unanimous support from the Maryland legislature to ease the financial burden on the people in his state. This is people-first leadership. This is American leadership. An America United believes that we need unified leadership as we address the challenges facing our country. There are common sense solutions if we work together to achieve them. Being a leader means putting politics aside during a time of crisis. Like suspending the gas tax, we believe in being examples of good, bipartisan leadership that can navigate the divided world of politics to bring about positive and powerful policy. Your financial investment today will allow us to work with other political leaders to spread a unifying message across our country. Thank you, Team AAU Join An America United on social media! | | | ---|--- Contributions to An America United are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

name: Glenn Beck
subject: Emergency request for Ukraine:
body:
When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous. Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do...

[Unsubscribe](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=b1908e35ad5f4abf81cf1982ef0f3fa9&_t=5R_QWT3cYrvOZlHkLOHIRnL6WlA6hbdMBow7bLRQSa-dKm-VMRVHx3GQt8AfQ-DoRvMjWeBG4bmutPpGEShAqmjO8NsDazvQTTHtay0l0CJfZtMRSraHCbIrnmA6DCVvGMw7Gb1A-YIakCIj5GtLxpE00RtQr038YRyemnBvyoitEoJEPTpLcV6ttl2kWYa2CbPKzIR267RWMJyW9mpWDTG8i4hYVValc1_HX4VS88Q%3D)

---
|
---
Peter,

When America projects weakness & disunity, the world becomes more dangerous.

Bad actors see a green light to act, and oftentimes, they do.

We saw it last year when Afghanistan fell to the Taliban and within moments, terror and despair took over our television screens.

**Now, we are seeing a similar situation play out in Ukraine** , where as a result of naked Russian aggression, millions of people are now in need of emergency aid.

Fortunately, we are not powerless.

**Right now, my nonprofit Mercury One is working hand-in-hand with our partners on the ground to provide direct humanitarian aid and medical care** on the border of Ukraine – and I am reaching out with an urgent request for your help.

**[As we work to help as many civilians as we can, please rush as large a donation as possible to our Humanitarian Fund right now.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=b1908e35ad5f4abf81cf1982ef0f3fa9&_e=UqU0wbZoMm_ZJVvEpaC-6a9ypDjA6yWUvd6FkBDN5ou32WiLjbXHxiHUbYm8Cen_NoQao6RCXCanM2A347JyNZkj8uia8aCIeWB9j1M6ZqtURydlezd1-ZDPFOaIsZKG-SPsl-vZlwUAz5Bfr4_qKgPC1W2DEFRZ9bmgprP9zYcHvq-HmX5iZ6I-CnrhS-3ePOEWDW14Tx4-MJkRV38JhV_pZ5_9P5BebInbZNhQ3IR1ZS0By8k1NanvoFNChOVb1GaaLE61ra51AR3oZbAEZSWXRDh0pqRVv4KAi3O8wsC1DG2wlcZuzRMNZbWq6ERUXk6CGYgDeK7EkquifMqqhKrjrSlaFI3WB082gHTChbjcn9hMMQaxXF7bayaSbHnt)**
|
---
[DONATE NOW](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=b1908e35ad5f4abf81cf1982ef0f3fa9&_e=UqU0wbZoMm_ZJVvEpaC-6a9ypDjA6yWUvd6FkBDN5ou32WiLjbXHxiHUbYm8Cen_NoQao6RCXCanM2A347JyNZkj8uia8aCIeWB9j1M6ZqtURydlezd1-ZDPFOaIsZKG-SPsl-vZlwUAz5Bfr4_qKgPC1W2DEFRZ9bmgprP9zYfdBCT5U07OW1uEsjXcOzK5xC36eSECqumudE2Qk5drlyMpb3DWnKT-sn25XqpHzJdXeQzhS4L7NhDH1vS0fJIjeGkgW5Pi7nLHp7JqIY1_5TP4HGHwCLj_0JJ3d-Cvf72MKLB9WomlN-Mq6E-UvTtVv6KyQZ1ViZcx-s148UOH_b7NbkWl6UEFqioZ21Dsek8iGjnv-F5bJI0VIQA9ZabI)
|
---
Last year, in conjunction with our partners, Mercury One raised over $40 million to rescue over 12,500 at-risk individuals from Afghanistan including American citizens and persecuted Christians.

To have been able to play a part in a lifesaving mission of such magnitude is something I will never forget. But beyond that, it was an incredible learning experience which will help us be even more effective in the future.

**And the future is here. Right now, the mission is Ukraine. These brave people need our prayers, but they also need our direct support.**

**[So please, rush a donation to the help those in need in the crisis in Ukraine.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=b1908e35ad5f4abf81cf1982ef0f3fa9&_e=UqU0wbZoMm_ZJVvEpaC-6a9ypDjA6yWUvd6FkBDN5ou32WiLjbXHxiHUbYm8Cen_NoQao6RCXCanM2A347JyNZkj8uia8aCIeWB9j1M6ZqtURydlezd1-ZDPFOaIsZKG-SPsl-vZlwUAz5Bfr4_qKgPC1W2DEFRZ9bmgprP9zYfOkN_J09OjawqYAushvFP1V5sRD6AGLwFCoFata92nFMDNFyHwCmBo3bknZ17ei7hoWBubTcMZSf2wsjlQomXmM0b_cFHo231fBeViKARIsM3iUb9ctPZ21nvMUgAzdt3tT4LTYjEOVadKAxJ6kRwlUD9wmCxFqF_H70Eu66_VFpO1hTJHxjaHOsTxm7DvLhl4l4cycfV77GEpDdepgsgh)**

Thank you for your generosity, and your willingness to act.

Laus Deo,

Glenn Beck
Founder, Mercury One

**🚨RED ALERT🚨**

Patriot,

This issue is a matter of a lifelong impact on our nation, our liberties, and our rule of law. This week, Biden's nominee for the Supreme Court, Ketanji Brown Jackson, will have her first hearing with the Senate.

She's often compared to progressive Justice Stephen Breyer, a liberal activist who ardently supported legalized abortion and ruled against the 2nd Amendment **TWICE** in the Supreme Court. So with Ketanji in the Supreme Court, conservatives can kiss our values goodbye.

We are missing you and 5 others' signatures for the official petition demanding our GOP leaders to STOP the liberal takeover of the Supreme Court. **[The petition closes in 25 minutes, so this is your FINAL chance to add your name:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59902620:6LOMlkowN:m:1:3299561967:8D8EE84F8250A102629A18A4E54424FF:r "The petition closes in 25 minutes, so this is your FINAL chance to add your name:")**

name: Art Helton
subject: This is why I'm proud to endorse Doug
body:
From crime, to the environment, to the economy and beyond — Marylanders are in desperate need of experienced leadership that will make our state a more safe, just, and strong place to live. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYEBRuv3LZltPZnpT13Z_ZvnJe4nH_WOjWTJhkaafbzbiFSga8gwZHpk1N75JLhkpePX8LdLlAixolIiFPx1tbvY3HF41qqvZa7aBHMQtrdKI0bxdAJqWIjmHZiAzD72UuV2ALw6KJfuVnOPyOb4eaGgpUeXqEU2OZLTNksPKk1c_diQG54QDJ_zvCf4skqIL_qyqs2U9LI8l2_44hDIiirlkEG_Ggivf79uUQZUJpb5szUVxh3-BzJmbVl4awTC8/3kk/8dOUutOmT3yGMEmWJh5h_Q/h0/_rrLPNh42WtKG1zW_YcUZyYs3y4P8_bP46Mi_j9XHdU)
---
Hi friends, I am proud to endorse my friend and former Attorney General Doug Gansler for Governor of Maryland. As Attorney General and Montgomery County State's Attorney, Doug proved that he has what it takes to keep people safe, and no other candidate has his proven record when it comes to public safety. Voters who are worried about crime should trust Doug to keep Maryland safe and to do so in a way that is fair and just. I'm also personally very concerned about the reckless, over-development happening in our communities. Doug was the 'Environmentalist Attorney General' and will tackle Maryland's need for more affordable housing through Smart Growth principles that will help our communities and our environment. From crime, to the environment, to the economy and beyond -- Marylanders are in desperate need of experienced leadership that will make our state a more safe, just, and strong place to live. Doug is the best-equipped to make real change. That's why I'm proud to support him -- but he needs YOUR support to win this race, Friend. **[Will you join me in endorsing Doug for governor today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlYEBRuv3LZltPZnpT13Z_ZvnJe4nH_WOjWTJhkaafbzbiFSga8gwZHpk1N75JLhkpDb9ZJLZoMfIKniPY4lGk-8YYO8J7Re_qRf1JvGNeUyO_v0_H1q3QPtuvHWdO0PyiutVYWVbpmchUo4vVlQ_IvNguCXZTZHfrzV-or7Od0rbkbEYNWil1tliW6ZcXbYpkeDb4E2my95fp-D-K3Gwx0hj74rOsntf29VCU1FOFmSqKqdrJ3CU3HOS9GFmJp7JU/3kk/8dOUutOmT3yGMEmWJh5h_Q/h1/2UZ4BLtcPx5xD7y1-aYewY7_mmB2ZBkNBDLmLL1gHEM)**

| | Team, We’ve hit a lot of milestones since we launched our campaign for Governor back in June. I wanted to take a moment to personally share with you the state of our race and how we win in November. With 168 days until the primary election on September 6, our momentum continues to grow. More and more people are recognizing that our campaign is the only progressive movement in the field. And this is all because of grassroots supporters like you raising your voices and sharing our message. Our team has organized and elected hundreds of delegates. And I’ve been traveling to communities across the Commonwealth talking to grassroots supporters about the issues that matter most to them — affordable housing and health care for working families, universal child care, climate action — and how we deliver them for Bay Staters. I’m so grateful for your continued support: we were able to triple our fundraising from November to January — 70% of which was from donors giving $100 or less — showing just how strong our grassroots team is. And since 2022 started, 50% of donations to our campaign were from new donors. We’ve also received over 70 endorsements from local and state leaders across the Commonwealth — including 20 new endorsements from racial justice leaders. I’m proud to have the support of these leaders who are fighting to move the dial on racial equity in our state. This much is clear: now’s our chance to take this movement for real progressive change all the way to the governor’s office and deliver bold, transformative change for working families. [_**We have a clear path to victory — and with you on our team, we’ll build the strongest grassroots coalition possible. Chip in to help us win.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43253434/336392334/-1995710501?refcode=em_20220322_f_s_sotr&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTRmZjNiZi0wYWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l9_F6TZqn8ssUjypW7HzzT_P1SoWygpkP3rkV6gRQdw=) Saludos, Sonia

clean_body: I wanted to take a moment to personally share with you the state of our race and how we win in November. | | | | | Team, We’ve hit a lot of milestones since we launched our campaign for Governor back in June. I wanted to take a moment to personally share with you the state of our race and how we win in November. With 168 days until the primary election on September 6, our momentum continues to grow. More and more people are recognizing that our campaign is the only progressive movement in the field. And this is all because of grassroots supporters like you raising your voices and sharing our message. Our team has organized and elected hundreds of delegates. And I’ve been traveling to communities across the Commonwealth talking to grassroots supporters about the issues that matter most to them — affordable housing and health care for working families, universal child care, climate action — and how we deliver them for Bay Staters. I’m so grateful for your continued support: we were able to triple our fundraising from November to January — 70% of which was from donors giving $100 or less — showing just how strong our grassroots team is. And since 2022 started, 50% of donations to our campaign were from new donors. We’ve also received over 70 endorsements from local and state leaders across the Commonwealth — including 20 new endorsements from racial justice leaders. I’m proud to have the support of these leaders who are fighting to move the dial on racial equity in our state. This much is clear: now’s our chance to take this movement for real progressive change all the way to the governor’s office and deliver bold, transformative change for working families. = Saludos, Sonia | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution. subject: Bill McSwain and National Police Association call for nationwide support of law enforcement officers
body:
McSwain and National Police Association called for a return to law and order and increased support for police officers nationwide. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/bill-mcswain-and-national-police-association-call-for-nationwide-support-of-law-enforcement-officers?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**March 22, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
|
# Bill McSwain joins National Police Association to Call for Nationwide Support of Law Enforcement Officers

**West Chester, Pa.** **\--** Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, on Tuesday announced a nationwide call for support of law enforcement officers in collaboration with the National Police Association (NPA).

The announcement comes in response to the vandalism of a National Police Association billboard in Northeast Philadelphia. The message, which initially read "Support the Police, Thank a Cop", was vandalized to read "Kill a Cop" early last week.

McSwain, in collaboration with the NPA, has called for an increase in nationwide support of law enforcement by elected officials and citizens, and had this to say about attacks on the police:
---
|
> _**"In Pennsylvania and across the nation, failed progressive policies and soft-on-crime career politicians are creating a culture of lawlessness that celebrates violent crime, abandons personal responsibility, vilifies our nation’s law enforcement officers, and encourages reprehensible acts like the vandalism of the Brill Street billboard.**_ _**Our law enforcement heroes deserve better. As Governor, I will empower the police to restore law and order, prosecute those who threaten the police force, and aggressively pursue the death penalty for anyone convicted of killing a law enforcement officer. I am proud to join Sergeant Betsy Brantner Smith and the National Police Association to call for the support of police officers across the nation who put their lives on the line to protect our communities and neighborhoods - it is time to return to a culture of law and order." **_
---
| NPA spokesperson Sergeant Betsy Brantner Smith joined McSwain to condemn the billboard vandalism and to call for civilians and elected officials across the nation to stand in support of their local law enforcement:
---
|
> **_"The nature of this crime is truly abhorrent. Law enforcement officers wake up each day and make the decision to serve and protect their local communities. To undermine and threaten officers is despicable, and feeds into a narrative that fuels hatred and violence. The National Police Association brings forth a call to action to celebrate working officers and to support them in their endeavors."_**
---
|
---
|
---
| Bill McSwain's Plan to Restore Law and Order is [available here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=7c0be1dd9f&e=b1ec95759b)

More information about the National Police Association is [available here](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=93283cd2b6&e=b1ec95759b).
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=fac470ca69&e=b1ec95759b)

clean_body: McSwain and National Police Association called for a return to law and order and increased support for police officers nationwide. | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE March 22, 2022 CONTACT: Rachel Tripp 202.738.9089 | Bill McSwain joins National Police Association to Call for Nationwide Support of Law Enforcement Officers West Chester, Pa. \-- Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, on Tuesday announced a nationwide call for support of law enforcement officers in collaboration with the National Police Association (NPA). The announcement comes in response to the vandalism of a National Police Association billboard in Northeast Philadelphia. The message, which initially read "Support the Police, Thank a Cop", was vandalized to read "Kill a Cop" early last week. McSwain, in collaboration with the NPA, has called for an increase in nationwide support of law enforcement by elected officials and citizens, and had this to say about attacks on the police: | "In Pennsylvania and across the nation, failed progressive policies and soft-on-crime career politicians are creating a culture of lawlessness that celebrates violent crime, abandons personal responsibility, vilifies our nation’s law enforcement officers, and encourages reprehensible acts like the vandalism of the Brill Street billboard. Our law enforcement heroes deserve better. As Governor, I will empower the police to restore law and order, prosecute those who threaten the police force, and aggressively pursue the death penalty for anyone convicted of killing a law enforcement officer. I am proud to join Sergeant Betsy Brantner Smith and the National Police Association to call for the support of police officers across the nation who put their lives on the line to protect our communities and neighborhoods - it is time to return to a culture of law and order." | NPA spokesperson Sergeant Betsy Brantner Smith joined McSwain to condemn the billboard vandalism and to call for civilians and elected officials across the nation to stand in support of their local law enforcement: | "The nature of this crime is truly abhorrent. Law enforcement officers wake up each day and make the decision to serve and protect their local communities. To undermine and threaten officers is despicable, and feeds into a narrative that fuels hatred and violence. The National Police Association brings forth a call to action to celebrate working officers and to support them in their endeavors." | | | Bill McSwain's Plan to Restore Law and Order is More information about the National Police Association is . | | BACKGROUND: Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available | | | | | | | | | | billmcswain.com | | Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Alex Walker [via unitedemocrats.org]
subject: Lauren Boebert heckled President Biden as he opens up about his son’s death
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43260530/336428221/1805436278?amount=3&refcode=UD_20220322_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkOTI5ZWQ1LTJjYWEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7ZOlNfPMBnoKg1VqqcSX47csqL4_Xe9bjrignUEfDVs=) While delivering his State of the Union Address, President Biden opened up about the tragic death of his son.

Beau Biden – a major in the National Guard, a veteran of the Iraq war, and an attorney general in Delaware – passed away after a long battle with brain cancer in 2015.

But what was supposed to be a somber moment was shattered by a screaming voice, a heckler from the crowd. It was met with loud boo’s and shush’s from both sides of the aisle.

And I thought, _“What sort of person would yell out at the President as he publicly grieves the loss of his beloved son?”_

**It was Lauren Boebert.**

I was red in the face, embarrassed, angry, ashamed. But I’d be lying if I said I was surprised.

We’ve heard the rhetoric pushed by Boebert and her MAGA friends. She calls lawmakers “terrorists”, she tells her followers that Nancy Pelosi is a cannibal pedophile, she dehumanizes her own colleagues to the point that she can’t even empathize with a grieving father of a veteran.

How can we expect her to work across the aisle and solve actual problems if she doesn’t even treat the President like a human being? If she turns her back on the cabinet? If she literally screams into the void at proposed bipartisan solutions?

**The short answer: We can’t.**

[**So I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and UniteDemocrats so we can get rid of Lauren Boebert and restore some decency back into our politics. Can we count on your support? »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43260531/336428222/1805436278?amount=3&refcode=UD_20220322_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkOTI5ZWQ1LTJjYWEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7ZOlNfPMBnoKg1VqqcSX47csqL4_Xe9bjrignUEfDVs=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and will be split evenly between UNITEDemocrats and Alex Walker: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43260537/336428228/1805436278?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20220322_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFkOTI5ZWQ1LTJjYWEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7ZOlNfPMBnoKg1VqqcSX47csqL4_Xe9bjrignUEfDVs=)

subject: fwd: our new HQ!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| | Hey Peter, Did you see this email from Josh? I'm so excited to be writing this email from our brand new office here in Stockton, California! We're loving having a space to welcome our volunteers and it doesn't hurt that our next door neighbors have an adorable pup who comes to visit... When Josh gave the greenlight for us to find this office, our whole team was ecstatic. However, now we're hoping our grassroots team can help us fill the budget hole it's put us in. We really needed this office, but if we don't fill this gap it will hurt us on our first end of quarter deadline coming up this month. [**We need your help to catch up! Will you please rush in a donation right now to help us make up for the $10,000 this office is going to cost us today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/jTW6fA1yC6O0GUrPwIJkkam_nl8fPJXhXDYFFRokAUU=/0HOk5F39yBYctvCy4LhYNZhTZa8GoFXrts1x1uuRVvA=?refcode=E14685-20220322-Office2-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) Thank you so much for the continued support, Camille Torres
Campaign Manager

**\----FORWARDED MESSAGE----**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/jTW6fA1yC6O0GUrPwIJkkam_nl8fPJXhXDYFFRokAUU=/0HOk5F39yBYctvCy4LhYNZhTZa8GoFXrts1x1uuRVvA=?refcode=E14685-20220322-Office2-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) Peter -- Some decisions I have to make are tough and hard. This time, it was an easy call. **My campaign team came to me and said we needed to invest in an office.** We want a dedicated space our volunteers and organizers can use as a new "hub" of activity to meet and hold events, run our volunteer programs, and be a part of the broader community. It was an easy green light from me, and happy to say our team moved in this week! We intentionally placed our HQ right in the middle of Stockton, our largest city, and one of the most important communities for us to do early community organizing in. There are tens of thousands of persuadable voters in Stockton, and it's vital our grassroots organization is a part of the community. **However, with our first end of quarter fundraising deadline coming up at the end of this month, I 'm hoping this grassroots team can help us make up the hole this has caused in our budget. **We're currently about $10,000 short for the big deadline. I need your help to make sure this doesn't detract from our fundraising progress, because if we look weak in our first end-of-quarter report, Kevin McCarthy will rush millions more of his corporate PAC money to try and flip our seat. If you believe in grassroots organizing, this is the time we need your help! I'm dropping a custom ActBlue link below so I can track all our supporters who help us meet this goal. [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-March2022-FR-March?refcode=Peter**](https://act.myngp.com/el/jTW6fA1yC6O0GUrPwIJkkam_nl8fPJXhXDYFFRokAUU=/0HOk5F39yBYctvCy4LhYNZhTZa8GoFXrts1x1uuRVvA=?refcode=E14685-20220322-Office2-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) Thanks for everything,
-- Josh
---

| | | **Rep. Good endorses far-right congressional candidate who has called for voter-fraud executions**

_-Washington Post_
---
Peter —

This news isn’t surprising, but it sure is upsetting: my opponent, Bob Good, recently endorsed a fellow far-right extremist candidate for Congress right here in Virginia.
| [FIGHT BACK ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43260760/336429257/-931542377?refcode=BLU-ANDY-20220322-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTU1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDk2ODlhNi0yZWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KRHe0w7VdvBjA9PFxq6uoRrdmEB70ixe-qTGCi1GssM=)
---
I understand why Bob made this endorsement — after all, he and extremist Jarome Bell have a lot in common. They both revere Donald Trump, they both promote the conspiracy theory that Joe Biden did not win the 2020 presidential election, and they both spread misinformation about the coronavirus pandemic.

Bell has also called for those accused of voter fraud to be “executed” and has publicly made absurd comments like “the whole fake Russia war is about being gay.”

**This is someone who Bob Good thinks should serve alongside him in Congress. Bob Good is too extreme for Congress, disconnected from reality, and dangerous to Americans.**

I’m ready to defeat him and bring common-sense leadership to the House of Representatives. clean_body: This is someone who Bob Good thinks should serve alongside him in Congress. | = | | | Rep. Good endorses far-right congressional candidate who has called for voter-fraud executions -Washington Post Peter — This news isn’t surprising, but it sure is upsetting: my opponent, Bob Good, recently endorsed a fellow far-right extremist candidate for Congress right here in Virginia. | = I understand why Bob made this endorsement — after all, he and extremist Jarome Bell have a lot in common. They both revere Donald Trump, they both promote the conspiracy theory that Joe Biden did not win the 2020 presidential election, and they both spread misinformation about the coronavirus pandemic. Bell has also called for those accused of voter fraud to be “executed” and has publicly made absurd comments like “the whole fake Russia war is about being gay.” This is someone who Bob Good thinks should serve alongside him in Congress. Bob Good is too extreme for Congress, disconnected from reality, and dangerous to Americans. I’m ready to defeat him and bring common-sense leadership to the House of Representatives. = | | | = | = | = | = | = I am ready to be the representative Virginia deserves, and I’m honored to have you by my side. Thanks, Andy * | | = Paid for by Andy Parker for Congress Andy Parker for Congress P.O. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Judge Jackson's historic confirmation hearing is underway
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=fzW6jz7ENiWplW9I65NqENitdbK0rAEB&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
This week, my colleagues and I on the Senate Committee on the Judiciary began our confirmation hearing for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson - the first, critical step to ensuring this brilliant and historic jurist is confirmed to the bench of our nation's highest court.
When I met with Judge Jackson this month, I was so impressed by her complete commitment to fair, impartial justice. I'm excited for the American people to get to know her during this week's hearing too, and to see her genuine nature on full display. She is exactly what our country and our Supreme Court need right now.
**Importantly, if confirmed, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson would be the first Black woman to serve on the Supreme Court in its 233-year history. Her confirmation would be a long-overdue step toward ensuring our nation 's highest court reflects the diversity of the country it serves.**
But while I'll be doing everything I can to make sure these hearings are thoughtful, honest, and substantive, we know that some Senate Republicans are likely to attempt sideshows, stunts, and distractions.
In recent years, Mitch McConnell and the GOP caucus have shown a reckless pattern of blocking crucial nominations from both President Biden and President Obama, and we can't be caught off guard if they attempt to do the same in this critical moment.
That's why I'm asking for you to speak out today. With the future of reproductive freedoms, voting rights, gun safety, and so many more issues likely to be impacted by Supreme Court decisions, we _must_ fight back against Republican attempts to torpedo this nomination. **Please, click here to confirm where you stand on President Biden 's historic nominee:**
**[Do you support President Biden's historic nomination of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the U.S. Supreme Court?](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-SCOTUS-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1158-su-nd)**
Thank you,
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=t%2BMOZDDG2r%2BMe27Gum4boditdbK0rAEB&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)

subject: Peter, this is so important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Peter, Shontel really needs your help

## March 21, 2022
---
| |
---
|
---
|
# There's A Big Train Coming Down The Track

---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ImmWymwMAt1Ki-lnQmIMlVsBk0EZP7wF28LG14xeYUWZRR25bEfasLuDY4PfiJi_2HNo1S08FhJMmruls3jdNlFqszcVUWyZkI7sfT2boKnb1mcPXb8Ygf8sTpC97HusPkC6eKMUM4-2dRusW3x9GA==&c=5UPvGwEP-ikQj_ra9rBw3r3HdMEpmhW40JGHNhNGi4r_ZC3Xcka2zQ==&ch=98XPLhCs-Gok0tMj7DBsFDSBUSsIpZkaDZE3r5R-jAl8PDGRf2YERA==)
---
|
---
| |
---
| | |
### A Message From Ed

We have come a long way in the last 10 months. There are only 56 days left until Election Day. Hundreds of people have devoted themselves to take the campaign to this point. When it comes to elections, all scoring will happen in the last 2 minutes of the 4th quarter. We are in the 4th quarter now.
So much has been sacrificed for this country. Now we are at risk of being a part of the first generation to pass America off in WORSE shape than we inherited it. Thankfully, there is a movement unfolding across America. It's our time to act. Here's what I'm asking; spend the next 56 days with us and make history.
Not only do we need more engaged volunteers but we need more money to pay for our advertising budget during this last and most intense sprint. I promise you that I will work 16-18 hours a day, 6 days a week. We have the right plan, a compelling message and the best content. Please help us pay to advertise it so every Idahoan can see what you see.

---
| |
---
# If you want to abolish the income tax, cap property taxes, and implement school choice in Idaho then donate RIGHT NOW!
---
| | [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ImmWymwMAt1Ki-lnQmIMlVsBk0EZP7wF28LG14xeYUWZRR25bEfasFfI8eqGFE1eCg8JZNTsY2L9YKUwOpDhEk6rxzyDr5bvtBW3X10kM5EK-tbfDWmSjz5VJz8YvlLwqAQAFvZvxMDR9iXzpzsqyczTLZcQ-fNsCE-XYqYdANuPF-nOSYzTbU9Gm-Jl1pOq&c=5UPvGwEP-ikQj_ra9rBw3r3HdMEpmhW40JGHNhNGi4r_ZC3Xcka2zQ==&ch=98XPLhCs-Gok0tMj7DBsFDSBUSsIpZkaDZE3r5R-jAl8PDGRf2YERA==)

## A Peek at the Past Week
---
| | |
---
|
### March 20 - Rigby, ID

Our youth are suffering immensely under the specter of insanity plaguing our nation. Rigby has dealt with tragedies that we can only pray to avoid. We need a Governor who will champion change in our education system. We need school choice. Thank you Jefferson County GOP for hosting me last night.
---
| | |
---
|
### March 18 - Pocatello, ID

It is no longer acceptable to funnel our hard-earned money into the coffers of political operatives and activists. It's time for change!
---
| | |
---
|
### March 18 - Shelley, ID

The Governor determines direction. Folks in Shelley are looking for someone to contend for their values and they're joining the Humphreys for Governor team!
---
| | |
---
|
### March 17 - Idaho Falls,

My sole aim is to secure the American Dream in Idaho, and allow our state to rise to its noble position as a land that celebrates freedom and rewards hard work.
---
| | |
---
|
### March 16 - Gooding, ID

Thank you Magic Valley Republican Women's Club for hosting me. Then on to an event in Gooding to finish the day.
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.

---
| [The Plan](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ImmWymwMAt1Ki-lnQmIMlVsBk0EZP7wF28LG14xeYUWZRR25bEfasGsmtAe6_5cQMyFE0e5LnFt6XvRWp-lWPYHKTnouhUvtbRNYgvrJgNJbP96i70qm54OnQgvHrF8zE5Scp-HDyOApCJu-ntFZjMxPMM0Y-wat&c=5UPvGwEP-ikQj_ra9rBw3r3HdMEpmhW40JGHNhNGi4r_ZC3Xcka2zQ==&ch=98XPLhCs-Gok0tMj7DBsFDSBUSsIpZkaDZE3r5R-jAl8PDGRf2YERA==)

### Grassroots support from Patriots just like you is what makes this effort successful.

### JOIN THE MOVEMENT

If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can't volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho.

clean_body: | | | | | | | March 21, 2022 | | | | There's A Big Train Coming Down The Track | == | | | | | | A Message From Ed We have come a long way in the last 10 months. There are only 56 days left until Election Day. Hundreds of people have devoted themselves to take the campaign to this point. When it comes to elections, all scoring will happen in the last 2 minutes of the 4th quarter. We are in the 4th quarter now. So much has been sacrificed for this country. Now we are at risk of being a part of the first generation to pass America off in WORSE shape than we inherited it. Thankfully, there is a movement unfolding across America. It's our time to act. Here's what I'm asking; spend the next 56 days with us and make history. Not only do we need more engaged volunteers but we need more money to pay for our advertising budget during this last and most intense sprint. I promise you that I will work 16-18 hours a day, 6 days a week. We have the right plan, a compelling message and the best content. Please help us pay to advertise it so every Idahoan can see what you see. | | If you want to abolish the income tax, cap property taxes, and implement school choice in Idaho then donate RIGHT NOW! | | == | | | | | A Peek at the Past Week | | | | March 20 - Rigby, ID Our youth are suffering immensely under the specter of insanity plaguing our nation. Rigby has dealt with tragedies that we can only pray to avoid. We need a Governor who will champion change in our education system. We need school choice. Thank you Jefferson County GOP for hosting me last night. | | | | March 18 - Pocatello, ID It is no longer acceptable to funnel our hard-earned money into the coffers of political operatives and activists. It's time for change! | | | | March 18 - Shelley, ID The Governor determines direction. Folks in Shelley are looking for someone to contend for their values and they're joining the Humphreys for Governor team! | | | | March 17 - Idaho Falls, My sole aim is to secure the American Dream in Idaho, and allow our state to rise to its noble position as a land that celebrates freedom and rewards hard work. | | | | March 16 - Gooding, ID Thank you Magic Valley Republican Women's Club for hosting me. Then on to an event in Gooding to finish the day. | | | | | Principles Above Politics | | | We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us. It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. | == | | | | | | | Upcoming Events | | == == | | == | | | | Grassroots support from Patriots just like you is what makes this effort successful. | | == | | | | | JOIN THE MOVEMENT If you are like me, you know something is wrong right now. Please, join this growing movement. Volunteer. Host small gatherings in your home or community and welcome the opportunity to attend and connect with fellow Patriots. Knock doors, make phone calls, write editorials, promote the movement on social media, etc. There are many ways to get involved. If you can't volunteer, then I humbly ask for you to help us fundraise and donate. With your support we can forge a strong Idaho. | == | | == | | | | == | Ed Humphreys == P.O. Box 1667 Eagle, ID 83616 | == Stay Social! == == == | | | | | | | Humphreys for Governor | PO box 1667, Eagle, ID 83616 | | Sent by mailto:info@edforidaho.com in collaboration with |

Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson broke barriers to become the first-ever Black woman nominated to the Supreme Court. Now, the Senate is conducting her official confirmation hearings, bringing her one step closer to sitting on the highest court.

**Republicans are already SLAMMING Judge Jackson with despicable, baseless attacks.** We need to know if Democrats are standing with her despite all the GOP smears.

Our campaign strategists need to hear from you -- _but we're still MISSING 51 responses from Pennsylvania!_ **Please, lock in your answer now:**

**ANSWER MISSING:**
**Do you approve of Judge Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/6810?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220322-SupremeCourtAlert-SCOTUSHearings-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220322-SupremeCourtAlert-SCOTUSHearings-Pros-sl1&akid=3477%2E9716520%2EVRYEpV)

clean_body: We can’t ignore the facts. | Friend, I hate to say it, but this 50-50 toss-up governor’s race is going to come down to fundraising. Reports have shown that in roughly 9 out of every 10 elections across the country, the better-funded candidate wins. And with radical liberal Tony Evers sitting on more than $10.5 MILLION in cash on hand, we can’t afford to come up short at the end of this first quarter. Every month, we set benchmarks to ensure we’re keeping pace with our quarterly goals... ...Because falling behind even one month could allow Tony Evers to take the upper hand and recover from his disastrous poll numbers. That’s why I’m reaching out to every one of our supporters and every grassroots patriot across the country to help ensure we hit our first quarterly goal of the election year. With your help, we will marshal the resources we need to FIRE Evers and take back the battleground state of Wisconsin in 2022. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

subject: I’ll cut to the chase, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Please think carefully about the consequences of what you do next.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59912075:6zSU2kohN:m:1:3253819041:3A4DBF20617952F5A9DC121B3B658175:r)
You know me.
I'm not the kind of person to beat around the bush. President Trump and I have that in common.
**So I hope you 'll listen to me when I tell you that I'm devastated:**
The Democrats pulled in over a BILLION dollars online last year with one express purpose: to wipe out each and every ally of President Donald J. Trump. It's more cash than any of us could have imagined. This is bad. VERY bad.
_So I 'll cut to the chase:_
I know it's a lot to ask, but we need a [**surge of donations**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59912075:6zSU2kohN:m:1:3253819041:3A4DBF20617952F5A9DC121B3B658175:r) ASAP if we're going to save President Trump's closest allies... tomorrow will be too late.
I'm hoping you'll rise to the occasion right now before the end of the day.
[**Help Save President Trump 's Top Allies >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59912075:6zSU2kohN:m:1:3253819041:3A4DBF20617952F5A9DC121B3B658175:r)
Please think carefully about the consequences of what you do next.
**The way I see it, you only have two choices:**
You can either delete this email, wave the white flag, and let the Democrats overwhelm ALL of President Trump's most loyal allies in Congress with their massive fundraising advantage...
[**... OR YOU CAN STAND WITH US, FIGHT BACK, AND WIN!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59912075:6zSU2kohN:m:1:3253819041:3A4DBF20617952F5A9DC121B3B658175:r)
I've made my decision. I'm standing with President Trump. _What about you?_
For freedom,
Jim Jordan

name: Angela Padilla
subject: Can you help me wish Alex a happy birthday?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Hi there, it's Angela — Alex's wife.
Today is a special occasion — 🎉🎉🎉 **It’s Alex’s birthday!** 🎉🎉🎉
[**Please join me in wishing Alex a very happy birthday by signing our official card:**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Happy_birthday_Alex/?source=em220322-1-120&refcode2=692.159979.184Nf0&akid=692%2E159979%2E184Nf0)
[](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Happy_birthday_Alex/?source=em220322-1-120&akid=692%2E159979%2E184Nf0)
**[SIGN THE CARD](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Happy_birthday_Alex/?source=em220322-1-120&refcode2=692.159979.184Nf0&akid=692%2E159979%2E184Nf0)**
Alex has spent his career fighting for the people of California, and I can see every day just how much he loves this state and its people.
That’s why I’m hoping you’ll join me in showing _him_ some love by wishing him a happy birthday!
[**Click here to sign Alex’s birthday card — you can even leave him a message and we’ll make sure he sees it!**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/Happy_birthday_Alex/?source=em220322-1-120&refcode2=692.159979.184Nf0&akid=692%2E159979%2E184Nf0)
Thank you for helping our family celebrate Alex on this special day.
\- Angela Padilla
