name: Letitia
subject: FWD: How have your priorities shifted?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
Did you get my survey, Peter?

**The pandemic has exposed the inequalities that have existed in New York for generations.** Communities of color have been among the hardest hit by COVID-19, blue-collar workers have been _twice_ as likely to contract the virus as white-collar workers, the housing crisis has worsened – especially for low-income New Yorkers – and so much more.

I have been fighting to defend the voiceless and vulnerable from the worst impacts of the pandemic, _but this fight isn’t over yet_. That’s why I urgently need to know how COVID-19 has changed your concerns and priorities.
**Before midnight, will you please take 60 seconds to fill out this quick survey?

Here’s the best link: [http://surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY22-covid-priorities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43254240/336395960/-313661666?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk376-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZmNmNjOS0wZWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=seo06oVyrGnT6oiIcdR-lmqQKBFH_YTvRqVil0BduY0=&emci=88d6f45d-c6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9dff6cc9-0eaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**
Letitia

Sent from my iPhone
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia**
Date: Mon, Mar 21, 2022
Subject: The last two years
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43254241/336395961/265476937?code=jtk376-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZmNmNjOS0wZWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=seo06oVyrGnT6oiIcdR-lmqQKBFH_YTvRqVil0BduY0=)
---
Peter, two years ago, the earth seemed to shift beneath our feet.

Suddenly, entire families found themselves stuck at home, having to navigate a full house at all hours of the day. Those lucky enough to have jobs that could be done remotely turned their living rooms and kitchens into makeshift offices. And many who could not work remotely watched their paychecks come to a terrifying halt.

**It almost seems impossible that, two years later, we are still fighting the disastrous impacts of COVID-19. But know this: New York WILL get through this trying time.

Peter, the last two years have been long and exhausting for us all, but as we work to rebuild, I need to know how the pandemic has impacted your life and shifted your priorities. [My team set a goal to collect 5,000 responses before midnight tomorrow, so please take 60 seconds now to take my survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43254242/336395962/-313661666?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk376-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZmNmNjOS0wZWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=seo06oVyrGnT6oiIcdR-lmqQKBFH_YTvRqVil0BduY0=&emci=88d6f45d-c6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9dff6cc9-0eaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Take my survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43254243/336395963/-313661666?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk376-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZmNmNjOS0wZWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=seo06oVyrGnT6oiIcdR-lmqQKBFH_YTvRqVil0BduY0=&emci=88d6f45d-c6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9dff6cc9-0eaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)
---
COVID-19 has devastated far too many: Nearly **_600,000 New York households_** are still behind on rent, _**tens of thousands of New Yorkers**_ have lost their lives, including too many of our most vulnerable nursing home residents, and communities of color – who have long suffered under an unequal system – have been hit the _**hardest.**_

**I have spent every moment of the last two years fighting to defend New Yorkers from the worst impacts of COVID-19, but this pandemic continues to change every day. And while we may _finally_ ****be approaching the end of the disease, the consequences continue to devastate. That’s why my team set a goal to hear from 5,000 fearless fighters, but I’m still missing your voice. **

**[Peter, I urgently need to hear your story. Will you take one moment to share your thoughts, concerns, and priorities with me in this quick survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43254244/336395964/-313661666?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk376-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZmNmNjOS0wZWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=seo06oVyrGnT6oiIcdR-lmqQKBFH_YTvRqVil0BduY0=&emci=88d6f45d-c6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9dff6cc9-0eaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Take my survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43254245/336395965/-313661666?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk376-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZmNmNjOS0wZWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=seo06oVyrGnT6oiIcdR-lmqQKBFH_YTvRqVil0BduY0=&emci=88d6f45d-c6a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=9dff6cc9-0eaa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)

Letitia

I've got some really, really exciting news to share with you, Peter.

Earlier this month, I formally filed to be on the ballot for U.S. Senate. **Then, just a few days later, the Des Moines Register released a brand-new poll showing that Sen. Grassley's facing RECORD-LOW APPROVAL!**
Our campaign has more momentum than ever before, and we _need_ to take advantage of it. **That's why my team set a 24-hour goal to raise another $15,000. But with just hours before our 11:59 p.m. deadline, we're still $1,793 short.**
**[So please, before midnight tonight, rush $5 – or as much as you can spare – to help me hit this goal, defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority. This is our moment, Peter – will you stand with me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43261036/336430460/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk804-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzhkYTU1My0zMGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c7_YOnqkuwAAwbU1RO-3F4Ili6OTA4SpEY_oUEcRNQ8=)**

**Iowa's top pollster pointed to "weakness" in Sen. Grassley's polling numbers all the way back in November – but these new approval ratings are even worse for him. **Iowans are turning away from Sen. Grassley and looking for new leadership like never before.
Don't get me wrong: filing to be on the ballot is a critical step and these numbers are a _really_ big deal for our campaign, but this is about so much more than numbers or politics.
You see, this journey doesn't end once I'm elected. I'll _never_ turn my back on Iowans and working families in this country. **I'm running for Senate to bring _your_ needs and _your_ stories with me to Washington – and to fight for you once I get there.**
These numbers absolutely matter. Even so, I'm not asking you to donate to my campaign because Sen. Grassley is facing record-high disapproval ratings. **I'm asking you to donate to my campaign so I can fight for the issues that matter – affordable health care, good-paying jobs, protections for working class families and so much more. **
**[Please, Peter, if you're with me on this, can you donate $5 before 11:59 p.m. tonight so that we can defeat Sen. Grassley, expand our Senate majority and fight for families like yours?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43261039/336430463/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk804-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzhkYTU1My0zMGFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c7_YOnqkuwAAwbU1RO-3F4Ili6OTA4SpEY_oUEcRNQ8=)**

body:
We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our I have stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism, now I want to take on the radical-Left in Washington. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=819b8cf8e55f4870b26d2d7585364ca1&_t=FrCRiNaWnkVCnGz41k_nUij_msBUrLv4TpC6gy4_u5C43L-4h5ceDZRAdJpY-dxdoBXWxGcF7rrMfBZMa4CSI91GK1AMWtX3Bz1nyGuMG-pBL9VWhibOOZvdzx-yTR3Mo0eaxDgdWD2minnoNFhfOshG_LtrUYaaIk-ArogyGaA%3D) | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=819b8cf8e55f4870b26d2d7585364ca1&_e=6avCMrMl1TsquRVZyPzjEHhQgQTe9zSii1Lu2EMpWRYyDr50WRXe_-R6k2hNtNxvFWmxNj-iSuoXYJAtPzqy9Coq4UTq_C3g8DUUDetBpxaSlSbs88cAPgxuA3niEkhQEp8eIY_9eqMRXnlX6zqj5rZWy-BVODgX_1fGKq_36RiKe53oPQ0tDxPaAq0Qre4890SOc8rag4VcuwOhCYwQL0VJ6twzWxtUSc7d6VsLZRmxPBWY89ee-CDoTpZ7MrgHFj2cJDiqOFXK5kNeEGWcuSechF8gKiIjcdIzrQGrQMabT26gGxRKOeyYXQwVpEipyowG8ibrnZllqiDOtpWo7dIrpk8E7nLof9V_IAX2QK4yxON3noAt-vjrIUWTH4QbxVFDJW-Agc4YShOAt60YkwI52eckXwFDaM1yl5iUsCU%3D)
---
Peter,

I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when I decided to take a vacation with my two childhood friends in Europe during 2015. **We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train.**

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.

For this, the President awarded me the United States Army's Soldier's Medal, and the events of that fateful day were later retold in the film _The 15:17 to Paris,_ directed by Clint Eastwood.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=819b8cf8e55f4870b26d2d7585364ca1&_e=6avCMrMl1TsquRVZyPzjEHhQgQTe9zSii1Lu2EMpWRYyDr50WRXe_-R6k2hNtNxvFWmxNj-iSuoXYJAtPzqy9Coq4UTq_C3g8DUUDetBpxaSlSbs88cAPgxuA3niEkhQEp8eIY_9eqMRXnlX6zqj5rZWy-BVODgX_1fGKq_36RiKe53oPQ0tDxPaAq0Qre48q9KesWNhFm7wJDuQnhz6hGTqGNbRt_Eo4XxMyNd-1JPs7Jc0AWCkzitP9gySAbISOsk5xvTmxHPpSYwev7qoAwqCnbbCpIdPy07kkjss9u3VqcNKGAIad5aYHFvTDzJmYWOoZPiFA8VaMYEb1fXodrEuTObLw_0-HXqOE859teuEbMej1QW5qEkcrJtqU0KrhRtg-yfNsI2kOSTmn2MKIg2tgb5qSqJdUDrToIExXGc%3D)Anthony Sadler, Spencer Stone, and I accepting the Hero Award from Clint Eastwood on June 4, 2016, in California.
But I didn’t do what I did to receive recognition – **I did it out of duty.** And now, duty is calling me again.

[**My name is Alek Skarlatos, I am a former National Guardsman, an American Patriot, a proud Republican and I am running for Congress in Oregon’s 4th District.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=819b8cf8e55f4870b26d2d7585364ca1&_e=6avCMrMl1TsquRVZyPzjEHhQgQTe9zSii1Lu2EMpWRYyDr50WRXe_-R6k2hNtNxvFWmxNj-iSuoXYJAtPzqy9Coq4UTq_C3g8DUUDetBpxaSlSbs88cAPgxuA3niEkhQEp8eIY_9eqMRXnlX6zqj5rZWy-BVODgX_1fGKq_36RiKe53oPQ0tDxPaAq0Qre488ZWeUKChnHfFO6kGgZ-SqTN4fMCsfkaPPjqhRPUug1G28seeq5bAuadbapK-f6lyh6dwjMwr7NYH6zlE-y2Duk9wgrdlSn7g7UXvH70CZDg3jkro8_kUbihCLf-xY9fCLMQSGp8Muy7IJVsFcU9RkiS-AiyqHWM_ecqSIBgmFq5x1gFgXhAEu27TvGhRmRVnDIHDBoVYYCs_UMN_FT35RKH85u-e5cc5reeLKZQx2Cs%3D)

I have seen the dangers of this world, and I have stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right - which is why **I want to take on the anti-American, radical-Left in Washington.**

[**Will you lend your support to my fight by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or another amount today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=819b8cf8e55f4870b26d2d7585364ca1&_e=6avCMrMl1TsquRVZyPzjEHhQgQTe9zSii1Lu2EMpWRYyDr50WRXe_-R6k2hNtNxvFWmxNj-iSuoXYJAtPzqy9Coq4UTq_C3g8DUUDetBpxaSlSbs88cAPgxuA3niEkhQEp8eIY_9eqMRXnlX6zqj5rZWy-BVODgX_1fGKq_36RiKe53oPQ0tDxPaAq0Qre48U3MzyVVL1kRlnOe2llTJhvmNA4HjESlENIwuuZbsGbsirnXUAdRB5Czr7aEC9Ji4SAB2qt6dNFVNsncb3pAZ6metiCXgaizTc8Vi-gglHXc5DLXfiWuRdNriaAedmEzVK1YZDxZIQRm_0W45r77Uby7I2t_OXrVAKvMhRn6zmsL89DNFLooG0LNPO020m8YnJPJN1MNfpJXz-Qai-6n6zJKA1P-6SQIAIWWHggZl0fI%3D)

| [_SUPPORT ALEK_
**DONATE TODAY ›› **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=819b8cf8e55f4870b26d2d7585364ca1&_e=6avCMrMl1TsquRVZyPzjEHhQgQTe9zSii1Lu2EMpWRYyDr50WRXe_-R6k2hNtNxvFWmxNj-iSuoXYJAtPzqy9Coq4UTq_C3g8DUUDetBpxaSlSbs88cAPgxuA3niEkhQEp8eIY_9eqMRXnlX6zqj5rZWy-BVODgX_1fGKq_36RiKe53oPQ0tDxPaAq0Qre48gJBW6flNXYDLZNIC-73yk8HDeK7BnVdoLfWnNIUVBYd1Nc96Z6Uaf0wk_9_qVj1OoOsIfoGIRitfOIYZUc0GEfr_x1nqN-aNf7lffLyKU_9cqv-0CId6jz22VA94oxHeRrWiEpW-_tmIabTH0vpCK0_WkfJr_OJ8fuUkWdQaOyKOnLuB4saw7JNM4aQfUqGSLIbEFAD7AFiWkJ-mHIULjn3gybiRhb9HbIwv0hjLFS4%3D)
---

**For the first time since 1986** , there is no incumbent running for election in this coastal district, giving Republicans a REAL opportunity to pick up this seat and put it in our column, flipping the House majority in the process.

I am committed to restoring conservative leadership to this district. Southern Oregon’s economy has wasted away due to the Leftist control of the longtime incumbent and his radical-Left allies.

**I am running for Congress to represent the loggers, veterans, moms, dads and families that hold the American dream dear.** The constituents of Oregon’s 4th district are hard-workers who have fought to make ends-meet under the Leftist leadership that has only hindered them.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=819b8cf8e55f4870b26d2d7585364ca1&_e=6avCMrMl1TsquRVZyPzjEHhQgQTe9zSii1Lu2EMpWRYyDr50WRXe_-R6k2hNtNxvFWmxNj-iSuoXYJAtPzqy9Coq4UTq_C3g8DUUDetBpxaSlSbs88cAPgxuA3niEkhQEp8eIY_9eqMRXnlX6zqj5rZWy-BVODgX_1fGKq_36RiKe53oPQ0tDxPaAq0Qre48Kc_RPYotpN1uIUR5U4gIQ2KLIJVBD3lqf17x3OLh6uDnEOHXkAf9UfONExSi97Ag6BLAP6JjBHcHPvKj1znvFqH4CwvpCg0Mqgc6lRhMGc70lZdW2b_oYEb0s3770HUD6sgvOANzwjL-sCuTVI7-b-Rr69nyfwYo-xttR9c6q4kqx9FRm454d-ASTZGO-DXH_ftFzxWxQHcIAXzke6l5HY77p-M5gzVjGjkDsDRv6Tk%3D)

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=819b8cf8e55f4870b26d2d7585364ca1&_e=6avCMrMl1TsquRVZyPzjEHhQgQTe9zSii1Lu2EMpWRYyDr50WRXe_-R6k2hNtNxvFWmxNj-iSuoXYJAtPzqy9Coq4UTq_C3g8DUUDetBpxaSlSbs88cAPgxuA3niEkhQEp8eIY_9eqMRXnlX6zqj5rZWy-BVODgX_1fGKq_36RiKe53oPQ0tDxPaAq0Qre48dST4ZRmfKD0tGjdkn6sPumR5tluxkhq08JXTQGD7sTsAMHQQzrgTpned3Dt3cbcOT2fS-cZHcTJiMxkrtNF-X7R5HOUPKP74kJLnj6zqyXyX2poNISE1EhcFvXohVB6gvFDcUMKQ-qIWwXR5fUSUmhMbwvzguHEkFn5PnfMvFymdw_G3PuIE8YsK3OO-Bt7Zg8X7XWt16qX75srJn0d_onlmPmmWO7CmXUbaU_Xz-zU%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $10, $20 or even $50 today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=819b8cf8e55f4870b26d2d7585364ca1&_e=6avCMrMl1TsquRVZyPzjEHhQgQTe9zSii1Lu2EMpWRYyDr50WRXe_-R6k2hNtNxvFWmxNj-iSuoXYJAtPzqy9Coq4UTq_C3g8DUUDetBpxaSlSbs88cAPgxuA3niEkhQEp8eIY_9eqMRXnlX6zqj5rZWy-BVODgX_1fGKq_36RiKe53oPQ0tDxPaAq0Qre48OCKGlnbXXxMWugYOoq1e9ssKP-oIxyNEt2HqSYlwb7P8imQXWm0Gc9UK52MzjeV3C9jnQMSu9X1eMdNKlklkkVMhWaOFTZTGbjYxjWN9FOEIx5Pd_0WEzG8rw6oVfghbTs0ObbyNDnRY_1IfFk0MK7Kix3FhWhiMXW1ssvupEinMwTWX7YC0iqsJ102B4gxzA5supxeFbjsHxkwA6EJFHuVlAbamGqAS_0T8baGzmxg%3D)

[_SUPPORT ALEK_
**DONATE TODAY ›› **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=819b8cf8e55f4870b26d2d7585364ca1&_e=6avCMrMl1TsquRVZyPzjEHhQgQTe9zSii1Lu2EMpWRYyDr50WRXe_-R6k2hNtNxvFWmxNj-iSuoXYJAtPzqy9Coq4UTq_C3g8DUUDetBpxaSlSbs88cAPgxuA3niEkhQEp8eIY_9eqMRXnlX6zqj5rZWy-BVODgX_1fGKq_36RiKe53oPQ0tDxPaAq0Qre48NDQ7kmx22Kt6eCqsFz6p7Ybwr4s736w32GsKCdf0vjqXwFBfLg5Gyj79EKs-ObRsChGw404jJZMtc3mfaWc9md92N0p9fRVy2VY9o6Tl6klhtGLHjCLn6JkPjNBoeHpTjTaeO_kzpnLGUcP3XfMq85tcVEpGhPVrdkxt1avMckFp6G8p9ugELkt03OvcsnAuproVgOIepv-zaENO50N8tu-q5c47NHZeg3pfuHTFDs8%3D)

The constituents of Oregon’s 4th district are hard-workers who have fought to make ends-meet under the Leftist leadership that has only hindered them. My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress Paid for by Alek for Oregon

Always fighting for you, Brett | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- Paid for by Friends of Lindstrom Campaign - 2437 S. 130th Cir, Omaha, NE 68144

name: Nikki Fried
subject: I’m ready to walk out
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

The Florida Democratic Party just announced their decision to host the Leadership Blue Gala at Disney.

And I couldn’t be more disappointed.

Disney’s public response to the GOP’s attacks on Florida’s LGBTQ+ community has been tepid at best. And they waited months after the disgusting “Don’t Say Gay” bill was introduced to stop donating to politicians who supported it.

Now, Disney employees are staging a walkout to demand action, and today, I announced my intention to do the same.

If the Florida Democratic Party doesn’t change the location of this year’s Leadership Blue Gala — and if Disney doesn’t take real action to support the LGBTQ+ community — I won’t be attending.

I’m the ONLY Democrat in the Governor’s race who’s taking a stand on this, and that’s why I need you to stand with me. Click here to chip in $10 and help elect a Governor who isn’t afraid to stand up for what’s right and demand better for our LGBTQ+ community. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=322disney]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=322disney] Express Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=322disney] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=322disney] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=322disney] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=322disney] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=322disney]

Thank you for supporting me on this.

— Nikki

name: Drew Thompson
subject: Join the "work horse"!
body:
There's only a few weeks left! [](https://) Peter, Jane Timken is a "work horse, not a show horse", and we need you to join her on the front lines throughout the month of April! On April 2nd, Jane will be **rallying our team in Cincinnati at 9:00 a.m. and Columbus at 1:00 p.m. to kick off our get out the vote effort across the great state of Ohio! **Our Jane Timken teams will be meeting in Cincinnati, Dayton, Columbus, Canton, Findlay and Athens! Click the button below to join her that day, or one of our teams closer to you! name: =?utf-8?Q?Lori=20Chavez=2DDeRemer?=
subject: I want to know…
body:
Will you remember the Left’s COVID Mandates? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f84896985e0a/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-6797113?e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| | [****](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=98bb613dd6&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Friend,

For 2 years we have suffered through the Democrat's hypocrisy and watched them put our rights at stake by imposing unconstitutional mandates, that they didn't even follow themselves.

Since the beginning of the COVID-19 Pandemic, thousands of businesses have been crushed, schools have been closed, and our overall daily lives were turned upside down; **all thanks to the Radical Left forcing their mandates on the American people. **

The Radical Left threatened our constitutional freedoms, but I will ALWAYS fight for our rights.

[_**Which is why I want to know: will you remember the Democrats' COVID mandates when you vote in the midterm election? >>>**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=204bd16769&e=c87c5d8d97)
**[](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=6738d7f0f0&e=c87c5d8d97)**
The past years have shown us that we can’t always count on the Left to uphold our constitution, so why should we let them?

[_**Take the poll and let me know if you will have in mind the Left’s unconstitutional mandates when voting in the midterms! >>>**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=3ca6b46470&e=c87c5d8d97)
[****](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=9ba850a4f4&e=c87c5d8d97)
Thank you,

Lori Chavez-DeRemer

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nuestro=20PAC?=
subject: Beto Won the Primary, But Now He Needs Our Help
body:
Let's Win Texas | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nuestropac/beto-won-the-primary-but-now-he-needs-our-help-15931760?e=b8f90417f9)
---
| |
---
| | \-
Earlier this month, Beto O’Rourke [won the Democratic gubernatorial primary](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=0d7af1e11a&e=b8f90417f9) and is facing Governor Greg Abbott in the general election.

With Gov. Abbott’s and the GOP’s assaults on [reproductive rights](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=f480dbb5a9&e=b8f90417f9), [transgender rights](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=336ccfdeed&e=b8f90417f9), and [voting rights](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=34a3474c3b&e=b8f90417f9), it’s imperative that Texas has competent leadership. We need to rally behind Beto and get him elected in order to ensure all Texans’ rights are not infringed upon.

Beto has been [rallying volunteers](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=cd223600d6&e=b8f90417f9) to help him in the general election, but that won’t be enough to beat Gov. Abbott’s ever-growing financial war chest.

Will you [help us in supporting Beto win the general election in November?](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=f22946c7e0&e=b8f90417f9)

body:
Pelosi just reported another record-breaking fundraising haul.
| Friend,
---
I’ve already mentioned the unparalleled importance of fundraising in key races like ours – _more than 9 out of every 10 congressional elections are won by the better funded candidate._
---
But Pelosi’s DCCC just released their numbers from a record-breaking February: a haul of more than $19 million.
---
Now, Pelosi is sitting on nearly **$100 MILLION** in cash on hand to specifically target the 5 must-win seats – like Texas’ brand-new 38th district – that will determine the fate of her majority.
---
_Which is why we simply can’t afford to fall short at the FIRST FEC deadline of the election year._
---

clean_body: Pelosi just reported another record-breaking fundraising haul. | Friend, I’ve already mentioned the unparalleled importance of fundraising in key races like ours – more than 9 out of every 10 congressional elections are won by the better funded candidate. But Pelosi’s DCCC just released their numbers from a record-breaking February: a haul of more than $19 million. Now, Pelosi is sitting on nearly $100 MILLION in cash on hand to specifically target the 5 must-win seats – like Texas’ brand-new 38th district – that will determine the fate of her majority. Which is why we simply can’t afford to fall short at the FIRST FEC deadline of the election year. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Wesley Hunt Date: Sat, March 19, 2022 Subject: The reality we’re facing To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Numbers don’t lie... | Friend, I hate to say it, but money matters in elections. Reports have shown that in more than 9 out of every 10 congressional races the better funded candidate wins. And you can bet that in our race for Texas’ brand-new seat – 1 of the 5 seats we need to FLIP the House – Pelosi will use her war chest to ensure her handpicked liberal is well funded. That’s why crushing our FIRST quarterly goal of the general elections is so critical. After we close the books on this first quarter, Pelosi and her cronies will be meticulously combing through the reports... ...And if they see even the slightest sign of weakness, she’ll double down and pour millions more from her war chest into this district to prop up her radical puppet. We can’t take our foot off the gas at this pivotal moment. Which is why I’m reaching out to every last grassroots conservative like you, Friend, to help me hit our vital Q1 goal. There have been a LOT of big updates in our race so far -- and we're **not slowing down.** We got fair congressional maps, the DCCC added our race to their "Districts in Play" list, and we have a historic opportunity to finally flip this seat for the first time in decades.

During our State of the Race Virtual Zoom Event on March 23, we'll be joined by data expert and district native, Sam Nitz, to discuss the updates to our congressional maps and why this district is _so important_ to keeping a Democratic majority in November.

And of course, Ann will speak about the campaign trail and what's next on our journey to flip WI-01. Folks will have a chance to ask questions about Ann, Max, the new maps, or what the heck it means to be a "District in Play."

clean_body: | We've got an exciting event tomorrow and we'd love to see you there, friend! | There have been a LOT of big updates in our race so far -- and we're not slowing down. We got fair congressional maps, the DCCC added our race to their "Districts in Play" list, and we have a historic opportunity to finally flip this seat for the first time in decades. During our State of the Race Virtual Zoom Event on March 23, we'll be joined by data expert and district native, Sam Nitz, to discuss the updates to our congressional maps and why this district is so important to keeping a Democratic majority in November. And of course, Ann will speak about the campaign trail and what's next on our journey to flip WI-01. Folks will have a chance to ask questions about Ann, Max, the new maps, or what the heck it means to be a "District in Play." = – Shibani Chakrabarty Campaign Manager = = *

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Swapping snow boots for mud boots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220322&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220322&amount=28]
Team,
The snow is melting, the days are getting longer, and it’s looking like we’ve officially made it through our first false spring – that time of year Michiganders know all too well when the weather warms up for a few tantalizing days, and is immediately followed by inches of snow.
For me, it means swapping out my snow boots for mud boots as I continue to hit the ground in the new areas of my district (Eaton, Clinton, and Shiawassee Counties, as well as South Lyon and Milford in Oakland County, and a small slice of Genesee County with about 200 people).
But in campaign world, that also means we’re quickly approaching our first “end-of-quarter” deadline of the year. So yes, you can expect more emails than usual from me as we approach the March 31 deadline. Trust me, I know: that’s the last thing you want to hear. But here’s why it’s important and worth your time to put up with a few more emails than normal.
Four times a year, at the end of each fiscal quarter, campaigns are required by federal law to publicly release the amount of money they’ve raised, as well as how much money they have in the bank. The other side always watches these numbers, as do the media. And since this is the first quarter of an election year and my seat is a top target as Republicans look to flip the House – you can bet there will be even more folks across the country eagerly waiting to see how well we perform.
That’s why you’ll be hearing from me more for the next nine days.
But I only do this because I’m in one of the most competitive House races in the entire country. Performing well now will set us up for success when November rolls around, and help us make strategic, informed decisions about how to spend these dollars. So I’m asking if you will chip in today before our March 31st deadline to help me in my toughest election yet. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220322&amount=28]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220322&amount=28]
Elissa

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

Contact Elissa
P.O. BOX 244, HOLLY, MI 48442

name: 4Patriots
subject: NEW 8-Pound Solar Generator is HERE
body:
Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zp8vscjno8sqhj6eple6errc94i37v55bhntdnrg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjie0o32chh2bs)
# "Weird" 8-Pound Solar Device
Could Save Your Life in a
Dangerous Blackout
[**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zt00iehjhehkh4rilf0510iuaq2egr2rj185ch7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjie0o32chh2bs) [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zg01mv26ph7q19oo6qco3369tm5bllv8adi2f0l8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjie0o32chh2bs) If last year taught us anything... It's not IF you need a backup plan... it's **WHEN.** It's sad, but facts are facts... A deadly pandemic, blackouts sweeping the nation, storms, wildfires, hurricanes, social unrest and crumbling power grids. **Crisis mode has become the new normal.** And you see the need to protect yourself and your family. Hello I'm Cade Courtley, former Navy SEAL Platoon Commander, sniper and author of the _SEAL Survival Guide._ One of the best ways to protect your safety and comfort is to guarantee you're fully ready, even when the power goes out. Nothing feels more vulnerable than when you realize you're sitting in a dangerous blackout. Imagine all your critical devices, communications, comfort and protection, suddenly on borrowed time. That's what happened after Hurricane Ida when thousands of families faced being without power... for WEEKS. **You simply must have a backup power plan, no matter your situation or budget.** Well now you can... Because for the **FIRST TIME EVER** you can get a breakthrough NEW solar device... That harnesses the limitless and FREE energy of the sun, and that's **_safe to use inside_** because it's fume-free, silent and never needs gasoline to run. But if you want one, you better hurry... Because customers have been practically begging for this product to hit the market. And now that the first batches of units are ready to ship from Utah, USA... these mini solar generators won't be around for long. You're among the first to know about...
# The NEW Patriot Power Sidekick
Finally... a Mini Solar Generator
that Never Needs Gas and that Costs Less than an iPhone!
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z80pigla7t34o5kjsjgari6444ct8671dapddil8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjie0o32chh2bs) [**> > Video: This mini solar generator powers devices and weighs less than a housecat**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zeg1c33dbn6rhcknth9p59hrc1rdd3vqpvo4ifq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjie0o32chh2bs) _" I really like how many things the Sidekick can run. I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer_ Small and mighty, the Patriot Power Sidekick is your personal "portable power plant" that can power your phones, laptops, medical devices, radios and more! You'll also be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it 's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes.
* $190 in FREE Bonuses
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of
Your Preparedness Plan!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zucg8e5j5ci7kng56273c2p5h34jcsj49kv5abg0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjie0o32chh2bs) [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zbfm76q5hjjv6v4jkgdu3ps3gcs24k29divu9078_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjie0o32chh2bs) **You 'll Never Run Out of Juice** _" You can charge your phone 28 times and still have some juice left over. It has no shortage of power. It's very reliable and very good. It's the perfect addition to all of your other 4Patriots products." - Dan W._ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zt09grgtnr2aav40ddridd565jhlm38rc6l1olh0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cjie0o32chh2bs)
---

1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zrsagunf8i60qhopolevdjkbn3i3ff9hjscv8280_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1ctie9o30c9i649fg)

name: Team NPP
subject: We wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
The stakes are high, and the time is now for support from first-time donors like you.
The power of our vote now has a chance to face a democracy in peril.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43255521/336401784/-233903066?refcode=EM_FR_220322FirstTime_VR_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiOWMzOGYyLTEyYWEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lLa8yLxrZ2OqpcCKy0icanxu6O7UT1pyKotNG46VrVs=)
Fellow Activist,
Our team is working tirelessly to expand the electorate this year. But without help from our supporters, we will fail. We’re all in this together for the long haul – and we need you to help us out.
Eligible voters across Pennsylvania deserve to have the resources they need to get out and have their voices heard. That is why an early investment is everything in our endeavor to protect and expand our sacred right to vote.
We checked our records and saw you hadn't donated yet. **[Can you make your first donation of $3 - or whatever feels right to you – right now? We need all the help we can get in this long fight for freedom and justice.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43255522/336401795/-233903066?refcode=EM_FR_220322FirstTime_VR_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_L1&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiOWMzOGYyLTEyYWEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lLa8yLxrZ2OqpcCKy0icanxu6O7UT1pyKotNG46VrVs=)**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43255523/336401796/-233903066?refcode=EM_FR_220322FirstTime_VR_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_G1&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiOWMzOGYyLTEyYWEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lLa8yLxrZ2OqpcCKy0icanxu6O7UT1pyKotNG46VrVs=)
Anything you can give – if it’s $1, $3, or $1,000 counts. We need every penny to get us through this vital election year in this battleground state.
Here’s what your investment will do for Pennsylvania’s future:
* **Protecting voting rights.** With your support, we can better address the attacks on our sacred right to vote. We will work not only to expand the electorate but also work to make it easier for folks to gain access to the ballot, eliminate voter suppression, and combat election and voter disinformation.
* **Supporting communities.** With your support, we can better engage communities year-round and educate neighbors, colleagues, and friends about the issues that matter most and find solutions to the many problems that come about.

**[So, what do you say? Will you be a changemaker and give the gift of $3? The stakes are high, and the time is now for support from first-time donors like you.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43255524/336401797/-233903066?refcode=EM_FR_220322FirstTime_VR_TEAM_90DO_8_G_N_L2&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRiOWMzOGYyLTEyYWEtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lLa8yLxrZ2OqpcCKy0icanxu6O7UT1pyKotNG46VrVs=)**

Thank you for all that you do,

Team NPP

The power of our vote now has a chance to face a democracy in peril. = Fellow Activist, Our team is working tirelessly to expand the electorate this year. But without help from our supporters, we will fail. We’re all in this together for the long haul – and we need you to help us out. Eligible voters across Pennsylvania deserve to have the resources they need to get out and have their voices heard. That is why an early investment is everything in our endeavor to protect and expand our sacred right to vote. We checked our records and saw you hadn't donated yet. = = Anything you can give – if it’s $1, $3, or $1,000 counts. We need every penny to get us through this vital election year in this battleground state. Here’s what your investment will do for Pennsylvania’s future: Protecting voting rights. With your support, we can better address the attacks on our sacred right to vote. We will work not only to expand the electorate but also work to make it easier for folks to gain access to the ballot, eliminate voter suppression, and combat election and voter disinformation. name: Mandela Barnes
subject: I need your help to defeat Ron Johnson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7322?t=6&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV) Friends \-

I was born in Milwaukee, in one of the most impoverished and incarcerated zip codes in the state. A community lacking resources, but brimming with joy, resilience, and hardworking, brilliant people.

My mom was a Milwaukee school teacher for 30 years, and my dad worked the 3rd shift at the General Motors plant. They were both active union members organizing for better wages and defending workers' rights. Their example showed me the importance of working hard and fighting for opportunity for everyone.

My parents taught me the values of hard work, perseverance, and the importance of a good education. They also taught me that we can't settle for what is - we have to reach for what can be.

That is why I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin.

Now, I don't have huge amounts of personal wealth to fund this campaign. And I am not accepting any corporate PAC money. That means I'm counting on people like you to defeat Ron Johnson and win back this seat for Democrats.

We're just 9 days away from the first FEC filing deadline of 2022. We can't afford to miss any fundraising goals if we want to stay competitive in this crucial race. So I'm asking you directly: **[Can you please split a $5 contribution between my campaign and Voter Protection Project today? Every donation is important to the success of our campaign.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7323?t=7&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7324?t=8&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7325?t=9&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7326?t=10&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7327?t=11&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7322?t=12&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV)
Sadly, politicians like Senator Ron Johnson are standing in the way of progress. Johnson has repeatedly turned his back on Wisconsin, instead peddling wild conspiracy theories and cynical attacks that divide us.

But let's be clear: this campaign isn't just about defeating Ron Johnson. It is about expanding opportunity to everyone in Wisconsin and across the country, regardless of where they live or where they were born.

When things get tough, we shouldn't lower our expectations. Instead of changing our dreams, we need to change the game.

In the U.S. Senate, I will be committed to taking on the existential threat of climate change, creating good-paying jobs, and ensuring health care is granted as a right to everyone. But I cannot do that alone - it is going to require all of us.

The only way we'll have the resources to build a winning campaign is from lots of people contributing what they can. If you can afford it, can you add your donation today?
**[Friends, we only have 9 days left before our crucial FEC filing deadline. Johnson is looking for any signs of weakness in our campaign. So please, split a $5 contribution between my campaign and Voter Protection Project today.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7323?t=13&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV)**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7324?t=14&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7325?t=15&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7326?t=16&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7327?t=17&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7322?t=18&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV)
Together we are going to win this primary, defeat Ron Johnson, and change the game in Wisconsin and across the country. Thanks for chipping in to make that possible.

All my best,

Mandela Barnes
[CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/7322?t=19&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=20&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1613%2E878179%2EWvvhIV)

Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson is a highly qualified nominee who would make a crucial impact on the court. But the GOP will do whatever it takes to block her confirmation. Your voice right now has incredible power to help us get Judge Jackson on the court and keep Mitch McConnell from sabotaging _another_ seat.
**But with time running out before our EXTENDED live poll closes at midnight tonight, we still need to hear from you! Please, tell us immediately:**

Friend, our hard-fought battle to elect Joe Biden and flip the Senate in 2020 has led to a historic moment: Today, confirmation hearings begin for Supreme Court nominee Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson.

Judge Jackson is an incredible jurist who started as a public defender and would be the first Black woman ever to serve on the court.
But with Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans already threatening to obstruct President Biden's nominee, we need Senate Democrats to act FAST to ensure Judge Jackson gets confirmed as soon as possible.

Peter -

On his first day in the White House, President Joe Biden canceled the nearly completed Keystone XL pipeline that would have dramatically increased America's energy availability.

To no one's surprise, gas prices - and everything from building materials to food - quickly rose, _especially impacting working families across South Carolina and the United States, leaving us at the mercy of dictators._

Peter, this is particularly frustrating considering that under President Donald J. Trump, his America First energy policies had our country _energy independent_ for the first time in six decades.

But Joe Biden and Democrats threw that all away, again making America dependent on foreign sources of oil from the most volatile - or antagonistic - regions of the world.

That's why I've joined 24 of my fellow Republican Governors in calling on Joe Biden to restore American energy independence now.

| "As governors, we call on President Biden to reverse his policies and restore America's energy independence for our citizens as well as our allies abroad. By removing his bans on new oil and gas development on federal lands, building the Keystone XL pipeline, and reinstating regulatory reforms to streamline energy permitting, we can protect our national energy security and sell to our friends rather than buy from our enemies—specifically Russia. Family budgets have already been stretched thin following record inflation. People in our states cannot afford another spike at the gas pump, and our allies cannot afford to be held hostage by Putin's tyranny and aggression."

-- Letter to President Biden
---

Peter, Want to win tickets for a chance to see President Trump in person? He’s headlining the “Countdown to the Majority” event in Dallas, Texas on May 9th, and you could be the lucky winner who is selected to travel with a guest to see him, all expenses paid. **All you have to do is make a grassroots donation right now and you’ll be entered to win!**
---
[**DONATE NOW & BE ENTERED TO WIN >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9245ee33f42014fd/a8d235f84a3b8fb5c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
---
We’ll cover the cost of the dinner, your travel, and your hotel stay. Don’t miss this chance to meet some of the most influential people in Republican politics today — maybe even President Trump himself. You’re not going to want to miss this great opportunity! [**Enter now to win.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9245ee33f42014fd/4781cf811b9fdbe2c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Hope to see you there! -Team Hern for Congress ###
---
You can read the full contest rules [here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9245ee33f42014fd/1b51b280687980fbc3d6b838967d376c/34143) Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by [clicking here. ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9245ee33f42014fd/2ebf62388fe50f20c3d6b838967d376c/34143)
NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution use this form. To enter without making a contribution, click [here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/9245ee33f42014fd/f61abad601220870c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Wednesday, March 9th, 2022 at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Sunday, May 1st, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, May 1st, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the May 9th NRCC 2022 Majority Dinner; transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the NRCC, within the continental United States to event location and from winner’s home location, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at a Dallas, Texas hotel, with an approximate retail value of $500. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,500. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the Official Rules. The Sponsor is NRCC, 320 First St SE, Washington, DC 20003.

name: Bobby Maggio, John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: Dinner with Donald
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Two updates on Trump and the polls.
#
It was a BIG week down in Florida, Derek.
**Dr. Oz flew out to have dinner with Donald Trump + Melania Trump at Mar-a-Lago. Then Trump spoke out in favor of Dr. Oz at a MAGA rally.**
We cannot emphasize how critical it is that we treat Trump’s apparent support of Oz as a serious issue in this race. _After all, Trump won Pennsylvania in 2016._
[__](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45865?refcode=em20220322-5085&t=1&akid=5085%2E434096%2EGRRzgY)
**[Derek, can you help our team stand up and fight back against Trump + Dr. Oz by making a donation today? There is a lot of national attention on our race, and we need all hands on deck to help fight against whatever the Republicans and their super PACs are going to throw our way.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45865?refcode=em20220322-5085&t=2&akid=5085%2E434096%2EGRRzgY)**
**[Fight Back: Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45865?refcode=em20220322-5085&t=3&akid=5085%2E434096%2EGRRzgY)**
**Here’s what else you need to know about Dr. Oz and our campaign.** Yesterday, a dark money super PAC supporting one of our opponents dropped a nine-page memo attacking John and our campaign.
...where it pointed out that John is 30 points ahead of his next closest primary opponent in the polls.
...which showed that **John is the only Democratic candidate who can beat Dr. Oz** outside the margin of error + flip this seat blue.
Derek, it’s more important than ever that our campaign grows its grassroots power so we can win our primary this May, beat Dr. Oz this November, and flip this seat blue. Especially now that Trump name-checked Oz.
**[Can you please chip in your first $5 donation today to support our campaign against future attacks from super PACs and the GOP? Each and every dollar you give makes a HUGE difference for a people-powered campaign like ours.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45865?refcode=em20220322-5085&t=4&akid=5085%2E434096%2EGRRzgY)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45865?refcode=em20220322-5085&amounts=5&t=23&akid=5085%2E434096%2EGRRzgY)**
Together, I know we can take on whatever Trump + Dr. Oz throw our way.
Thanks for your support,
Bobby Maggio
Campaign Manager, Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220322-5085-footer&t=24&refcode2=5085_434096_GRRzgY&akid=5085%2E434096%2EGRRzgY)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=5085%2E434096%2EGRRzgY)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: We MUST Protect Fairness in Women's Sports
body:
In Florida, fair play in competition will always be upheld and opportunities in sports will never be replaced by woke ideologies.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001BSu8AiY7JW15Xl68vf3q1HhYHpx_p8nIWLwcumHKDiuCvPt3y-xjpl7zd6Y6PRNrhLUrKGpSrrFoa1pAu5xUidztH-aXojKlBeO-ZWJLSFKBXOnXQtU8kwUsgNULwzLmZIDCDIN0_Tc6zmjGmnFNFFMsyuBwD0eYLW6KZwpyfO8=&c=9vqcXiQtn9MfQLDZuGjDzXmYNnNXRkQkqTI5UlMAGUc7vIZVuBaVWg==&ch=x2HXtpGGqgA6LpV7kK7b4g4xTjqbvoGKfUycgFzdEgxMAWq4Y7sKaw==)
---
| Peter, The NCAA is perpetuating a fraud on the American public and undermining the integrity of female sports, by allowing men to compete against women. This organization is putting ideology ahead of opportunity, and wokeness ahead of fairness. And by doing so, they are preventing and depriving female athletes who have trained and worked so hard from realizing their dreams. This afternoon, I issued a proclamation stating that a Sarasota native and UVA swimmer is the best female swimmer in the 500-meter freestyle in the nation, because she undoubtedly is. In Florida, as long as I am your governor, fair play in competition will always be upheld and opportunities in sports will never be replaced by woke ideologies. name: Cora Neumann
subject: Friend, it’s National Agriculture Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
Montana farming and ranching is the backbone of our local economy. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43256049/336404111/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2MwZjgzNi0xNmFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b2jzfxLtnmH9-wYIRq3zZBRSjGfuKLIe6UKqAlLZ9TE=) Hey friend, Today is National Agriculture Day. Everything we eat, use, and wear all starts with agriculture -- and today we celebrate the hardworking farmers and ranchers across the country who help make that possible. **Agriculture is the largest industry in Montana.** I’ve had the privilege of traveling the district and meeting with many of the farmers and ranchers who’ve dedicated their lives to help feed our country. Their hard work and dedication contributes almost $5.2 billion to our economy annually, making it an integral part of Montana and American life. In my rural health work, I am grateful to partner with farmers and ranchers in keeping our communities healthy and look forward to continuing this work in Congress. Unfortunately, external threats are making it harder for family farms and businesses to secure their future here. Higher land prices, extreme drought, corporate processing, and increased turbulence in the industry are discouraging young people from taking over family farms and ranches. Some families are even selling their soil-rich land to developers to help repay their debts. **We cannot afford to let this trend continue. ** **Montana’s farmers and ranchers are the backbone of our economy. They need a representative who’s willing to work with them and advocate for them -- not force them into giving up their land to avoid foreclosure.** [**I’m prepared to go to bat for the farmers and ranchers in our community, but I can’t do it without your help. Can you chip in $3 today to help support my campaign for Congress? clean_body: This is U.S. House Republican Whip Steve Scalise. I’m writing today to tell you I am officially endorsing Lisa Scheller for Congress. I’m also writing Peter, This is U.S. House Republican Whip Steve Scalise. I’m writing today to tell you I am officially endorsing Lisa Scheller for Congress. I’m proud to serve in the GOP House leadership because I know our party is hard at work on policies that will actually benefit the American people. Unfortunately, Nancy Pelosi and the rest of the House Democrats are determined to stop us from making any progress at all. Instead of pragmatic, commonsense policies to serve our hardworking families, the House Democrats are focused on massive activist spending bills to fund their liberal pet projects and placate their Far Left dark-money donors. This is why it’s so important we take back the House this November and get things back on track. It’s also why we need your support to help Lisa fight back against the liberal special interests propping up her opponent. The Democrats know the House majority is on the line in the midterms, which is why they’ll stop at nothing to try and keep radical Susan Wild in power even though she has not accomplished one valuable thing to support her district or our country. As you probably know, Pennsylvania’s newly-redrawn 7th district is one of the TOP races on the map in this election. It’s critical we flip this seat from Blue to Red if we want to fire Pelosi and take back the House. Not only will it mean PA-07 will finally have a representative who works for them, but it also means we can finally start getting some real things done in Congress. We’re going to need all of Pennsylvania’s top patriots to step up and help elect Lisa to be PA-07’s next Congresswoman. Thanks, Steve Scalise House Republican Whip Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

We wanted you to be the first to know: We're feeling hopeful.

Thanks to the support of folks like you, we made a massive ad investment earlier this month — more than $13 million to reach every single voter in New Hampshire and reelect Maggie in November.

**It wasn’t an easy decision, but we had to...** Maggie's last election was decided by just 1,017 votes, and we have no doubt that this one will be just as close. We don't take any vote for granted, and an ad investment like this one will ensure Maggie's message reaches every corner of the Granite State.

But, here's where we need your help: New Hampshire's ad market is one of the most expensive in the country, and when we made this ad reservation, we knew we didn't have all of the money that we'd need — not even close — to execute the full advertising plan.

**So today, we're asking for just $3 to help us stay on track and reelect Maggie Hassan in November. We know that $3 may not seem like a lot, but by the time you read this email, someone else has already chipped in. And in a grassroots campaign like this one, these donations really start to add up. **

**[_If you care about reelecting Maggie, keeping New Hampshire blue, and defending the Democratic Senate majority, please donate $3 right now. The Supreme Court nomination hearings have begun, Peter Willis.
The Senate has an incredible opportunity to confirm _the first Black woman_ and _the first public defender_ to serve on the Supreme Court in U.S. history. **And we’ve got to make sure they follow through.**
**[Sign on today to call for the Senate to confirm Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmAD87zVM2r0JK007LjlZzBk2q1PZGySzarPc5jweBDF9TCWqqPONZHH6lft3989_A5hVepIWtXMrb8zsZR-nnjXw5tS2D4wLFfEcwSOJEgIq228r9N87VCNMKUcDZNbtJxX4P3B8q60f7O2vd09tQ3WbrdNNwElnBfVOqJFadfj1y295B8l0upx43jJ45J-u10E4smYCOroxJ9FPa495jSKaisiXhJ7M9-6cGy4vxCIpewZ8456Efx4FJOlU_g32kkU6PY7UDs2e1akDYzph88PFOZtkl3vZcIjUG3WqwUj5e5wI3nlsmI2qq91gTqQYwW7vI_qGd0pFCVyqBZbL3tIRAHH3WOtKBstpJOccLFx5DFJTJz0Bxja3CxElgt2C4/3kk/Cz_cyEFMT0i9ePiz-Dj5Ww/h1/vRtvxDceYRqfBOmz0MOkgu01HndkBQpSNP653a66iXc)**
[Add your name](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmAD87zVM2r0JK007LjlZzBk2q1PZGySzarPc5jweBDF9TCWqqPONZHH6lft3989_A5hVepIWtXMrb8zsZR-nnjXw5tS2D4wLFfEcwSOJEgIvTAkI3S-W9RlCSLftKQyqgDVdH7s-ktvCbTlX0LFUF4YtXSOhfIe-QjUmFTOayUCGjWrEsukkbFbOlPKwxuZIzYuoCA_jjrTRtj1bpIlx64mZUmTeRFVixqEAyH52JbXkiHpMBL0T2u7SWN-IVsSQ3Y3VjCUm54ZBVds9YYB3UzFbewfgQBPfwbic8Pds99D3zUS2CGbUfLE993wAzZXuGDpxcybSNvGMj49mIqQ_q8ys2zkq1TjKBDfbQ3-ASixlXvbTIXG9ADzCxOy3sSFf8/3kk/Cz_cyEFMT0i9ePiz-Dj5Ww/h2/Va272vnftcZimc2hUVQsva8f9bhcVI2Zd7yIY0KNoD4)
---
Since the Supreme Court was created in 1789, there have been 115 Justices. **_All but 7 (!) have been white men, and zero have been public defenders or Black women._**
For generations, these white men passed down judgements that have radically altered Americans’ daily lives. They’ve dictated what women are allowed to do with their own bodies, determined who was allowed to vote on the basis of race, gender, and socioeconomic status, and decided whether people or corporations would have more sway over elected representatives (spoiler alert: they sided with corporations, and our politics have been broken ever since).
That’s what makes Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination so important. For the first time, Black women and girls will see themselves represented in the highest court in the land. And her experience as a public defender shows that she will stand up for marginalized communities.
For too long, our legal system has catered to the wealthy and well-connected at the expense of working people who can’t afford expensive lawyers to advocate on their behalf. Judge Jackson’s nomination is a critical step in fixing the imbalance of our legal system, tilting it towards one that works for ALL of us.
**[Add your name today to call on the Senate to confirm Judge Jackson to the Supreme Court!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmAD87zVM2r0JK007LjlZzBk2q1PZGySzarPc5jweBDF9TCWqqPONZHH6lft3989_A5hVepIWtXMrb8zsZR-nnjXw5tS2D4wLFfEcwSOJEgInsyk3d1HmYBPf6krMOND6nQ__39SvPoEnV9TGamZ8LfQbKatsLeEjabhG_F1hkizG_wDuCD7O36uqULlIgvahUPn2PT2cYiuVgqp_TJBGMxZlFd_bxdCnHCH9TbrrtjndpctPv9Jki4pJ8BgVXud0j4sKbr3YXE2XNGjCXO8AIOmvCN3jtM148rp6wFdu4z8uwWy9IScFefBY93vzDbeApGwUXdWR5CLvuZ4Hz2MdAHhrT2lV0PlQW2Hr0ZdDc3DpGkIOuTqIe2ZLyc3DMLCog/3kk/Cz_cyEFMT0i9ePiz-Dj5Ww/h3/6R39bml1b6IE-t-kflPkMceDyUMHg_Hqp_PxgBKv_SA) **

name: Morgan Harper
subject: Confirming Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Confirmation hearings for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court are underway.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220322-829-footer-ak&t=2&akid=829%2E90090%2ESXgHfc)
Confirmation hearings for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court are underway, and this historic nomination is long overdue.
Black women have been leaders as lawyers and judges for generations. But one thing will stand out when the full Senate votes on Judge Jackson in the coming days: **of the 100 Senators in the room, not one will be a Black woman.**
Our time has come, finally, in 2022 to make it to the highest court in the land. And on our campaign, we also have a chance to make history by electing the first Black woman to represent Ohio in the U.S. Senate.
[**_That’s why I’m reaching out to our strongest supporters to ask: Can you chip in $15 to help fuel our history-making movement?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29612?refcode=em20220322-829&t=3&akid=829%2E90090%2ESXgHfc)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29612?refcode=em20220322-829&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=829%2E90090%2ESXgHfc)**
Despite this huge milestone, and Judge Jackson’s impressive record, the GOP is already making baseless attacks on Judge Jackson’s character and qualifications. And with a razor-thin 50 seat Democratic majority in the Senate, we need all the votes we can get.
[**_That’s why we _have_ to flip this seat blue and expand that razor-thin majority with a Senator who’s ready to make some history of her own. Can you chip in to help make it happen?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29612?refcode=em20220322-829&t=23&akid=829%2E90090%2ESXgHfc)
You can be sure I would proudly vote YES on Judge Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court, and I look forward to seeing her on the bench soon.
Thank you,
Morgan Harper
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220322-829-footer&t=24&refcode2=829_90090_SXgHfc&akid=829%2E90090%2ESXgHfc)**

name: Doug White
subject: World Water Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
It’s World Water Day!

From the beginning, I’ve made water security and protecting our environment a top priority of my campaign for Congress.

Each year, our district faces drought that could devastate businesses and the livelihoods of the thousands of families they support. As a fourth-generation farmer, I understand exactly how much we rely on access to clean drinking and irrigation water.

Here’s the thing, though: We have sufficient water, as well as the capability to secure funding and build proper storage to protect our district from the impacts of drought – **but our elected officials have chosen to ignore this threat and failed to move critical projects forward that would ensure water security in the Fourth District.**

[On World Water Day, I’m asking my supporters to join me in demanding action from our elected officials – here in WA-04 and across the country – to secure water access for _everyone_.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43256564/336407226/490514154?refcode=DW_EM_PT_90DO_220322_1_1&refcode2=7fdac9f6-19aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=RTkI0tNruUo+LyTmANQuXs/eMB1JKi2bweATdXZbIU9rPUmURzlG3YMaQOYR4vTR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmRhYzlmNi0xOWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1pKOdXFZq-U1tzWnS-fuPuX5aCLh-t2tywEWMHtnhf8=&emci=cc96363a-19aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7fdac9f6-19aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=7651992) | | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43256565/336407227/490514154?refcode=DW_EM_PT_90DO_220322_1_1&refcode2=7fdac9f6-19aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&contactdata=RTkI0tNruUo+LyTmANQuXs/eMB1JKi2bweATdXZbIU9rPUmURzlG3YMaQOYR4vTR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmRhYzlmNi0xOWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1pKOdXFZq-U1tzWnS-fuPuX5aCLh-t2tywEWMHtnhf8=&emci=cc96363a-19aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7fdac9f6-19aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=7651992)**

Thank you for speaking up in defense of this basic human right!

Doug

clean_body: | | It’s World Water Day! From the beginning, I’ve made water security and protecting our environment a top priority of my campaign for Congress. Each year, our district faces drought that could devastate businesses and the livelihoods of the thousands of families they support. As a fourth-generation farmer, I understand exactly how much we rely on access to clean drinking and irrigation water. Here’s the thing, though: We have sufficient water, as well as the capability to secure funding and build proper storage to protect our district from the impacts of drought – but our elected officials have chosen to ignore this threat and failed to move critical projects forward that would ensure water security in the Fourth District. | | Working together, we can make the Fourth District a better place to live, where ample water supplies support a balanced economy, creating both a thriving agricultural sector and high-technology jobs. Thank you for speaking up in defense of this basic human right! Doug | PAID FOR BY DOUG WHITE FOR CONGRESS Doug White for Congress PO Box 9674 Yakima, WA 98909 United States Doug White is running to represent Washington’s 4th Congressional District in Congress. To support his campaign, = or =. Email is the best way for our grassroots movement to stay in touch, but if you need to, you can unsubscribe here: . Do you want to help build the power we need to send Doug to Congress? Forward this email to a friend, neighbor or colleague and follow the campaign on , and .

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Speaker Pelosi’s Weekly Grassroots Volunteer Update: Happy 12th Birthday, Affordable Care Act! Wed. March 23rd at 5:30p PT / 8:30p ET
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Dear Friends,

Please join me and my special guest, Congresswoman Karen Bass, on Wednesday, March 23rd at 5:30 PM PT / 8:30 PM ET as we celebrate the 12th Anniversary of the Affordable Care Act and our ongoing efforts to deliver health care — despite Republican sabotage!

Today, the ACA covers more than 20 million people directly and provides more than 130 million families with protections for preexisting conditions.

As Democrats are still working to increase access to health care and save more lives, however, Republicans are still plotting to kill the Affordable Care Act – in the midst of a pandemic that has left millions more Americans with a new preexisting condition: COVID.

We won’t let them!

Register here to join us our discussion on fighting Republican attacks on our health care, the historic confirmation hearing for Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson to ascend to the Supreme Court, and our continued support and assistance to the people of Ukraine:

https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/1016437740912/WN_wRJIEKUeR0SPRUZ5Bzk7eg

I look forward to being with all of you again. Thank you for all you do!

Warmest regards,

NANCY

Nancy Pelosi is the Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.
As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=footer&amount=25] SHOP [https://store.pelosiforcongress.org/]Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. # 10K in 10 Days

**You got us on the ballot, now help us get to D.C.!** There are a lot of candidates in the race, but we are the only campaign who is going to D.C. to bring power back to this district by leading with passion and curiosity. **We have been in this race for over a year, and we know how to win, but we need your support in getting there.**
[****](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=428d707dd5&e=339f142c50)
Next Thursday is our filing deadline for this quarter, so we are going that grassroots organizing is the only way to make sure people's interests are protected when it comes to electing our representatives. So, we are launching our [10K in 10 days campaign](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=a0b15c54d6&e=339f142c50)! **Over the next ten days, we will be hosting virtual events, raffles and ways to get engaged to reach our goal of raising $10,000 before the filing deadline.** I hope you are able to participate and help us reach our goal!

Yours in service,

Jahmal

name: Dr. Kermit Jones
subject: Not a bumper sticker candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43262767/336439232/-682417230?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220322sticker_dkj_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWJiZDc3Ni0zY2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wh8fzGSEBvawPd7dGZH0eoSdMx7zsGCVDrkLjGdk3ms=)
---
Friend, You may have noticed I don’t have a slogan, catchphrase, or token issue. Yes, I’m a doctor, and I care _a lot_ about lowering the cost of health care and prescription drugs. I even have a [healthcare plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43262768/336439233/430881175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWJiZDc3Ni0zY2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wh8fzGSEBvawPd7dGZH0eoSdMx7zsGCVDrkLjGdk3ms=&emci=5de2124f-07aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=59bbd776-3caa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=16675641#healthcare?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220322sticker_dkj_90da_xx_l1) reviewed by industry experts. But I also deployed to Iraq twice, and it’s important to me that my fellow veterans are taken care of when they return home. So, I have a [10-page plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43262769/336439234/-826852235?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220322sticker_dkj_90da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWJiZDc3Ni0zY2FhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wh8fzGSEBvawPd7dGZH0eoSdMx7zsGCVDrkLjGdk3ms=&emci=5de2124f-07aa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=59bbd776-3caa-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=16675641) on how Congress can better support veterans and their families. And I’m raising my family in California, so climate change and their future is top of mind. During the fires last year my seven-year old son with asthma couldn’t go outside, and spent his days in coughing fits. I’m working on a plan to address wildfire prevention, win raises for firefighters, and protect our clean air. So I suppose if I were to have a slogan it would have to be **Dr. Kermit Jones: Not a Bumper Sticker Candidate.** So team, if you’re ready to elect a Democrat who wants to champion _all the issues and get really into the details_ , then I hope to earn your support, because that’s who I am. Yours, Dr. Kermit P.S. My fundraising team would probably like it if I spent less time in the weeds of policy and more time calling folks for money so we can afford more voter outreach... **can you help us meet our End-of-Quarter goal so we can share my plans with the voters?** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Friend, You may have noticed I don’t have a slogan, catchphrase, or token issue. Yes, I’m a doctor, and I care a lot about lowering the cost of health care and prescription drugs. I even have a reviewed by industry experts. But I also deployed to Iraq twice, and it’s important to me that my fellow veterans are taken care of when they return home. So, I have a on how Congress can better support veterans and their families. And I’m raising my family in California, so climate change and their future is top of mind. During the fires last year my seven-year old son with asthma couldn’t go outside, and spent his days in coughing fits. I’m working on a plan to address wildfire prevention, win raises for firefighters, and protect our clean air. So I suppose if I were to have a slogan it would have to be Dr. Kermit Jones: Not a Bumper Sticker Candidate. So team, if you’re ready to elect a Democrat who wants to champion all the issues and get really into the details , then I hope to earn your support, because that’s who I am. Yours, Dr. Kermit P.S. My fundraising team would probably like it if I spent less time in the weeds of policy and more time calling folks for money so we can afford more voter outreach... can you help us meet our End-of-Quarter goal so we can share my plans with the voters? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = | Kermit Jones is a Democrat, doctor, and Navy veteran running for Congress in California's 3rd District. = | = | Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress Kermit Jones for Congress PO Box 713 Roseville, CA 95661 United States Kermit Jones is a former member of the U.S. Navy.
