clean_body: we’ve got to keep up the pressure | Peter, The pressure we’ve been able to put on the state legislature and Governor’s office is working, thanks to support from strong Democrats like you. Yesterday evening Governor Eric Holcomb vetoed HB1041 — a bill that would have villainized innocent children who wanted to play the sports they enjoy with their friends. The moment the Indiana High School Athletic Association admitted there was no unfair advantage occurring in women’s sports, it became clear what House Bill 1041 was about: national GOP culture wars. Indiana Republicans even admitted their goal was more about abiding by national politics than solving today’s problems facing kids — and it’s why they partnered with a national hate group to pass House Bill 1041. It’s encouraging to see Governor Holcomb tell his party that their culture wars have crossed the line. This is a HUGE victory for Hoosier families — signing House Bill 1041 into law would have put the lives of our children in jeopardy — but, the fight doesn’t stop and the Governor’s desk. The Republicans in the Indiana legislature have the opportunity to override this veto in the next legislative session and reverse Governor Holcomb’s decision to protect trans children. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Nothing is wrong being transgender, because it’s exactly how God created them and is exactly who they were born to be. Indiana Democrats value and will advocate for the state’s transgender community because they have a place in our state and future just as everyone else, and we hope you’ll help us continue to work to uplift, support, and protect trans and queer folk across Indiana. subject: Fwd: Volunteer Kickoff Phone Bank
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We're hosting our first ever Volunteer Kickoff Phone Bank with John + Gisele Fetterman next week — and you’re invited!
#
Hi Derek,
Don’t miss your chance to join John + Gisele Fetterman at our Volunteer Kickoff Phone Bank tomorrow, March 23, at 6:00 PM ET!
Join us for a training + phone bank to reach out to voters across the Commonwealth.
[**_Can you RSVP now so we know if you’re coming? This is your chance to meet John + Gisele and show support for our campaign._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45458?t=1&akid=5087%2E434096%2E2uZwn3)
\----------Forwarded message---------
From: JohnFetterman.com
Date: Mar 18 2022, 9:31 a.m.
Subject: RSVP: Volunteer Kickoff Phone Bank
It's official, Derek!
We are now TWO months away from the Pennsylvania Democratic primary. And in order to win, we need to scale up field operations all across PA.
**That’s why we are hosting our first ever Volunteer Kickoff Phone Bank with John + Gisele Fetterman on Wednesday, March 23 at 6:00 PM ET** — and you’re invited!
[**_Can you please RSVP now to let John know if you can make it? This is a virtual event on Zoom that is open to the public._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45458?t=2&akid=5087%2E434096%2E2uZwn3)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45458?t=3&akid=5087%2E434096%2E2uZwn3)
**[Get more info or RSVP](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45458?t=4&akid=5087%2E434096%2E2uZwn3)**
The event starts with remarks directly from John + Gisele. Then, we’ll jump right into the phone bank training and start making calls to folks all across PA!
Our Volunteer Kickoff Phone Bank is the next step in expanding our grassroots movement in all 67 PA Counties. After all, **having conversations with PA voters is the #1 way we build support for John + our campaign across the Commonwealth.**
We can’t wait to see you soon!
— Team Fetterman HQ 💛
**[Get more info or RSVP](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45458?t=5&akid=5087%2E434096%2E2uZwn3)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220322-5087-footer&t=6&refcode2=5087_434096_2uZwn3&akid=5087%2E434096%2E2uZwn3)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=7&akid=5087%2E434096%2E2uZwn3)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=5087%2E434096%2E2uZwn3)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Peter, here’s the latest update on my revolutionary four-day workweek legislation in Congress:
* Lawmakers like AOC, Pramila Jayapal, and the Congressional Progressive Caucus are lining up to support my bill
* Major companies and even countries around the world are implementing their own four-day workweeks with incredible success
* **And now – the New York Times has profiled my legislation in a new piece:**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43261130/336430900/301334478?amount=4&refcode=MTFC_20220322_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGY5OTMyYS0zMWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJNi5SVegDhzQck5-vPezXjK5rTi84Pt41PjIMUh51g=) [**Peter, if we don’t capitalize on this momentum NOW, support for a four-day workweek could tumble. Can I count on you to chip in $4 or $4 now to boost momentum for a four-day workweek and demand better conditions for American workers? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43261131/336430901/301334478?amount=4&refcode=MTFC_20220322_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGY5OTMyYS0zMWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJNi5SVegDhzQck5-vPezXjK5rTi84Pt41PjIMUh51g=) | [$4,000 NEEDED: CHIP IN $4 FOR A FOUR-DAY WORKWEEK »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43261132/336430902/301334478?amount=4&amounts=4,7,10&refcode=MTFC_20220322_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGY5OTMyYS0zMWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJNi5SVegDhzQck5-vPezXjK5rTi84Pt41PjIMUh51g=)

Look Peter, the world has changed. With a shift toward dual income households, families need time to raise children and take care of household tasks.

With a rise in automation, American workers are more productive than ever – but incomes haven’t budged.

A four-day workweek would revolutionize how we work, play, and live. And it has never come at a more important time.

[**Peter, don’t let this momentum die. Chip in $4 to give Americans the freedom to live their lives. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43261133/336430903/301334478?amount=4&refcode=MTFC_20220322_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGY5OTMyYS0zMWFhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jJNi5SVegDhzQck5-vPezXjK5rTi84Pt41PjIMUh51g=)

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: A significant dip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
So far, only about 68% of the people who gave to our campaign last quarter have given this quarter. Give me a moment to briefly explain why this temporary lapse matters so much to our campaign, especially today. Hello —

In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for the United States Senate in Wisconsin ahead of our FEC fundraising deadline on March 31. Can I briefly explain why this request is so important, especially today?

My team and I set an aggressive online fundraising goal for Q1 — the first financial quarter of this critical election year. We thought we would have enough resources to keep our TV ads running and compete with Ron Johnson’s campaign commercials. Frankly, I'm just not sure that's the case anymore.

**So far, only about 68% of the people who gave to our campaign last quarter have given this quarter.** Online donations have slowed down over the past few days, and I'm hoping you can help us out of this slump. We can’t afford to let our grassroots momentum grind to a halt just before the most important FEC report of the year, especially when our numbers will go public for everyone to see.

Republicans are going to use this filing deadline to verify if we have what it takes to defeat Ron Johnson and flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat. That's why it's crucial our report proves we have the resources to take them on. But we took a huge risk by placing a _second_ TV ad buy, so we have quite a bit of catching up to do.

That’s why I’m turning to you:

**Can you make a contribution of any amount ahead of our first election-year FEC fundraising deadline? clean_body: | | | | It is a matter of national sovereignty Peter, The post-Cold War order is unraveling before our eyes, which means that energy independence is vital to sustain America’s way of life. In 2019, the United States had reached energy independence for the first time since 1957. With the failed leadership of the Biden Administration, we are seeing the consequences of our nation being betrayed by America Last policies. When our country cannot systematically produce enough energy to keep up with demand OR replenish reserves, we become vulnerable as a nation! I explain it all in my : Albert Einstein once said,“For everything that is really great and inspiring is created by the individual who can labor in freedom.” Conservative Americans must unite and stand together asserting the founding principles our nation was built upon: the freedom to pursue the American Dream without the meddling of career politicians whose self-interests are in direct opposition to a thriving citizenry laboring in their pursuit of prosperity. Together we can reclaim the power to become energy independent again by unleashing the spirit of exceptionalism which resides in the heart of hard-working Americans! As your next Congressman, I will fight against career politicians whose actions compromise our national security and impoverish American families while they become enriched, elite overlords. Let’s send Washington, D.C. a message: America First patriots will reject Radical Left Democrats and establishment RINOs who continue to undercut the potential of domestic prosperity by enriching themselves through shady deals with foreign adversaries. Your support of my campaign with a donation in any amount today will show the Radical Left that the American people have rejected leadership whose policies empower tyrannical behavior worldwide and threaten national sovereignty at home. | | | | | | In Liberty, Marc McMain Congressional Candidate for GA-10 | | [Paid for by Marc McMain for Congress, Inc.]() Our mailing address: Marc McMain for Congress, Inc. P.O. Box 191 Loganville, GA 30052

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: LOL, Republicans are *not* happy about this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
They’re spending $40 million and counting to bring our campaign down.
#
Well, well, well — would you look at that, Derek.
Less than 24 hours after the dark money super PAC supporting Conor Lamb’s campaign attacked us using (cheap) Fox News talking points, Senate Republicans piled on with their own press release.
What’s happening here is _pretty_ obvious, Derek. **Republicans’ worst fear has become John Fetterman winning the Democratic nomination** , because polls show John sweeping the floor with every possible GOP nominee come November.
(Also, can we just say — the way all of our opponents are trying to spin John’s _massive_ leads in the polls as a BAD thing is kind of hilarious? 😂)
But the GOP does have one undeniable advantage right now: their ultra-rich candidates + super PACs have spent upward of **$40 million** on advertising, with no signs of slowing down.
If we’re going to keep up with the GOP’s boatloads of money, we need to act _quickly_. **[Please, will you be one of the grassroots donors we need to step up and make a donation of $5, $50, $500, or whatever you can afford right now, Derek? Gifts like yours are critical to sending John to the U.S. Senate.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45883?refcode=em20220322-5088&t=1&akid=5088%2E434096%2EJKn5G5)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45883?refcode=em20220322-5088&amounts=5&t=20&akid=5088%2E434096%2EJKn5G5)**
Not only have Republican millionaires and special interests already spent $40 million, we know it’s only going to get worse from here. After all, we haven’t even made it past the primaries!
But let’s not forget the good news: We have the biggest grassroots campaign in Pennsylvania BY FAR. And if we all come together right now, we can out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign our GOP competitors, like Dr. Oz, just by the sheer force of our numbers. That’s why we’re asking YOU right now...
**[Can you please be one of the grassroots donors we need to make a donation today to stay ahead of our opponents in PA? Chip in any amount now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45883?refcode=em20220322-5088&t=21&akid=5088%2E434096%2EJKn5G5)**
With your support, we can keep the GOP on defense and keep building up this amazing campaign. 🙌
–Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220322-5088-footer&t=22&refcode2=5088_434096_JKn5G5&akid=5088%2E434096%2EJKn5G5)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=5088%2E434096%2EJKn5G5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=5088%2E434096%2EJKn5G5)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Team Lira
subject: If TX-23 stays red
body:
Peter,

Tony Gonzales and the GOP gerrymandered TX-23 to stay red. Forever.

They want to make sure that the GOP controls our district because they know that if Tony holds on to this seat, they will keep their stronghold in Texas.

Will you help us fight to turn Texas blue — starting right here, in our district? Chip in any amount now to join us.

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220322?refcode=em20220322]

It’s time for the people’s needs to be heard loud and clear.

That means we need a representative who’s going to stand up to the status quo and fight for the policies that Texans want — policies that Gonzales won’t touch with a 10 foot pole.

Policies like voting rights protection, long-term, meaningful immigration reform, protecting LGBT people in our state, and ensuring access to affordable healthcare for everyone are popular with most Texans, and they work.

Texas needs a leader who is going to fight for change — and that won’t happen as long as Rep. Tony Gonzales stays in office. Will you donate whatever you can to make sure TX-23 has real representation that will listen to the voices of the people?

Let’s get to work,
Team Lira

Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220322?refcode=em20220322]

https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

John Lira for Congress
1721 WW White Rd, Suite 120
#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena, are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**
